| | Team,
As the longest-serving woman in Congress, _I’ve been through my fair share of tough fights._

But my re-election race next year is shaping up to what hard-right Republicans wanted -- a gerrymandered free-for-all. They have rigged the Ohio Congressional maps in their favor because they **know they can’t win a fair fight. They are stacking the deck to take 87% of the Congressional seats in Ohio when the popular vote hovers in the 55/45 range.**

Republican map drawers don’t know what the people of Northern Ohio know **\--_I’ve always fought FOR the PEOPLE of my district._

** **[My team tells me we need to raise $1,291 to hit our November fundraising goal. name: MarkKelly.com
subject: HOLY COW! GREAT NEWS
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

**GREAT NEWS:** When we set our goal to reach 50,000 donations in November, we weren’t sure if we had a realistic chance to get there. It was such an ambitious goal, but one we felt we had to try while facing all these attack ads.
Now it looks like we have a chance to get there.
**BETTER NEWS:** Thousands of people have chipped in from all over, and if we can keep it up, we can hit our goal before midnight.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-nov21?refcode=em211130-3-15&t=1&refcode2=1738_6688874_QvC3JA&akid=1738%2E6688874%2EQvC3JA)
Each one of those dots is a donation made in the last hour. And if you can add yours, we’ll reach this goal. Together.
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to Mark Kelly’s campaign before midnight to help us reach our goal of 50,000 donations in November?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-nov21?refcode=em211130-3-15&t=2&refcode2=1738_6688874_QvC3JA&akid=1738%2E6688874%2EQvC3JA)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-nov21?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em211130-3-15&t=21&refcode2=1738_6688874_QvC3JA&akid=1738%2E6688874%2EQvC3JA)**

| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-nov21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em211130-3-15&t=23&refcode2=1738_6688874_QvC3JA&akid=1738%2E6688874%2EQvC3JA)**

****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-nov21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em211130-3-15&t=24&refcode2=1738_6688874_QvC3JA&akid=1738%2E6688874%2EQvC3JA)**

name: Morgan Harper HQ
subject: We’re still short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
We’re reaching out because we still need more grassroots support
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20211130-425-footer-ak&t=2&akid=425%2E90090%2E752dIq)
We’ll keep this brief: We’re still short of our 700 contribution goal and we have less than 6 hours left to reach it. **[If you can help, make a contribution of any amount right now to help be one of the final supporters we need to reach our goal. We’ll send you a free Morganize sticker to say thank you.](https://act.morganharper.org/go/16481?t=3&akid=425%2E90090%2E752dIq)**
[****](https://act.morganharper.org/go/16481?t=4&akid=425%2E90090%2E752dIq)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/16487?refcode=em20211130-425&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=425%2E90090%2E752dIq)**
These stickers have been super popular with our volunteers at events across the state, and it’s easy to see why. Besides the design (which we think is really cool!), the sticker also echoes one of the core values of our campaign: _organizing the community._
**We’re out here to Morganize our friends, our neighbors, our communities, and our whole state to prove that a better Ohio is possible if we come together.**
Morgan deeply believes in the value of community, and she’s the only candidate who can win and flip this seat blue because she is committed to organizing and mobilizing communities that have been left behind for far too long.
We can prove that the status quo’s days are numbered if we join together. **[Chip in whatever you can in these final hours before our 11:59 PM deadline and we’ll send you a Morganize sticker as a thank you for helping fuel our grassroots movement.](https://act.morganharper.org/go/16481?t=24&akid=425%2E90090%2E752dIq)**
Together,
Team Morgan Harper

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20211130-425-footer&t=25&refcode2=425_90090_752dIq&akid=425%2E90090%2E752dIq)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.morganharper.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.morganharper.org/sign/personal_info/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.morganharper.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=425%2E90090%2E752dIq)

Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio

Morgan deeply believes in the value of community, and she’s the only candidate who can win and flip this seat blue because she is committed to organizing and mobilizing communities that have been left behind for far too long. We can prove that the status quo’s days are numbered if we join together. Together, Team Morgan Harper | | Email us: contact@morganharper.org

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: I hope you'll do this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
I hope you had a good Thanksgiving!

All is well with the O’Rourkes. It’s been wonderful to spend these last
few days at home in El Paso with Amy and the kids. We’ve been taking
hikes, throwing the football, playing music, watching too much TV (the new
Peter Jackson Beatles documentary and Yellowstone) and eating too much
food (Thanksgiving dinner at my mom’s and everything left over).

But part of what makes it special is that it’s got to end. The kids have
to go back to school, Amy needs to get back to work, and it’s time for me
to hit the road again.

Over the next two weeks I’ll be driving to and spending time in Midland,
Stamford, Fort Worth, Killeen, Austin, San Marcos, Sugar Land, Houston,
Galveston, Beaumont, Nacogdoches, Marshall, Texarkana, Paris, Wichita
Falls, Amarillo, and Lubbock among other important Texas communities.

It’s a lot of ground to cover, but important to do it if we’re going to
meet all the Texans who will decide the outcome of this election.

And it’s only possible to do all of this with your help and financial
support.

Whether it’s putting gas in the truck, renting the venues for our
meetings, or supporting our volunteers who are knocking on doors across
the state right now, what you pitch in goes directly to winning this
election.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50275?refcode=ema20211130-164741&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=164741%2E444211%2Eum113i ]I hope that through this email we can reach our goal of raising
$200,000 before the end of the month. That’s a lot of money, but we’re
going to need it if we’re going to reach every part of this state and win
this election.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50275?refcode=ema20211130-164741&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=164741%2E444211%2Eum113i ]Contribute $3

I want to deliver for every Texan as our state’s next governor. The only
way I know how to do that is by first showing up everywhere, listening to
everyone, and making sure that we bring everyone in — no one written off
and no one taken for granted.

Thanks for making sure I have the resources to get it done,

Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=1021&akid=164741%2E444211%2Eum113i

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

The American people will see who you are, and we’re going to stand with you.”** **–Congressman Madison Cawthorn** [](http://links.patrickwitt.com/u/click?_t=c6f93fbae9f248579219163f37a7b6fe&_m=5bc511db53ad41df9a19c5564c3d65a6&_e=EaGNaPj1iaVDx9I_J21aO2OWbSxbHGCxY4-hZYr5ms3dyp3v_yhj7a-V9rXyx7ceFejUclxMB_4D4qeAf8C3dH3YCgjsEmFs-rRBjL3_xtZjbP09qcOwm_sZuXCurMuKCZeljTrZZPnE4zMGAUPpHUYHKxobVhx-DXZA1NmEDe060Fle198EegOTxwrOviS7hKVzErjONRGMklR2KeWtkKbn1dH3AhtH8V-TBfDc4gXjI8La7Kiedq19t07IFJhckXJpB107gFqmrP77at1xmh6rKEmAizjdGIkI3wU_PdhVmoAP2vrZ78ZUs_nyVLih_DMBFjyQN6KBDKfBptQo_3PGFC-dZlzBQojQAdqcDInNgnJN9qC7nGXJjE8YOmmJfYMRfMjBVTNxMuB0B20vgrrJke3t8IlRhELygR3bL6E%3D) **Congressman Cawthorn is a true conservative who is taking the fight to the liberals in Congress every day.** He is routinely attacked by Democrats and fake Republicans because of his conservative credentials. And he keeps on fighting. **It is an honor to have his endorsement.** Madison is endorsing me because he knows how important it is to elect America First Republicans who won’t back down in Washington. **He’s been fighting the good fight, but he NEEDS reinforcements. ** **Will you help me win this race so I can go to Washington and stand strong with Madison Cawthorn and many other conservative champions?** [**DONATE BEFORE 11:59 PM**](http://links.patrickwitt.com/u/click?_t=c6f93fbae9f248579219163f37a7b6fe&_m=5bc511db53ad41df9a19c5564c3d65a6&_e=EaGNaPj1iaVDx9I_J21aO2OWbSxbHGCxY4-hZYr5ms3dyp3v_yhj7a-V9rXyx7ceFejUclxMB_4D4qeAf8C3dH3YCgjsEmFs-rRBjL3_xtZjbP09qcOwm_sZuXCurMuKCZeljTrZZPnE4zMGAUPpHUYHKxobVhx-DXZA1NmEDe060Fle198EegOTxwrOviS7hKVzErjONRGMklR2KeWtkCrsuQ5Ep3BX8NlXKJzgymh3IENn00Ps6HtpsH4q6PArE_jJg9FQi9i6-xpbO-8EktG2U58k-sTyVuVy9g9KNnx8pYrsKSpWhLasoSzNb9Attb2tQaoQEARVjyJxVJS-95u04rJXSqWGw3zZD8z4ouv4zrwc6A0xJxD72mVF_8S8SU7O6v6ukug_pSVhitnGXG08arTkppDYxwJFZzWRJAQ%3D) [**Please rush $250, $100, $50, or even $25 before the clock strikes midnight tonight so we can meet our end-of-month goal.**](http://links.patrickwitt.com/u/click?_t=c6f93fbae9f248579219163f37a7b6fe&_m=5bc511db53ad41df9a19c5564c3d65a6&_e=EaGNaPj1iaVDx9I_J21aO2OWbSxbHGCxY4-hZYr5ms3dyp3v_yhj7a-V9rXyx7ceFejUclxMB_4D4qeAf8C3dH3YCgjsEmFs-rRBjL3_xtZjbP09qcOwm_sZuXCurMuKCZeljTrZZPnE4zMGAUPpHUYHKxobVhx-DXZA1NmEDe060Fle198EegOTxwrOviS7hKVzErjONRGMklR2KeWtkO3bwXVK67--z_8svqDukpMXG1rVhRTa7C5KEeYwo5zAi96yc2qNW_tcMOJ4QDGeVGsOdDgsV92X451yQWnZefxNwvJc0AOpUln1ud-mdrudSyCpWB2M2P_uAXMeoJe8LhRTtlqd1zsUE_x7ovVCoLeNBVy09ne72dJKiuekVI3zkiAfycK8a-REhmv9F2nzmZmDc4AXZfeMqR0NToambbE%3D) Thank you for your loyal support. clean_body: Dear Peter, I have HUGE news. Congressman Madison Cawthorn (NC-11) has officially endorsed my campaign! “Tonight, it is my absolute honor to endorse Patrick Witt, because brother, I don’t care what you’re going up against—how many primary opponents you have—you will win! The American people will see who you are, and we’re going to stand with you.” –Congressman Madison Cawthorn Congressman Cawthorn is a true conservative who is taking the fight to the liberals in Congress every day. He is routinely attacked by Democrats and fake Republicans because of his conservative credentials. And he keeps on fighting. It is an honor to have his endorsement. Madison is endorsing me because he knows how important it is to elect America First Republicans who won’t back down in Washington. He’s been fighting the good fight, but he NEEDS reinforcements. Will you help me win this race so I can go to Washington and stand strong with Madison Cawthorn and many other conservative champions? Thank you for your loyal support. Best, Patrick | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Copyright © 2021 Patrick Witt for Congress, All rights reserved.

name: =?utf-8?q?Matthew_and_Thomas_=28Cheri=E2=80=99s_twins=29?=
subject: For our birthday, we want to take a moment to celebrate our mom. Will you indulge us?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
Matthew and Thomas here, Cheri’s twins. Today is our birthday, so will you indulge us for a minute while we talk about our mom?
#

Hey - Matthew and Thomas here, Cheri’s twins. Today is our birthday, so will you indulge us for a minute while we talk about our mom?
She is our rock — our biggest champion and always there to care for us.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-nov21?refcode=em211130-3-t2&refcode2=84.357359.em8R0P&t=1&akid=84%2E357359%2Eem8R0P)
_Here we are with our mom — Matthew on the left and Thomas on the right._
She taught us the same values our grandma taught her at a young age — hard work, faith and a commitment to service. Every day for as long as either of us can remember, she’s gotten up to go to work for the people of our state — fighting for justice and fairness.
And she’s so much more than a trailblazing leader and public servant. She’s a great mom. She is someone who lives life fully, from her love of dance to our family’s midnight tennis games...
She’s also the most compassionate person we know. And that kind of compassion is sorely missed right now in the U.S. Senate.
**[So, here’s our birthday wish: Our mom has an important fundraising deadline at midnight tonight, and she needs folks like you to pitch in to reach her campaign’s goal. Will you help us surprise our mom by making a donation to her campaign for U.S. Senate today? Every dollar will go directly toward turning North Carolina blue and sending a voice for the people to the Senate.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-nov21?refcode=em211130-3-t2&refcode2=84.357359.em8R0P&t=2&akid=84%2E357359%2Eem8R0P)**
Thanks for helping us with this surprise for our mom. It may be our birthday — but we think our mom deserves to be celebrated today too for all that she’s done for us.
Sincerely,
Matthew and Thomas
(Cheri’s twins)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-nov21?refcode=em211130-3-t2&refcode2=84.357359.em8R0P&t=3&akid=84%2E357359%2Eem8R0P)**

Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
PO Box 28778
Raleigh, NC 27611
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you want to receive fewer emails, you may [submit this form to get only our most important updates](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=4&akid=84%2E357359%2Eem8R0P). Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.cheribeasley.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=84%2E357359%2Eem8R0P). If you would like to support Cheri's campaign for the U.S. Senate in North Carolina, please consider [making a donation](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beasley-em-2021?refcode=em-footer&t=6&refcode2=84_357359_em8R0P&akid=84%2E357359%2Eem8R0P) today to help us make history.

Click here to rush a $10 contribution right now >>_](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z7BEnzEB3IORvT7VbHa0t2mL3QS4UvNTZ1uFLZiD2gbUONVqhMhcgGTPNsS4K9cQJHO_7W59AJW2B8aWdw73-3Xr9zAanZTEb6Lqz7ZTE2TsDaOtQuU5zQlJbHx4xLJmKN-LTCfYq-nZVKS644AM-A3kAFQp59-GiIHyfRh9DTzJikuoZiV9ptVEfpzJDhpevskxsXMUvscpAAU6IXL2atXrZbzLwouWQzqTT_0EH8aoW9zBs04BFND9AGGpvqN1cQs9iJgSr5eAPIzcd43eY042n4A3xTcs_kmnJYwtBw5aBtYEI0_iNmMaOT9duaugo/3hh/BxJemBRtQjWH4-6zD0C5SA/h0/seK-sGk8TpWgmvihZcTp_BubqAZN_z_mofQeo1fSiIA)** _ _We need the resources to take on one of the most conservative Democrats in Congress and how we need to fight for a clear vision for our party._ _Afeni_ _Deputy Campaign Manager, Mckayla 2022_
* * *
**Team, let me explain why this election matters so much.****[_If you’re already up to date on the stakes in this must-win race against a conservative Democrat, you can click here to rush a contribution before our End-of-Month deadline_](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z7BEnzEB3IORvT7VbHa0t2mL3QS4UvNTZ1uFLZiD2gbQVPZDzzY8oNOwsL_zBcvhIP-3j8NhI3K5JwPCEwLoHAD0Yax2lnNkA_29H9hpAeAlsf5lUaQMmM_MEv9QxzVYwIYXYd_Y4tdQ3m4oqqU-PyjJItFf4RCRURX0KGz0VuhCN_1oszSvgLc_eX1nipKBKTtIbyMu9VFLotuzks3C44hahgI6vyRCszq1D0EvHsx3JHwJjJBSX6LHgAia0D_eXCFRo5TMnfl_kjmuDDFVsUwjP4wWou7GXlDnNPp00Vjw/3hh/BxJemBRtQjWH4-6zD0C5SA/h1/u3WAFj4Hqb8mTbSH3GOKmxVWWC3I98ETVQdOn_LqiJw)** In 2020, Democrats turned out in record numbers to beat Donald Trump and far-right Republicans across the country. In 2021, we’ve already seen how leading Democrats have watered down key pieces of legislation, falling short of the action we need for social, economic and environmental justice. We saw how that led to a devastating defeat in Virginia and a closer-than-it-should-have-been race in New Jersey. We can’t afford to make the same mistakes in 2022. I’m fighting hard for a vision that makes it clear what Democrats are _for_ , not just what we’re _against_. Nobody’s going to win an election in 2022 simply by not being Donald Trump. **[_So I’m humbly asking: Will you donate right now to help raise the money we need in this race to take on the corporate PACs and dark money interests? We’ve been falling a little short this month and your donation can help us catch up._](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z7BEnzEB3IORvT7VbHa0t2mL3QS4UvNTZ1uFLZiD2gbWqaI4MCeRo7PtBfpD_ABoV-rp6PplPxCOAeMGz6MHzaleKCdO-yQkGc6B5Tg3yT3pqV5XKnprHu7_Q0YmZ7LYsiOiQX84fZrt0jlqzFeUELuisxCPYRdFJgil9yvLBrYNNv783cPhe0fRidJ3xf071nywJ5XKCR5Eb-1-I7zrmkr0QkUXatnos0CZAdcyTqBwkKd-IbtLa4ARr0qNw9OIOxLbYFvXcbWhe2D3nX4lAHRg5cdH5av_AbJChY3-uLxw/3hh/BxJemBRtQjWH4-6zD0C5SA/h2/0YXZYreXjRjjEEJQelqak7GQcF5YZx0rZ7pL2D8XMGQ)** Thank you for taking the time to read this message and for your continued support. Mckayla

We need the resources to take on one of the most conservative Democrats in Congress and how we need to fight for a clear vision for our party. Afeni Deputy Campaign Manager, Mckayla 2022 Team, let me explain why this election matters so much.** In 2020, Democrats turned out in record numbers to beat Donald Trump and far-right Republicans across the country. In 2021, we’ve already seen how leading Democrats have watered down key pieces of legislation, falling short of the action we need for social, economic and environmental justice. We saw how that led to a devastating defeat in Virginia and a closer-than-it-should-have-been race in New Jersey. We can’t afford to make the same mistakes in 2022. I’m fighting hard for a vision that makes it clear what Democrats are for , not just what we’re against. Nobody’s going to win an election in 2022 simply by not being Donald Trump. Thank you for taking the time to read this message and for your continued support. Mckayla PAID FOR BY MCKAYLA 2022 AND PROUDLY POWERED BY THE PEOPLE mckaylawilkes.com | "Privacy Policy" Mckayla 2022 P.O. Box 670 Riverdale, MD 20738 | | Sent via . clean_body: I need your help. Hey Peter, I hope you had a safe and happy Thanksgiving with your family and friends... I wanted to let you know that I just got an update from my finance team, and we’re behind in reaching our November digital fundraising goal. I need your help. Will you chip in or - to help us cross the finish line for November? If you’re ready to FIRE SISOLAK in 2022, click this personalized link to make your contribution now: Thank you, Dean Heller \------------begin forwarded message------------ | | | END OF MONTH FUNDRAISING DEADLINE | | | Peter, We have less than a year until Nevadans vote to elect their next Governor. That’s why Dean has set an ambitious goal for our November fundraising deadline. We have $32,000 to raise before the end of this month. Can we count on you to help us get there? By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution: If you've saved payment information with WinRed, your donation will go through automatically. Conservatives in this country are rising up to make a change. Just look at what happened in Virginia. That could be Nevada next year. The Red Wave is building in this country, and it’s coming for Nevada. Be part of the movement to restore conservative values in Nevada. Can you chip in, , or even JUST today? Make your donation today: Thank you, Team Heller | Text Pit Crew to 775-234-0070 | | Paid for by Dean Heller for Nevada Governor | | 18124 Wedge Pkwy #1044, Reno, NV 89511 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: ALERT: MN Senate GOP Selling Out on Vaccine Mandates
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=senate_gop_selling_out_on_vac&n=1)
---
November 30th, 2021
## Senate GOP Selling Out on Vaccine Mandates
Senate Majority Leader Jeremy Miller along with his leadership team of Sen. Michelle Benson and Sen. Paul Gazelka - both governor candidates - are selling us out on forcing a vote on the Stop Vaccine Mandate Amendment in order to pass the $250 Million Frontline Workers Pay bill. Action 4 Liberty supporters have **called for the Senate Republicans to refuse to pass the massive bill unless it has the Stop Vaccine Mandate Amendment attached to it** , which would ban vaccine mandates in the state (public and private) and would nullify federal vaccine mandates inside the state boundaries. Unfortunately, Sen. Jeremy Miller has recently stated that Senate Republicans are refusing to push healthcare freedom for ALL workers. This is a big sell out since **people all across the state are currently being terminated from their jobs for refusing to get the jab**. In a [**letter to the Governor**](https://www.action4liberty.com/senate_sell_out_on_stopping_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=senate_gop_selling_out_on_vac&n=2) on November 22nd, Miller lists items that he thinks could be "agreed to prior to a one-day special session" which includes a prohibition only on "state-issued COVID vaccination mandates"; **not for ALL workers!** He's also willing to protect Health Commissioner Jan Malcolm's job in order to pass the comprised position. We must stop this sell out! **Jake Duesenberg** **Action 4 Liberty** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=senate_gop_selling_out_on_vac&n=3 "Support Us") [Support Us](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=senate_gop_selling_out_on_vac&n=3)
---

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=senate_gop_selling_out_on_vac&n=4).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=senate_gop_selling_out_on_vac&n=5).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=8ZU0Lizkf4ldaLE4eHvP4jrdVLeo6TMxn9HZ_FOKnho&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=senate_gop_selling_out_on_vac&n=6), software for leaders.

We need to reach our goal to make sure we have the resources to fight off Chuck Schumer, Nancy Pelosi, and their liberal allies. Peter, I know you have already done so much, but I need to ask you again. name: Team Booker
subject: One last time, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter,

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/13508?refcode=em20211130-1285&t=1020&akid=1285%2E346206%2EgXJXnT ]We’re hours away from our November fundraising deadline, and we could
really use your support to cross the finish line and hit our goal in time.
Will you please chip in $5?

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/13508?refcode=em20211130-1285&t=1021&akid=1285%2E346206%2EgXJXnT ]Contribute $5

Peter, we just
had to ask one last time today if you’d be able to help us out.

Our work isn’t easy, but it’s incredibly important. If we want to build a
better, brighter future for our Commonwealth — starting with replacing
Rand Paul and his corporate war chest — we’ll need as much support as
possible.

It’s not easy work to run a campaign that reaches every corner of
Kentucky. So many Kentuckians have been ignored, left behind, and failed
by our leaders. But it is work we must do.

Together, we can build a campaign that actually fights for working people
in this country. Together, we can end Rand Paul’s Senate career, which he
has abused time and time again to benefit himself at the expense of the
people he serves. We just need you.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/13508?refcode=em20211130-1285&t=1022&akid=1285%2E346206%2EgXJXnT ]So Peter,
before our deadline at midnight tonight — will you please chip in
$5 or whatever you can afford?

Thank you,

Team Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20211130-1285-footer&t=1023&refcode2=1285_346206_gXJXnT&akid=1285%2E346206%2EgXJXnT

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1285%2E346206%2EgXJXnT

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

name: John Fetterman
subject: What we know about Dr. Oz
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We can’t let a multi-millionaire celebrity doctor buy this U.S. Senate seat and destroy our Democratic Senate majority.
#
BREAKING NEWS, Derek.
**Moments ago on Fox News, celebrity pseudoscience doctor Dr. Oz announced to Sean Hannity that he is *officially* running to be Pennsylvania’s next senator.**
[****](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37876?refcode=em20211130-3663&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3663%2E434096%2E_sIMtY)
Derek, I wish I was kidding you. You probably recognize him from his television show. **But here’s the truth about Dr. Oz that you absolutely must know:**
❌ Dr. Oz is a Republican multi-millionaire who is 100% ready to self-fund this race with unlimited cash — starting with a reported multi-million dollar ad buy.
❌ He’s a longtime resident of New Jersey — NOT of Pennsylvania.
❌ He’s one of Donald Trump’s favorite doctors + a Trump administration appointee.
❌ He loves to push deadly disinformation about COVID-19 and highlight vaccine deniers on his TV show.
Derek, if Dr. Oz makes it to the general election, he’ll have the entire backing of the Republican establishment + unlimited dark money behind him.
**That’s why it’s so critical to raise as much money as possible right now to defeat Dr. Oz + fight back.**
[**_Will you rush a donation of $5 to ensure our campaign has what it takes to win this election? We can’t let a multi-millionaire celebrity doctor buy this U.S. Senate seat and destroy our Democratic Senate majority._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37876?refcode=em20211130-3663&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3663%2E434096%2E_sIMtY)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37876?refcode=em20211130-3663&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=3663%2E434096%2E_sIMtY)**
Thanks,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211130-3663-footer&t=22&refcode2=3663_434096__sIMtY&akid=3663%2E434096%2E_sIMtY)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

I know it's late, but this is too important -- so please listen closely: \-- I'm still alarmingly short of my must-hit End of Month goal. \-- There are just 150 minutes left before my midnight deadline. \-- So I 'm calling on my best supporters (including you) to rush $3 and help close my budget gap before midnight. | Dear Friends,

As I travel around the district, I hear the same thing: people are ready for change!
>From rising crime and crushing inflation, to schools that don’t listen to parents, one-party rule is hurting the county and the country. I will be an independent voice in Congress that works ONLY for the people.

Please [chip in today](https://cn4pa.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e0d3836abfea301482298bb99&id=5ba54987ba&e=fa7e3557b6) and help me take back Pennsylvania for the people of the district.

Thanks for all of your support!
Christian Nascimento

| | | This week, my opponent announced that he is no longer running for this seat.
That means this race has just become our best chance to elect another grassroots progressive to the House who will center the needs of working people.**And it’s now a MUST-WIN seat in our battle to stop Republicans from taking Congress.**
For months we have been building a multi-generational, multi-ethnic, multi-racial coalition grounded in the idea that the government should work for us. We have stood up to lobbyists and fought for universal healthcare, action on climate, voting rights and real relief for working families.

subject: Donald Trump Makes Shocking Announcement Today

name: Dr. Lorinser
subject: Highlights from our day on the campaign trail, but some devastating news
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
Yesterday our day began and ended with energy, hope and inspiration, but in between we were hit with some devistating news... **Highlights from my day on the campaign trail ** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39217191/318857787/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2IyODI3NC05MjUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CLxCzx-qpp29VXQpRcXOekv0WTWytea48sWwGAG1SyM=) _**I read an interesting advertorial tonight in Curtis at the Indivisible Central UP meeting – the Headline, "Bergman Cripples Our Democracy." Hard to disagree with these folks. No place is too out of the way, no group is too small. Thank you to all the activists who met up last night. Your energy and hope inspires me. When we're united, we are indivisible.**_ [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39217192/318857788/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2IyODI3NC05MjUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CLxCzx-qpp29VXQpRcXOekv0WTWytea48sWwGAG1SyM=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39217193/318857789/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2IyODI3NC05MjUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CLxCzx-qpp29VXQpRcXOekv0WTWytea48sWwGAG1SyM=) Good morning, Friend. Yesterday, we began the day releasing an **[environmental policy](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39217194/318857790/1164713831?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2IyODI3NC05MjUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CLxCzx-qpp29VXQpRcXOekv0WTWytea48sWwGAG1SyM=&emci=c464eca7-8c52-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&emdi=5cb28274-9252-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&ceid=15167427)** we shared with you, with a note about our **[November fundraising deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39217195/318857791/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2IyODI3NC05MjUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CLxCzx-qpp29VXQpRcXOekv0WTWytea48sWwGAG1SyM=)** We're happy to say we're on pace now to put up a very competitive number this quarter against Bergman. Your generosity is humbling. I'm grateful for your support. We need campaign finance reform, folks. Candidates and elected officials should concentrate on voter engagement and service, not raising money. The sad reality is until I'm in office and can fight for reform, our grassroots contributors are competing with corporate PAC checks and dark money. We're frugal, staying toe for toe with Bergman and **[your donations](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39217196/318857792/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2IyODI3NC05MjUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CLxCzx-qpp29VXQpRcXOekv0WTWytea48sWwGAG1SyM=)** are going a long way. Thank you. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39217197/318857793/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2IyODI3NC05MjUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CLxCzx-qpp29VXQpRcXOekv0WTWytea48sWwGAG1SyM=) **Bell Forest Products** My team and I spent the afternoon at Bell Forest Products, learning about their business and welcoming the press to our listening tour. We got an inside look at one of the leading online wood suppliers.

We've been making several stops at local businesses to explore how hard-working family businesses drive economies by sustaining a job force and the environment.

I'm taking a deep interest in how companies like Bell are navigating the pandemic and sustainably using natural resources. Getting an inside look at "Made in the USA" products in Michigan's 1st Congressional District has been valuable.

Bell Forest Products works closely with suppliers to ensure responsible forestry practices. Its log and lumber suppliers actively combat illegal logging. In 2019, Bell Forest Products was also part of the Small Manufacturers Energy Waste Reduction Incentive pilot program. Michigan Energy Office awarded Bell a $9,844 rebate for energy efficiency improvements. Impressive operation. We're visiting these businesses because a true representative of Northern Michigan and the U.P. should be embedded in the district. We must meet constituents and visit their businesses to get a hands-on perspective of their challenges and successes. I'm gaining valuable insight into how we can move the economy forward and improve the lives of hard-working families. **Devastating News** We were all hit with very sobering news yesterday. The incident at Oxford High School was devastating. The death of multiple students and injuries to several others, including a teacher by a 15-year-old with a semiautomatic handgun, is horrific. I grieve with the Oxford community, and my heart goes out to the school faculty, staff, and students who experienced unthinkable chaos and loss. Today our hearts are with those grieving, the parents who are sat down last night for dinner trying to comfort scared children, and with the families who had an empty seat at the table. It's never enough without societal change and justice, but for now I hope all will accept our profound condolences and prayers. Gun violence is a public health issue. **Indivisible** We finished the evening in Curtis, Michigan, at the Indivisible Meeting at the beautiful Chamberlain Ole Forest Inn. Thank you to our hosts. Indivisible Central UP is a group of friends and neighbors working for peace, people, and the environment by engaging with political representatives. They are active and energized. It inspires me and gives me hope. We have to believe we can win this race. When we know we can win – and in the upcoming weeks, I'll share our path to victory with you – our enthusiasm and energy are contagious. If there's any contagion the world needs right now, it's hope. We know we have to work hard to get out the vote. We know we have to convert one in 12 non-Democratic voters to our side (doable!). We know we have to raise enough funds to compete. But, there are so many things in our favor this election cycle, we can't afford another two years of Jack Bergman. We can do this. We will win. It's time we stand up, speak up, and demand to be served by someone with dignity and a moral compass. I intend to be that kind of representative. **[Join me](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39217198/318857794/-232506344?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2IyODI3NC05MjUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CLxCzx-qpp29VXQpRcXOekv0WTWytea48sWwGAG1SyM=&emci=c464eca7-8c52-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&emdi=5cb28274-9252-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&ceid=15167427)** and stay on the lookout in the next few days for a lot of press coverage of the campaign. We're on a roll. Today we're visiting the Upper Peninsula Animal Welfare Shelter for a celebrity fundraiser and traveling to Delta County to speak with voters and party leaders. [_**If you're willing to offer a contribution and help us with our outreach and travel expenses, your donation will be greatly appreciated.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39217199/318857795/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2IyODI3NC05MjUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CLxCzx-qpp29VXQpRcXOekv0WTWytea48sWwGAG1SyM=) Thank you, and have a great morning. Yours, –Dr. Bob [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39217200/318857796/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2IyODI3NC05MjUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CLxCzx-qpp29VXQpRcXOekv0WTWytea48sWwGAG1SyM=) [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39217201/318857797/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2IyODI3NC05MjUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CLxCzx-qpp29VXQpRcXOekv0WTWytea48sWwGAG1SyM=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39217202/318857798/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2IyODI3NC05MjUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CLxCzx-qpp29VXQpRcXOekv0WTWytea48sWwGAG1SyM=) If you believe you received this message in error, please [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/c464eca7-8c52-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93/5cb28274-9252-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2IyODI3NC05MjUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CLxCzx-qpp29VXQpRcXOekv0WTWytea48sWwGAG1SyM=&id=116937387). clean_body: Yesterday our day began and ended with energy, hope and inspiration, but in between we were hit with some devistating news... Highlights from my day on the campaign trail = I read an interesting advertorial tonight in Curtis at the Indivisible Central UP meeting – the Headline, "Bergman Cripples Our Democracy." Hard to disagree with these folks. No place is too out of the way, no group is too small. Thank you to all the activists who met up last night. Your energy and hope inspires me. When we're united, we are indivisible. = = Good morning, Friend. Yesterday, we began the day releasing an we shared with you, with a note about our = We're happy to say we're on pace now to put up a very competitive number this quarter against Bergman. Your generosity is humbling. I'm grateful for your support. We need campaign finance reform, folks. Candidates and elected officials should concentrate on voter engagement and service, not raising money. The sad reality is until I'm in office and can fight for reform, our grassroots contributors are competing with corporate PAC checks and dark money. We're frugal, staying toe for toe with Bergman and = are going a long way. Thank you. = Bell Forest Products My team and I spent the afternoon at Bell Forest Products, learning about their business and welcoming the press to our listening tour. We got an inside look at one of the leading online wood suppliers. We've been making several stops at local businesses to explore how hard-working family businesses drive economies by sustaining a job force and the environment. I'm taking a deep interest in how companies like Bell are navigating the pandemic and sustainably using natural resources. Getting an inside look at "Made in the USA" products in Michigan's 1st Congressional District has been valuable. Bell Forest Products works closely with suppliers to ensure responsible forestry practices. Its log and lumber suppliers actively combat illegal logging. In 2019, Bell Forest Products was also part of the Small Manufacturers Energy Waste Reduction Incentive pilot program. Michigan Energy Office awarded Bell a $9,844 rebate for energy efficiency improvements. Impressive operation. We're visiting these businesses because a true representative of Northern Michigan and the U.P. should be embedded in the district. We must meet constituents and visit their businesses to get a hands-on perspective of their challenges and successes. I'm gaining valuable insight into how we can move the economy forward and improve the lives of hard-working families. Devastating News We were all hit with very sobering news yesterday. The incident at Oxford High School was devastating. The death of multiple students and injuries to several others, including a teacher by a 15-year-old with a semiautomatic handgun, is horrific. I grieve with the Oxford community, and my heart goes out to the school faculty, staff, and students who experienced unthinkable chaos and loss. Today our hearts are with those grieving, the parents who are sat down last night for dinner trying to comfort scared children, and with the families who had an empty seat at the table. It's never enough without societal change and justice, but for now I hope all will accept our profound condolences and prayers. Gun violence is a public health issue. Indivisible We finished the evening in Curtis, Michigan, at the Indivisible Meeting at the beautiful Chamberlain Ole Forest Inn. Thank you to our hosts. Indivisible Central UP is a group of friends and neighbors working for peace, people, and the environment by engaging with political representatives. They are active and energized. It inspires me and gives me hope. We have to believe we can win this race. When we know we can win – and in the upcoming weeks, I'll share our path to victory with you – our enthusiasm and energy are contagious. If there's any contagion the world needs right now, it's hope. We know we have to work hard to get out the vote. We know we have to convert one in 12 non-Democratic voters to our side (doable!). We know we have to raise enough funds to compete. But, there are so many things in our favor this election cycle, we can't afford another two years of Jack Bergman. We can do this. We will win. It's time we stand up, speak up, and demand to be served by someone with dignity and a moral compass. I intend to be that kind of representative. and stay on the lookout in the next few days for a lot of press coverage of the campaign. We're on a roll. Today we're visiting the Upper Peninsula Animal Welfare Shelter for a celebrity fundraiser and traveling to Delta County to speak with voters and party leaders. = Thank you, and have a great morning. Yours, –Dr. Bob = = = If you believe you received this message in error, please . PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR. BOB LORINSER FRIENDS OF DR. BOB POX 936 Marquette, MI 49855 United States

name: Rand Paul
subject: now Fauci is lying about me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
**It 's time to FIRE FAUCI!** **[Chip in if you agree! >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58910324:6xMgUg2NR:m:1:3298722022:10752F7430EC1ABAC66F28EBF1B1F3AD:r)** __ [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58910324:6xMgUg2NR:m:1:3298722022:10752F7430EC1ABAC66F28EBF1B1F3AD:r) | |
---
Peter, Fauci is absolutely out of control.

He's lied about COVID from the very beginning. He lied about masks. He lied about funding gain of function research.

_Now, he's lying about ME._

This weekend, Dr. Fauci called me out personally for criticizing his absolute failures. He said that anyone criticizing him is really attacking science. He told an adoring anchor that anyone who opposes him is _ "really criticizing science because I represent science."_

The absolute hubris is almost too much to take - and it's yet another reason it's time to show Fauci the door.
__
[**I AGREE: FIRE FAUCI >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58910324:6xMgUg2NR:m:1:3298722022:10752F7430EC1ABAC66F28EBF1B1F3AD:r)
__
Peter, it's truly astounding and alarming that a public health bureaucrat would even think to claim such a thing.

_" I represent science."_

It's especially insane to hear that from someone who has worked so hard to ignore the science.
__
* He won't acknowledge natural immunity.
* He wants kids masked and vaccinated despite the evidence that suggests both could be more harmful to them than the actual virus.
* He continues to move the goalposts HE set for "progress" on the virus.

__
It's clear all the power has gotten to his head and it's about time we send him home.

**If you 're with me and you want to FIRE FAUCI, I hope you'll chip in now: [https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-3292728/](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58910324:6xMgUg2NR:m:1:3298722022:10752F7430EC1ABAC66F28EBF1B1F3AD:r)**

I know my effort to dismiss Fauci is clearly getting to him - that's why he's spewing this nonsense on TV! But I have to keep up the fight against the Fauci-loving bureaucracy if we truly want to see this man fired.

Please, chip in what you can to join the fight.
__
[**FIRE FAUCI: $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58910324:6xMgUg2NR:m:1:3298722022:10752F7430EC1ABAC66F28EBF1B1F3AD:r)

In Liberty,

name: American Update
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8100%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=mW5TLv2SwfwoMUBzJdhk9w&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19676%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zI9Trw9DGm7M%2fxm1V7OBHw&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” ** Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19677%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VSv%2fXq0XCIPmMvRCJMcKVg&sysid=1)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: [_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19678%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fHqtwQxuVruPK84sYMQPZA&sysid=1) Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

# Send that $50 where YOU choose!

Dear Fellow Oregonian,

2021 is soon coming to a close. Have you used your $50 political tax credit yet? ($100 for couples filing jointly.) This is a CREDIT, not a deduction. It's so easy! Just donate $50 (or $100) to my campaign, and receive the full amount as a credit subtracted from your Oregon state taxes when you file.

It’s like a free donation, and it’s a great way to help keep grassroots power in Oregon’s elections. You likely qualify if:
* You are an Oregon resident.
* You will submit an Oregon tax return for 2021.
* You will make less than $75,000 in 2020 (or $150,000 for joint-filing couples).

_**Please chip in today! **_ I didn't come into this race beholden to large companies or wealthy individuals.**I am 100% grassroots! ** Some candidates aren't; they're counting on buying this election with heavy TV advertising in the spring, rather than earning name recognition through real achievements. Without excitement from the base, they will absolutely go on to lose the general for us. **Let's make sure that doesn't happen!**

name: Wendy Rittenhouse
subject: NOT GUILTY.
body:
Kyle was just ACQUITTED and is now officially FREE!
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7bf9arpfr4jru51vh2n74n2qjc0p5cnho0iacog_rp22sh2s8i66pj0spim6ob6c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65sthchj3aphje4pm8srl69om8ppiccpmapj4chon6clhc8q3ccr36hrb9cj5e5jrfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1pb0pjgeiqr6pti6dj38o5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
| | | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi0chfereec871e22aap03lcrpcq5kj3r2spovro_rp22sh2s8i66pj0spim6ob6c1h2bs)
---
|
---
Friend,

**Kyle was just ACQUITTED and is now officially FREE!**

This was a victory for the truth, for justice, and for every American's God-given and unalienable right of self-defense.

We are so overcome with emotion, and as hard as that was, we are thankful.

We are thankful for the millions of Americans who stood with Kyle from the start.

We are thankful for the many others who watched the trial with an open mind, realized that they had been lied to for a year and a half, and spoke out.

And we are thankful to the jury which put aside bias, considered the facts, and came to the right decision.

Now, we will try to return to something that resembles a normal life – **however that requires one more major push to settle our case-related debts and pay off what we hope will be our final legal bills.**

**[So please, take all that positive energy I know you're feeling and make an urgent donation to help us close this very ugly chapter in our lives.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2mk25e1ur8hpjtosreir9rjc0foaiie41svjqu8_rp22sh2s8i66pj0spim6ob6c1h2bs)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0cir8r2fmpnqma3r0dt5ofigmd2na04in0setl0_rp22sh2s8i66pj0spim6ob6c1h2bs)
|
---
Any funds left over will be transferred into Kyle's scholarship fund so that he'll be able to graduate from college debt-free.

You'll be hearing from us again, but for now, and from the bottom of our hearts – thank you. Thank you. Thank you.

With love,

Wendy Rittenhouse
|
---

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z182d0645o6v01diik1upmvtjjcaspvs2skcpmq0_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sphm0o34cdh2bs)

By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.

Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...

name: Wendy Rittenhouse
subject: NOT GUILTY.
body:
Kyle was just ACQUITTED and is now officially FREE! This was a victory for the truth, for justice, and for every American's God
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zedu6lujv90vq85f43etiosnac064u4eo5bo7vu0_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sphm8o72cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onk65pjbd1ieoo78sj5egom8stmm5om8cr4e8qe1odmccor8sjke9ib1d5lcmpn1puie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6cc3n6kr3fcjhcor61cr56uobapbi4no)
| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8k9vk3g18rgo1q2epgln7n4a1s70q2ih4vcog3o_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sphm8o72cth2bs)
---
|
---
Friend,

**Kyle was just ACQUITTED and is now officially FREE!**

This was a victory for the truth, for justice, and for every American's God-given and unalienable right of self-defense.

We are so overcome with emotion, and as hard as that was, we are thankful.

We are thankful for the millions of Americans who stood with Kyle from the start.

We are thankful for the many others who watched the trial with an open mind, realized that they had been lied to for a year and a half, and spoke out.

And we are thankful to the jury which put aside bias, considered the facts, and came to the right decision.

Now, we will try to return to something that resembles a normal life – **however that requires one more major push to settle our case-related debts and pay off what we hope will be our final legal bills.**

**[So please, take all that positive energy I know you're feeling and make an urgent donation to help us close this very ugly chapter in our lives.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zaopai1i2lrh81oqehglcivguuq1beorlvni03j0_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sphm8o72cth2bs)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbn04kbch90oj1rpr9ht9474npeph6uvren1ldsg_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sphm8o72cth2bs)
|
---
Any funds left over will be transferred into Kyle's scholarship fund so that he'll be able to graduate from college debt-free.

You'll be hearing from us again, but for now, and from the bottom of our hearts – thank you. Thank you. Thank you.

With love,

Wendy Rittenhouse
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5dr6884b5n8mc54rf7qh1sdutm5c9frr4dmd0b0_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sphm8o72cth2bs)

name: Jameson Ellis
subject: Dan Crenshaw Exposed
body:
Facts inside...

| | | | |
---
| | Howdy Peter,

I have to admit... Dan Crenshaw had me fooled.

And it was pretty easy, at first... a veteran... former Navy SEAL... a service to our country that is honorable and deserves much appreciation, admiration, and respect!

But as a congressman who represents TX-2?

Well, below is his voting record. I'd like for you to tell me, Peter...

Does Dan Crenshaw still represent your America First values?

* On 9/24/21, he voted to sign women up for the draft & for red flag laws in the National Defense Authorization Act.
* On 6/17/21, he did not vote to repeal Authorization for Use of Military Force Against Iraq.
* On 12/22/20, he voted in for the so-called COVID relief bill and $1.4 trillion special interest spending.
* On 12/8/20, he voted to pass the National Defense Authorization Act without Section 230 reforms.
* On 3/14/20, he voted for the ‘gag and vote for it’ small-business-killing coronavirus emergency legislation.
* On 6/3/19, he voted to pass a $19 billion spending bill without funding for the border crisis.
* On 1/11/19, he voted to reduce accountability in Congress by making federal pay mandatory spending.

I don't know about you... but those votes don't represent my values.

And neither do his actions...

* 8/4/19 - we learn that Crenshaw supports Red Flag laws.
* 5/29/20 - he said voting by proxy is cowardly.
* 1/6/21 - he voted against objections to the electoral college vote in both Arizona and Pennsylvania.
* 1/7/21 - he chastised President Trump as well as his GOP colleagues in Congress for opposing the election results and inciting violence at the Capitol.
* 1/13/21 - voted against Trump’s impeachment... by proxy (thought it was cowardly?)... right after praising Rep. Liz Cheney (R-WY) for her role in spearing the congressional impeachment proceedings against President Donald Trump.
* 8/11/21 - at a GOP fundraiser in Illinois, he said that Republicans shouldn’t "kid" themselves into believing that President Trump won the 2020 election, and there was "absolutely not" enough voter fraud for Biden to have won illegitimately.

And then there's this... click below.

name: Val Demings (Personal)
subject: I fell short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I'm not exaggerating when I say that 2022 is a tipping point that could determine our country's future.
| | |
---
Friend, I apologize for being so blunt, but I just read a text from my finance director with awful news: I fell just $9,561 short of my most crucial End of Month fundraising goal.
When I miss my important goals, I risk my chance of winning in Florida – particularly since Marco Rubio and the GOP are raising millions to defeat me.
So here’s what I’m seeing, friend: Marco Rubio and the Republican establishment are going to keep raising huge sums of money. They're already attacking me, and they'll keep attacking me. **That's why I cannot lose any ground – not when Florida's last Senate race was decided by only 10,033 votes. So I asked my team to pull your supporter record, and here's what I saw:**
| | **SUPPORTER RECORD**
---
Supporter: **dpwillis67@gmail.com**
Deadline: **11:59 p.m.**
End of Month donation: **PENDING**
---
| | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39222124/318878432/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1811-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDUzNTk2Yi1iMDUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-qeLz95BmTXbfnF0EeHWLgsuo7aJvmValek8RX3siuc=)
---
[**Friend, can I count on you to chip in $5, $25 or more to make up this fundraising shortfall, flip Florida blue and defeat Marco Rubio? Every dollar goes directly to defending our Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39222125/318878433/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1811-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDUzNTk2Yi1iMDUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-qeLz95BmTXbfnF0EeHWLgsuo7aJvmValek8RX3siuc=)
I'm not exaggerating when I say 2022 is a tipping point that could determine our country's future. Voting rights. Pandemic recovery. These and other vital issues hinge on expanding our Senate majority – and Roll Call is reporting that Florida is one of the states that will determine Senate control next year.

With Marco Rubio having a record fundraising quarter while we're falling short of our grassroots goals, I'm worried we'll have to make some difficult decisions like pulling back ads or our voter registration efforts. I know engaged supporters like you don't want to see that happen.
**But we're looking at a pretty hefty deficit of $9,561.[Will you please rush a few dollars right now to help us close this shortfall and defend our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39222126/318878434/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1811-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDUzNTk2Yi1iMDUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-qeLz95BmTXbfnF0EeHWLgsuo7aJvmValek8RX3siuc=)**
| | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39222127/318878435/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1811-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDUzNTk2Yi1iMDUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-qeLz95BmTXbfnF0EeHWLgsuo7aJvmValek8RX3siuc=)
---
Thank you for joining in this fight.

Congresswoman Val Demings
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

Email is an important way for us to keep this team informed about campaign updates. body:
**KYLE RITTENHOUSE WAS JUST THE START** _The radical Left and corrupt mainstream media will stop at
NOTHING to dismantle our 2nd Amendment freedoms!
_ [**DEFEND 2A FREEDOM: DONATE NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58911343:602ZQjENp:m:1:3298722022:5356707CF3EFDB5F0B1748289DD300EB:r) | |
---
Peter,

Kyle Rittenhouse should never have been on trial.

What we saw was a textbook case of self-defense, and all the evidence made that clear from the start.

**But the radical Left and the corrupt mainstream media couldn't care any less about evidence, and they were the only ones guilty of anything in the circus trial we just witnessed.**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58911343:602ZQjENp:m:1:3298722022:5356707CF3EFDB5F0B1748289DD300EB:r)

_CNN and MSNBC did everything they could to frame Kyle as a white supremacist. _

_Joe Biden used him in a campaign ad last year riddled with false, disgusting allegations against Kyle's character._

_Facebook and other Big Tech companies banned any fundraisers to help deliver justice for Kyle._

These are the people running our country, Peter.

**Their corruption NEEDS to be stopped, and conservative Senate candidate Blake Masters is the man we need to safeguard our 2nd Amendment freedoms.**
[**WATCH BLAKE'S INTERVIEW WITH TUCKER CARLSON**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58911343:602ZQjENp:m:1:3298722022:5356707CF3EFDB5F0B1748289DD300EB:r)
As long as Democrats hold all the power in Washington, we will keep seeing these attacks against our Constitution go unpunished.

_We can't let that happen. Conservatives need to stand up and fight back to flip ONE seat and take back the Senate in 2022!_

**Blake Masters has the support of Tucker Carlson and President Trump because he's fighting to:**
* Break up Big Tech censors
* Defend our 2nd Amendment freedoms
* Finish the wall to end the Biden border crisis

This is the agenda that will lead to a more STRONG, FREE, AND SECURE America, and Blake needs your support to get the job done.

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Can Abortion ACTUALLY End In America? | Jackson Lahmeyer's Perspective
body:
Abortion is MURDER. Period. Today, the US Supreme court will hear a case (Dobbs v Jackson) that could potentially gut Roe v Wade that has empowered t
| | [](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=1572747.974.1.4fbead9dd513d74115651c91dbb16a70) |
---
## Abortion is MURDER. Period.
---
Today, the US Supreme court will hear a case (Dobbs v Jackson) that could potentially gut Roe v Wade that has empowered the murder of millions of babies each year in America. Many people wonder: **"Is it even possible to overturn Roe v Wade?"** The answer is YES. However, I do not believe it will be overturned in DC. The case Dobbs v Jackson is about a law that was passed in Mississippi banning abortions after 15 weeks. What this case really boils down to is state rights. Does the state of Mississippi have the right to ban abortions after 15 weeks within their borders? The answer is YES (10th Amendment). I am calling on the Oklahoma Legislature and Governor (both of which are Pro-Life) to end abortion in the state of Oklahoma exercising the 10th Amendment. Some will argue that can't be done but it can be done, and we have done it before. Prime Example = Medical Marijuana. According to federal law, Marijuana is ILLEGAL. Yet, somehow in the state of Oklahoma we grow and sell a whole lot of it. How are we doing that? The answer is simple: **STATES HAVE RIGHTS.** I want to encourage you to reach out to your state representatives whether in Oklahoma or whichever state you live in and call for an END to the greatest evil in our nation... abortion. My commitment is to always fight to END abortion. **I will always be a voice for the voiceless.** Thank you for your support,
Jackson Lahmeyer
---
| | [ Click Here To Join The Fight To END Abortion ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=1572747.975.1.fb9868c57a5ca64178de15c6581d14e3)

Peter,

I want to start by thanking you for all of your support.

Now, we’re approaching our final end-of-quarter deadline of 2021. We’ve proved that we can beat Ron Johnson, so we need to keep up the momentum into 2022 and report a strong number after midnight December 31.

That’s why it’s going to be more important than ever for you to be engaged in this campaign and help out where you can. I’m not taking a dime of corporate PAC money, and that means I’m relying on people like you to keep our campaign powered.

In my campaign, I am fighting for the people of Wisconsin. This isn’t politics as usual, my campaign is about bringing fresh ideas to Congress so that we can help Wisconsinites.

Thank you for your support, and let’s keep up the fight,

Alex Lasry
---

name: Sen. Patty Murray
subject: Protect abortion rights
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
Today, abortion rights are at risk in a case being heard at the Supreme Court.
#
Peter,
Today, the Supreme Court will hear arguments in the high-profile case surrounding Missisippi’s extreme law that prohibits abortions after 15 weeks -- a clear violation of constitutional rights.
You know you can always count on me to do everything I can to stand up for the right to abortion and reproductive health care. But now more than ever I need you all to join me in speaking out.
Extreme Republicans have been working for decades to get to today with the fate of abortion on the line at the Supreme Court -- that’s why the fight for reproductive rights is _**directly connected**_ to keeping the Senate blue.
**[With reproductive rights at the Supreme Court today, I need 250 supporters to make a $5 donation to help us fight back and defend the right to abortion.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39227991/318904618/-573931550?refcode=pm_em_211201_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjc0M2VmNC1iYjUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yeewTLirr7tYQXvT3KLiFRskkJlLmtvy8nS58XsSG9o=)**
We already knew that abortion rights were at risk from GOP legislators and conservative judges.
After the addition of two anti-choice Supreme Court Justices, we can’t take anything for granted.
This is about making sure everyone -- no matter where they live, how much money they have, or who they are -- is able to make their own decisions about pregnancy and parenting.
**We have the power to fight back: a majority of Americans support Roe v. Wade and the right to abortion and with your help, we can expand our Democratic majority in the Senate and serve as a firewall to protect reproductive rights against the GOP’s attacks.**
**[Pitch in $5 or any amount now to join this fight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39227993/318904621/-573931550?refcode=pm_em_211201_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjc0M2VmNC1iYjUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yeewTLirr7tYQXvT3KLiFRskkJlLmtvy8nS58XsSG9o=)**
Thank you,

clean_body: Today, abortion rights are at risk in a case being heard at the Supreme Court. Peter, Today, the Supreme Court will hear arguments in the high-profile case surrounding Missisippi’s extreme law that prohibits abortions after 15 weeks -- a clear violation of constitutional rights. You know you can always count on me to do everything I can to stand up for the right to abortion and reproductive health care. But now more than ever I need you all to join me in speaking out. Extreme Republicans have been working for decades to get to today with the fate of abortion on the line at the Supreme Court -- that’s why the fight for reproductive rights is directly connected to keeping the Senate blue. = We already knew that abortion rights were at risk from GOP legislators and conservative judges. After the addition of two anti-choice Supreme Court Justices, we can’t take anything for granted. This is about making sure everyone -- no matter where they live, how much money they have, or who they are -- is able to make their own decisions about pregnancy and parenting. We have the power to fight back: a majority of Americans support Roe v. Wade and the right to abortion and with your help, we can expand our Democratic majority in the Senate and serve as a firewall to protect reproductive rights against the GOP’s attacks. = Thank you, Patty **= As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values._ PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY

[_**We have a real chance to turn the page on the status quo, but we have no time to waste: can you chip into our campaign right away?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39228014/318904836/676662639?refcode=em_20211201_f_s_baker&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTMyOGUyMy1iYzUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GTjxjThuO9o1aPjWiF9XPaUnDOahQ_Y1mDXOhYDBHdw=) It’s clear: The people of Massachusetts are ready for a new chapter with new leadership. For far too long, people in power have asked working families to wait for change — despite a growing affordable housing crisis, inaccessible and expensive child and health care, the existential threat of climate change, and long-standing racial injustice. Our next Governor must be someone willing to take on challenges even when they’re hard — who recognizes the urgency of this moment, who tackles these issues with the courage to solve them, and who has a record of winning bold, systemic change on Beacon Hill. I’m proud to be building a grassroots movement with all of you, across age, class, and faith to put power back in the hands of the people and to elect a governor who's not afraid to fight for our values. body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58913934:6vF9kjEkN:m:1:3298722022:5ABB603B63E97266C8516C16C36F44FF:r)
Peter,

The Leftwing media are merchants of lies, half-truths, and deception... Their true objective is NOT to report the news but push their radical agenda.

My name is Brent Bozell, I am the President and Founder of the Media Research Center (MRC). MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical Left-wing agenda in the media.

Thanks to MRC, roughly 90% of Americans DO NOT trust the Fake News media anymore.

You and I are winning the war against Fake News media outlets such as MSNBC, NBC, CNN, and more. You can support MRC's mission to expose the Leftwing media by donating $10, $20.22, $50, $100 or any by clicking here.

Radical leftists in the media are attempting to take over our elections, pass budgets that will bankrupt our nation, chip away at the Second Amendment, and destroy our culture.

Here are the TOP 5 biggest media lies of 2021:

1. **Staging a fake racist stunt against a GOP gubernatorial candidate:** Members of the "Lincoln Project" staged a photo op in front of Glenn Youngkin's campaign bus, holding tiki torches and pretending to be racist supporters of the GOP candidate. The story was PROVEN fake and CNN continued to support the stunt in any way.

Disgusting. [**Help the Media Research Center fight Fake News like CNN by donating $10, $50, $100, $250 or more here >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58913934:6vF9kjEkN:m:1:3298722022:5ABB603B63E97266C8516C16C36F44FF:r)

2. **Attempting to put Kyle Rittenhouse behind bars:** It's no secret the Leftwing media was trying to influence the jury to convict Kyle Rittenhouse and destroy this young man's life. The judge even barred MSNBC from the courtroom when they followed the jury's bus back to their hotel...

[**Help the Media Research Center expose MSNBC and Fake News Journalists by donating $10, $50, $100, $250 or or more here >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58913934:6vF9kjEkN:m:1:3298722022:5ABB603B63E97266C8516C16C36F44FF:r)

3. **Covering up a rape in order to protect Woke educators:** A father attended a school board meeting in Loudoun county Virginia, demanding answers and accountability for his daughter being raped by a "non-binary" boy wearing a skirt. Instead of answers, this man was arrested and now the FBI is monitoring parents who are involved in their child's education.

The media decided to side with the Loudoun county school officials and helped cover up the rape story.

This is a disgusting new low for the Fake News media. [**Help the Media Research Center spread the TRUTH about stories like this by donating $10, $50, $100, $250, or more here >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58913934:6vF9kjEkN:m:1:3298722022:5ABB603B63E97266C8516C16C36F44FF:r)

name: Roger Misso
subject: ARMY or NAVY? It's a service-rivalry RAISE OFF to support veterans in Congress. (Air Force + Coast Guard are invited, too!)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/EXgFj8Nt-FjJp-ffkpnrtVEl8Eo4jpQi5usP-p6lc4k=/HRdXA1p7Ba2mq6Xausoqq6PiwxnAN3TA2XG-WeN9d28=)

Peter,

The Army/Navy Game is coming, and [_it 's a big deal_](https://act.myngp.com/el/EXgFj8Nt-FjJp-ffkpnrtVEl8Eo4jpQi5usP-p6lc4k=/HRdXA1p7Ba2mq6Xausoqq6PiwxnAN3TA2XG-WeN9d28=) at Taking the Hill. In addition to supporting and electing veterans and military family members of integrity to Congress in tough races, we are led by The Honorable Patrick J. Murphy (founder, Army vet) and Executive Director Roger Misso (Navy vet).

Since we are a house divided this week, we decided it's a perfect time for our [_**SECOND ANNUAL INTRA-SERVICE RAISE-OFF**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/EXgFj8Nt-FjJp-ffkpnrtVEl8Eo4jpQi5usP-p6lc4k=/HRdXA1p7Ba2mq6Xausoqq6PiwxnAN3TA2XG-WeN9d28=)! Show us how much your favorite branch of service means to you by _[chipping in](https://act.myngp.com/el/EXgFj8Nt-FjJp-ffkpnrtVEl8Eo4jpQi5usP-p6lc4k=/HRdXA1p7Ba2mq6Xausoqq6PiwxnAN3TA2XG-WeN9d28=)_. All the funds we raise from this will go towards supporting our veteran and military family members for Congress - and [_**we need to raise $21,000 by the end of the year to support them ALL!**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/EXgFj8Nt-FjJp-ffkpnrtVEl8Eo4jpQi5usP-p6lc4k=/HRdXA1p7Ba2mq6Xausoqq6PiwxnAN3TA2XG-WeN9d28=)

Next Wednesday, December 8th, we will announce the results of the raise-off at an [_**ARMY/NAVY RIVALRY RALLY on Capitol Hill**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/EXgFj8Nt-FjJp-ffkpnrtVEl8Eo4jpQi5usP-p6lc4k=/HRdXA1p7Ba2mq6Xausoqq6PiwxnAN3TA2XG-WeN9d28=) where we'll be joined by Senators Gary Peters and Patty Murray, Reps. Tim Ryan and Mike Thompson, Missouri Senate candidate Tim Kunce, and dozens of veterans serving in Congress. If you're in DC next Wednesday, you won't want to miss this, so [_**RSVP by clicking here**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/EXgFj8Nt-FjJp-ffkpnrtVEl8Eo4jpQi5usP-p6lc4k=/HRdXA1p7Ba2mq6Xausoqq6PiwxnAN3TA2XG-WeN9d28=). And, [_**if you give at the Champion level or higher for our event and raise-off, you 'll receive a special gift from our special guests sent right to your front door!**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/EXgFj8Nt-FjJp-ffkpnrtVEl8Eo4jpQi5usP-p6lc4k=/HRdXA1p7Ba2mq6Xausoqq6PiwxnAN3TA2XG-WeN9d28=)

[_**RSVP FOR YOUR DEC 8TH TICKET**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/EXgFj8Nt-FjJp-ffkpnrtVEl8Eo4jpQi5usP-p6lc4k=/HRdXA1p7Ba2mq6Xausoqq6PiwxnAN3TA2XG-WeN9d28=)

Click to chip in and support:

[_**ARMY**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/EXgFj8Nt-FjJp-ffkpnrtVEl8Eo4jpQi5usP-p6lc4k=/6UDXYmlODkbD5mZIS0qto3X9fM_2RgkwIbENx2iJNvw=)

[_**NAVY + MARINE CORPS**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/EXgFj8Nt-FjJp-ffkpnrtVEl8Eo4jpQi5usP-p6lc4k=/PWFYxKs6mbm2fFJnnBhuz-qNpyeBpn1AomeOSF22yLo=)

[_**AIR FORCE**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/EXgFj8Nt-FjJp-ffkpnrtVEl8Eo4jpQi5usP-p6lc4k=/lcPWCX73ZInjG1nIe8YTBC_VqmY8jPMokt3UAtki5HI=)

[_**COAST GUARD**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/EXgFj8Nt-FjJp-ffkpnrtVEl8Eo4jpQi5usP-p6lc4k=/ZDsWXUtKxDhK8jn8mcn-yVihgiFx3JS93OP0gBn6UkQ=)

As a wise man once said: "If you're not first, you're last!" [_**Let the intra-service raise-off begin**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/EXgFj8Nt-FjJp-ffkpnrtVEl8Eo4jpQi5usP-p6lc4k=/HRdXA1p7Ba2mq6Xausoqq6PiwxnAN3TA2XG-WeN9d28=), and [_we hope to see many of you in-person on December 8th!_](https://act.myngp.com/el/EXgFj8Nt-FjJp-ffkpnrtVEl8Eo4jpQi5usP-p6lc4k=/HRdXA1p7Ba2mq6Xausoqq6PiwxnAN3TA2XG-WeN9d28=)

Go Navy,
Roger
;-)

_Roger Misso_
_Executive Director, Taking the Hill_
[__@RogerMissoCNY__](https://act.myngp.com/el/EXgFj8Nt-FjJp-ffkpnrtVEl8Eo4jpQi5usP-p6lc4k=/xyJHFPn_Z5K7XmYg_EJzBrVVFWCcAL8XqqVDoilFnS0=)
