---
| My friend and colleague Congressman Gosar is one of my strongest allies in Congress and he is at the top of the list now to be targeted by the democrats. The country saw the ridiculous lengths the far left will go to destroy a patriotic family man. The liberals not just censured Rep. Gosar for a cartoon--they are censoring his message to America. Everyone who actually saw the cartoon knows that it was described as "silly" or "funny" but no one seriously saw any "threat" in the cartoon. That won't stop the leftist loons from shrieking, however. I stood on the floor of the House in solidarity with Paul. He is my friend and a proven America First fighter. He has a 100% NRA, GOA second amendment record. He has a 100% National Right to Life rating. He has never voted for a tax increase and fights to reduce spending every chance he gets. He is one of us. President Trump called him the day after the leftists attacked him and said: "Congressman Paul Gosar has been a loyal supporter of our America First agenda, and even more importantly the USA. Paul is Congressman who is highly respected in Arizona, strong on crime, borders, our military, and our veterans. He continually fights for lower taxes, less regulation, and our great, but under siege Second Amendment. Paul Gosar has my complete and total endorsement." -President Donald J. name: Bill de Blasio
subject: First in the nation: Overdose Prevention Centers in New York City
disclaimer_text: Paid for by New Yorkers for a Fair Future
body:
We just announced the first two Overdose Prevention Centers in New York City — the first in the nation — that will offer safe, clean places where people who use drugs can access clinical care
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39230357/318917745/1246564788?refcode=em-logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS83NTExNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDllODM5ZC1jMzUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3-E9y8UZ8KRu2Vo-ygEgkhVGf9qF9CwRImHOkH3gffE=)
Team -
During 2020, more than 2,000 individuals died of a drug overdose in New York City, 85 percent involving opioids.
Each one of those people had a life and a story. Each one precious and important. Each one with family or friends left behind wondering if there was anything they could have done.
This is a crisis that has gotten worse and worse, year after year. And if we’re going to start winning the battle against opioids, we need to start talking honestly about what works to protect the most vulnerable people in our city.
And I will NOT hesitate to do just that.
That is why we announced, just yesterday, the first two Overdose Prevention Centers in New York City — the first in the nation — that will offer safe, clean places where people who use drugs can access clinical care and other services, including the administration of naloxone to prevent overdose. Counselors will also be on-hand that can give people help who want to pursue addiction treatment.
After exhaustive study, we believe this innovative approach is going to make our communities safer AND save lives.
I’d love to know if you agree:
[**Please add your name if you agree with my decision to create Overdose Prevention Centers in New York City to offer safe, clean places where people who use drugs can access clinical care and services they need to help them with addiction.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39230363/318917762/-116946880?source=em-211201-ng&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS83NTExNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDllODM5ZC1jMzUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3-E9y8UZ8KRu2Vo-ygEgkhVGf9qF9CwRImHOkH3gffE=&emci=090e25ee-c252-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&emdi=049e839d-c352-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&ceid=15397330)
****[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39230367/318917790/-116946880?source=em-211201-ng&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS83NTExNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDllODM5ZC1jMzUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3-E9y8UZ8KRu2Vo-ygEgkhVGf9qF9CwRImHOkH3gffE=&emci=090e25ee-c252-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&emdi=049e839d-c352-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&ceid=15397330)****
Addiction is not a crime, it is a disease. The criminal activity was done by the drug companies who peddled a product to patients that they knew was addictive all to pad their pockets.
In solidarity,
Bill de Blasio

** **

Paid for by New Yorkers for a Fair Future

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, you can [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/090e25ee-c252-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93/049e839d-c352-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS83NTExNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDllODM5ZC1jMzUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3-E9y8UZ8KRu2Vo-ygEgkhVGf9qF9CwRImHOkH3gffE=&id=116643580), but we'd be very sorry to see you go.

name: Gary Black
subject: We depend on you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARY BLACK FOR SENATE, INC
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/5f089eeb8432b6e1/7b72bf98a532b952c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
# **Friend — I know we’ve already emailed a lot this week to ask for your support. Today I just wanted to say thank you.**

---
With your help, our online fundraising surged across the finish line from November into December. This is HUGE. How much we raise determines how many voters this campaign can reach — with ads we can run and miles we can travel across Georgia. We ask for your help, because we are up against a Democratic machine pouring resources into this race - so our need is real because this victory is crucial. This race will decide who controls the U.S. Senate. Raphael Warnock and the Swamp are going to do everything they can to keep their power. But with your help, we’re going to defeat them. **We will be asking for your continued input and support in the weeks ahead, but today we’re simply saying thank you. It’s an honor to have you on our team. **
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/5f089eeb8432b6e1/3ff3e8ed67bc2ec2c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Gary Black P.S. — If you missed the November fundraising drive, hope you’ll pitch in for a strong start to December. **[Donate here.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/5f089eeb8432b6e1/2f3a7017b2e68323c3d6b838967d376c/37793) **
---
| | _**Keep Reading For A Quick Message From Gary:**_ I couldn’t be prouder to have you on our team, and your support is absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why.
Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $17 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts.
With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate below.
---
[**DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/5f089eeb8432b6e1/a639a6e493561edec3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
We know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. The truth is, these emails are the key to keeping our supporters updated on ways they can make a difference. However, if you'd like to receive fewer emails or unsubscribe, [click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go.cfm?a=1&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=5f089eeb8432b6e1&d=1ec4e55ee89edba8c3d6b838967d376c&u=http://ci.criticalimpact.com/procenter/procenter.cfm?action=profile&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=5f089eeb8432b6e1).
---
This message was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com** by:Gary Black for SenateP.O. Box 6501
Athens, GA 30604
---

---

subject: Governor Charlie Baker will not run for a third term
disclaimer_text: Paid for By the Downing Committee
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39230888/318920637/635930916?refcode=AU_BBD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211201_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGI3ODExMi1jNjUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=17P3uZvse-bMXp7TjbrVt0vDW1ndftA_4jNOCBDoxCA=)
Big news, team: _Governor Charlie Baker announced today that he does not intend to run for a third term._ When I announced my candidacy in February, it wasn’t to run against Charlie Baker or any other specific candidate — it was because I was tired of watching Beacon Hill refuse to act with the urgency required to tackle the biggest challenges of our time. **Governor Baker’s decision to not run for re-election marks an opportunity to both upend the culture of complacency on Beacon Hill and elect leadership committed to delivering much-needed change to all 351 communities in Massachusetts.** We have to seize this opportunity to ensure Beacon Hill reflects the people of the Commonwealth, listens to the needs of every community, and makes meaningful change to ensure that all of us get a fair shake. **Regardless of what the gubernatorial field looks like, I am still running to pick up the policy-making table and bring it to the people historically excluded in Massachusetts. Together, we can build the Massachusetts we all know is possible.** Folks, if you’ve been waiting to join our campaign working to deliver on climate action, build a comprehensive racial justice plan, create an equitable transportation infrastructure, eliminate poverty, and provide life-changing support to families, now is the time to get on board to ensure we have the team to get it done. **This race just became wide open. If you’re ready to join our fight, will you add a contribution of $3 or more to help us build a future where we meet our biggest challenges with fierce urgency aimed at every corner of Massachusetts?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $3 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39230889/318920640/-871079238?express_lane=true&amount=3&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&refcode=AU_BBD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211201_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGI3ODExMi1jNjUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=17P3uZvse-bMXp7TjbrVt0vDW1ndftA_4jNOCBDoxCA=)

name: Tim Baxter
subject: AR-15 Giveaway in honor of Kyle Rittenhouse
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BAXTER FOR CONGRESS** ](https://email
body:
Rittenhouse’s innocence and his acquittal reaffirms the right of law-abiding gun owners to defend themselves.
| [ ](https://email.baxterforcongress.com/e3t/Btc/OR+113/d2p7Ng04/VVCz1B2fLPBHW5MPyxf74YkjwW4-ljtc4ByPl_MVmxW53lLBGV1-WJV7CgFZSW97szLN7fXk_5W7JNm_x99K1WbW5Q2GZt8mLLHKVbmC4x8DgphqW5WsvcG7CP4X4W4GKhJj1w6jCXW7pCRRF1ljFyrN3tqXggMm9-rW3WVyg45c-qr1N1G0qx-LjfW_VR6SDT2CBtN6W1l1g_b8LKRMVW6x45vT1bQMnkN1NrrRRyMPZjW8N1M636RLD5qVTsGzc688WlrVx90DW80j6fXW6_02sk26N4FlW4bPqDp5f-BrdW7mqVNn8rvJSYW5sWfNz7hqbvHW49BQWT5BggVhN4pB4_CqMjL6VRGcWX1KxnF537Vw1)
---
Peter,

Rittenhouse’s innocence and his acquittal reaffirm the right of law-abiding gun owners to defend themselves. Violent attackers, like those from Antifa that attacked Kyle, must be arrested and brought to justice.

The entire case against Rittenhouse was a far-left sham.

Media pundits and leftwing activists claimed Kyle was a “white supremacist”, but he only shot white people that were attacking him. **The right of Americans to defend themselves is a sacred one, given to us by our Creator, and enshrined in our Constitution!** **[Antifa does not want law-abiding citizens to stand in the way of destruction. That's why I’m giving away another AR-15 in honor of Kyle Rittenhouse! If you donate ANY amount, I will automatically enroll you in the giveaway. Click here to donate>>](https://email.baxterforcongress.com/e3t/Btc/OR+113/d2p7Ng04/VVCz1B2fLPBHW5MPyxf74YkjwW4-ljtc4ByPl_MVmxW53lLBGV1-WJV7CgXSVVczd3X4RQJBsW2ShRVq6kgDRNW8FHxpx24bv1BVC_69M5dtbzLVlyp7V4ksqskW53V1w11RD7jyW4VK1MN3w2MrfW8_-1L52frn1xW95Yv_m8pKsx8W3Pcpgy4cSWytW1pVJ2b6MxrnQW5FknHr9kdyHhW8_QcdB25B7f5W8KnqNH2bfnxRW8Dpkb13zJPXJW4KLyVc12lmL1W2sb16n3Tm4JWN7svt615zGG3W1RkfHd5-rSG-W3M_k4R2LTFX1N8r4-NK1cQGYW2LlJhZ5HJckGW92vTMq3qD4jxW56Sv4z1DRbK_3fdw1)** Antifa fears law-abiding citizens who fight back.

The Rittenhouse trial was their sick & twisted attempt to create legal precedent making self-defense illegal.

name: Aadland For Senate
subject: Erik answers a critic
body:
Uniting Americans does not mean a move to the left
---
| | | | | | Volume 17 | November 17, 2021
---
|
---
| A Word From Erik
---
| | |
---|---
|
On Tuesday, Nov. 9, I spoke at the Arapahoe County Tea Party meeting. There I shared about bringing our country together.

One attendee was critical of my position, saying that the only way to come together is to move to the Left.

"Republicans have been trying to do this for 70 years and we're on the verge of losing the country," he wrote in an email. "Your position merely makes you a new RINO. It's a losing position in this environment." As a war veteran, he said their strategy was not to "reach out" to the enemy.

Our culture is filled with so much anger and vitriol. But what people want is integrity and truth. I believe in addressing criticism as it comes, so I share with you my response:

"Thanks for your message. As always, there's room for either miscommunication or misinterpretation; based on your message below, one or the other occurred. I accept full responsibility for what I said and any lack of clarity in my presentation I own fully--I'm not pawning it off on a consultant or blaming it on bad advice. I told you exactly what I think, though I can always improve my clarity or communication skills.
I spoke at length about defending the Constitution and why we're on the verge of losing our country. Never did I suggest we compromise our principles or bend to the Left.
What I did say was that the 'enemy' is not the average Liberal or Democrat down the street, but corrupt individuals in our government and institutions (Democrat and Republican). This is an American problem, not a problem of Right vs. Left.
I am proposing a political way to restore this country and our government back to 'We the People' by focusing on the real enemy (the DC swamp, corrupt politicians, MSM, certain corporations, etc.) and uniting on core principles. Civil war and violence are not the answer, nor will it serve us or our children in the long run. In fact, many foreign and domestic enemies would take swift advantage of such a situation. We both know the horrors of war--for me that is the last resort.
We certainly don't need more hatred, division, or polarization along superficial lines--what we need is Americans to band together to take their power back. This will require leadership and an unprecedented level of activation.
I've never suggested we reach across the aisle to work with corrupt politicians or self-avowed Socialists or Communists in our government. I'm talking about bridging the gap dividing the American people.
We must come together as Americans now or we lose this country. Those who think cleaning out the corruption and restoring this government back to 'We the People' can be done only by conservatives or Republicans (28% of voters in CO) are wrong--or perhaps they just want a hill to die on. The unaffiliated are 43% of Colorado voters and we need to enroll them in this cause to win statewide office.
Yes, I'm talking about unifying because it must be done to save this country. I'm in this to save my country, not to become a U.S. Senator, or to accumulate power, prestige, or wealth; I'm doing this for my children's future.
I'm not a politician; nobody is telling me what to say. I speak from the heart, and I've thought endlessly about how to save our country peacefully. I tell people the hard truth of how to take back this country politically, and what must be done to win in Colorado. Better we act from a position of power than defeat and weakness.
Furthermore, I'm a follower of Jesus Christ who taught us to love even our enemies. Honestly, I don't have time for those who want to continue hating and fighting with their neighbors--it's a losing proposition based on fear, powerlessness, and lack of faith.
All things can be done through Faith by following the principles of Christ. That's what I aim to do while honoring my oath to support and defend the Constitution against enemies foreign and domestic."
In Service,
|

| Campaign Update
---
| |
---|---
|
On Friday, Nov. 19, I met with some great people concerned about liberty in Westminster. Then on Saturday, Nov. 20 I traveled once again to Colorado Springs.

The thing for which I am most grateful is my family, so the Thanksgiving holiday was spent with them enjoying the many blessings bestowed upon us by our Creator.

Next week I will be in full swing traveling to communities throughout the Front Range and will appear on the Mandy Connell Show.

I sincerely hope to see you soon on the trail!

name: Dr. Oz
subject: America needs a doctor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Doctor Oz For Senate
body:
to cure our country's ills

| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58914321:JjoBLjENJ:m:1:3298722022:5D08BE8A3B06391FE35BC1C2B449AF52:r)
---
Peter,

_**I 'm running for the U.S. Senate because America is sick, and we need a doctor to cure our country.**_

I'm Dr. Oz -- I'm a world-class surgeon, fighter, and health care advocate. I've spent the last 30 years in medicine taking on powerful special interests and telling people like it is - **that you have the power to change your life for the better.** Now, I'm running for the U.S. Senate to take on the out-of-touch Washington establishment and to fight for policies that empower the American people to change our country for the better.

**WATCH MY ANNOUNCEMENT VIDEO HERE!**
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58914321:JjoBLjENJ:m:1:3298722022:5D08BE8A3B06391FE35BC1C2B449AF52:r)
I know the truth, the data, and the science about combatting COVID and understand how it affects you and your family. While Washington elites tell you to stay inside and mask up, I've been putting my expertise to work on our behalf. I won't stand by on the sidelines while out-of-touch politicians force our businesses to shut down and keep our children out of schools.

**The federal government exists to protect you - not control you.** Whether it's modernizing health care so it's more affordable and accessible, fighting for more school choice for all Americans, protecting us by securing our borders and stopping illegal immigration, telling the truth about corporate America like how pharmaceutical companies charge too much for prescription drugs, or making sure people know the truth about COVID, I'm promising to help re-light the "divine spark" inside every American and empower us to live better lives.

**Join my campaign today!**

name: Wendy Rittenhouse
subject: NOT GUILTY.
body:
Kyle was just ACQUITTED and is now officially FREE! This was a victory for the truth, for justice, and for every American's God
_Sponsored message_
| | | | [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zg8hua6t0iafkvner2105ou8ncu3o1jj13kckk78_rp22sh2s8i66pj0spjm1ob2cdh2bs)
---
|
---
Friend,

**Kyle was just ACQUITTED and is now officially FREE!**

This was a victory for the truth, for justice, and for every American's God-given and unalienable right of self-defense.

We are so overcome with emotion, and as hard as that was, we are thankful.

We are thankful for the millions of Americans who stood with Kyle from the start.

We are thankful for the many others who watched the trial with an open mind, realized that they had been lied to for a year and a half, and spoke out.

And we are thankful to the jury which put aside bias, considered the facts, and came to the right decision.

Now, we will try to return to something that resembles a normal life – **however that requires one more major push to settle our case-related debts and pay off what we hope will be our final legal bills.**

**[So please, take all that positive energy I know you're feeling and make an urgent donation to help us close this very ugly chapter in our lives.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zd7j4o1u64d64tecr2aiq93tkr9oedk89oqt7on0_rp22sh2s8i66pj0spjm1ob2cdh2bs)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z4b51nidkrcaon4gu0n998og9uhmd3ilul1kmghg_rp22sh2s8i66pj0spjm1ob2cdh2bs)
|
---
Any funds left over will be transferred into Kyle's scholarship fund so that he'll be able to graduate from college debt-free.

You'll be hearing from us again, but for now, and from the bottom of our hearts – thank you. Thank you. Thank you.

With love,

Wendy Rittenhouse
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zb49adem2bb1kbuqnvfc6e4kvjbip8s2c1s0vpag_rp22sh2s8i66pj0spjm1ob2cdh2bs)

name: Geoff Diehl
subject: Response to Baker/Polito Announcement Today
body:
You don't want to miss this.
| | | |
---
---
---
| I thank Governor Baker and Lt. Gov. Polito for their eight years of service as Governor and Lt. Gov. of Massachusetts. While I have often differed on policy with this administration, I have always liked Charlie Baker and Karyn Polito personally and I wish them the best in their future endeavors.
I am honored and gratified to have been endorsed by former President Donald Trump to be the next Governor of Massachusetts, and I look forward to a spirited campaign presenting my vision for the future of Massachusetts. My campaign is providing Bay Staters with a hopeful choice for fresh leadership and a bold new direction for our state.
I have a message to Massachusetts residents who are tired of the status quo: I will work hard every day to make our state a better place to live, work, and raise a family. I believe that starts by placing more emphasis on individual freedom and initiative. I will fight for people who need help. I'll support struggling working families. I will oppose new taxes. I will support parents who don't want government taking away their freedom to make choices about their child's health care and curriculum. And, I'll always have the back of first responders working to keep our streets safe, as well as the men and women of the armed forces who hail from Massachusetts and serve overseas protecting our freedoms.
We can do better for Massachusetts. Over the next year, the Diehl campaign will discuss the important issues facing our state and present the best alternative for leading Massachusetts into the future.

---
|
---
|
---
| |
---
|
---

subject: 🚨End-of-Month Deadline🚨
body:
Visit our website [https://eliforsenate.com/] Today is the last day of the month! Help me reach my End-of-Month goal! [https://secure.winred.com/eli-for-colorado/donate?utm_source=All+Lists&utm_medium=FR+Email&utm_campaign=%F0%9F%9A%A8End-of-Month+Deadline%F0%9F%9A%A8]

We are approaching a pivotal deadline. With November coming to a close, we are officially less than a year away from the general election. Before that, I have my sights set on beating out the crowded field in the primary.

Let’s restore common sense and flip Colorado RED. [https://secure.winred.com/eli-for-colorado/donate?utm_source=All+Lists&utm_medium=FR+Email&utm_campaign=%F0%9F%9A%A8End-of-Month+Deadline%F0%9F%9A%A8]

My message of being a common sense leader and reformer is something that has been resonating up and down the Front Range, on the Western slopes, and the Eastern plains. I know I can unify this state and bring action and real results back to Michael Bennet’s Senate seat.

But first, I need your support. You can help show how strong of a movement we have created ...

... by donating $10, $50, or $100 today. You can help me meet my end-of-month deadline. [https://secure.winred.com/eli-for-colorado/donate?utm_source=All+Lists&utm_medium=FR+Email&utm_campaign=%F0%9F%9A%A8End-of-Month+Deadline%F0%9F%9A%A8]

Thank you for your support,

Eli Bremer

Fellow Conservative,

With the way Democrats are running things in Washington, I keep thinking the same thing many times a day…

...I miss President Trump.

So I asked our House Conservative staff what they thought. And they ALL miss his leadership too.

Fellow Conservative, with increasing inflation, a supply chain crisis, and no relief in sight, I’m wondering:

Do you miss President Trump too?

Jim Banks, Chairman

For more than two decades, HCF has been pursuing its mission of electing and retaining members who are committed to our core conservative principles. body:
to cure our country's ills

| [](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/59242656:Wm-ehlHxN:m:1:1155937413:E62445CA7FE4E8F24C4E7F175900C0BC:r)
---
Friends,

_**I'm running for the U.S. Senate because America is sick, and we need a doctor to cure our country.**_

I'm Dr. Oz -- I'm a world-class surgeon, fighter, and health care advocate. I've spent the last 30 years in medicine taking on powerful special interests and telling people like it is - **that you have the power to change your life for the better.** Now, I'm running for the U.S. Senate to take on the out-of-touch Washington establishment and to fight for policies that empower the American people to change our country for the better.

**WATCH MY ANNOUNCEMENT VIDEO HERE!**
[](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/59242656:Wm-ehlHxN:m:1:1155937413:E62445CA7FE4E8F24C4E7F175900C0BC:r)
I know the truth, the data, and the science about combatting COVID and understand how it affects you and your family. While Washington elites tell you to stay inside and mask up, I've been putting my expertise to work on our behalf. I won't stand by on the sidelines while out-of-touch politicians force our businesses to shut down and keep our children out of schools.

**The federal government exists to protect you - not control you.** Whether it's modernizing health care so it's more affordable and accessible, fighting for more school choice for all Americans, protecting us by securing our borders and stopping illegal immigration, telling the truth about corporate America like how pharmaceutical companies charge too much for prescription drugs, or making sure people know the truth about COVID, I'm promising to help re-light the "divine spark" inside every American and empower us to live better lives.

**Join my campaign today!**

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zdhpcdaj3bm0vl91um4a16b7hs5d41m3241tpnuo_rp22sh2s8i66pj0spjm1p74cph2bs)
Stop Electing Criminal Sympathizers

Dear Conservatives-

There are prosecutors all over the country pushing criminal justice and police reforms that are a danger to Americans. Criminal Sympathizers backed by progressive groups want to eliminate cash bail and pretrial detention. District Attorneys are letting career criminals with multiple RED FLAGS out on low bail. These people don’t care about community safety or funding our police departments. The most important thing we can do for our future is to be informed about who we are voting for, even locally.

At [CaucusRoom.com](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6hbsk09t062fgjtld7b3e4p14lsq09etodlocko_rp22sh2s8i66pj0spjm1p74cph2bs), members are free to discuss ideas, hold honest conversations, and form their opinions without being overwhelmed or suppressed by the liberal bias inherent in Twitter, Facebook, and other platforms.

body:
Postmaster General DeJoy will not rest until he's dismantled the U.S. Postal Service
| | |
---
Friend, Postmaster General DeJoy will not rest until he's dismantled the U.S. Postal Service brick by brick.
**We cannot stand idly by as DeJoy cuts post office hours and raises prices on postage for letters and other vital mail services. We must protect the USPS – and we can't afford to wait. **
**[That's why I'm reaching out to you to act right now: Will you sign my petition to protect the U.S. Postal Service?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39234042/318936017/1284838707?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1825-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDdmYmUzZS1kMTUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4sieu7vxe-fi6NgltnnrrhqHLmyYbdvU8qmSRcl7NEM=&emci=b6cc4b0c-8551-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&emdi=7d7fbe3e-d152-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&ceid=20244100)**
Protecting the U.S. Postal Service means protecting small businesses. Protecting the delivery of lifesaving medication. The ability to reach out to loved ones. And what proved to be so crucial last year - the right to cast your vote by mail. Millions of Americans mailed in their ballots in the last election, and DeJoy wants to make sure they won't be able to do that again.
**So I'm looking for 10,000 Democrats to join me in protecting the USPS from the blatant attacks of the insufficient and inexperienced Postmaster General DeJoy.**
**Our petition closes at midnight, so I'm relying on you to add your name now:[Will you sign right now to protect the U.S. Postal Service?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39234043/318936018/1284838707?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1825-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDdmYmUzZS1kMTUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4sieu7vxe-fi6NgltnnrrhqHLmyYbdvU8qmSRcl7NEM=&emci=b6cc4b0c-8551-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&emdi=7d7fbe3e-d152-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&ceid=20244100)**
Thank you,

Val Demings

name: Barrier to Entry PAC
subject: Do Democrats really support workers?
body:
What does it mean to be pro-labor?

| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39234489/318937815/1300596418?refcode=211201_FR_gottheimer
_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY4MWUyZWVjLWQyNTItZWMxMS05ODIwLWEwODVmYzMxYWM5MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=EpKsJ8AgriPugjIdJfILlKzQsgsJo3mjAXDL7dstVW4=)
---
Peter,

News Flash!! Unpaid internships are outdated and financially discriminatory. Democrats who are supposed to be “pro-labor champions” don’t seem to understand that this core value must extend to their own campaigns and beyond.

Interns are people. Interns pay rent. Interns have phone bills. Interns are workers.

It’s time for every member of congress to get with the program here— ESPECIALLY Rep. Josh Gottheimer.

Rep. Josh Gottheimer, **a Democrat worth $9M** , recently announced that his office would be hiring for their year-round internship program. I’m sure you can gather where this is going...
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39234490/318937816/1300596418?refcode=211201_FR_gottheimer_IMG&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY4MWUyZWVjLWQyNTItZWMxMS05ODIwLWEwODVmYzMxYWM5MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=EpKsJ8AgriPugjIdJfILlKzQsgsJo3mjAXDL7dstVW4=) Gottheimer doesn’t even care to pretend he isn’t slime, because no one is holding him accountable and he thinks his seat is safe...

It’s time for him to GO, and it’s time for our Party to hold him and others like him accountable.

Why are these unpaid internships so egregious?

When someone decides to hire unpaid interns, they are making a decision to leave out a huge portion of hardworking potential employees on the sidelines who simply cannot afford to work without pay. It’s a privilege to have an unpaid internship— to work knowing there is no need to worry about paying for rent or food, to know there is a safety net.

Representatives (especially ones sitting 9 million dollars...) should know better than excluding individuals which further creates less opportunity for young people to pave a life of success.

Established Democrats are clearly out of touch with their party, which is made up of working-class citizens. Gottheimer has opposed many proposals that would uplift his party and help blue collar workers; he worked hard to fight against the Build Back Better Act just to favor his own tax cuts.

It’s time to elect officials who understand the importance of paying people livable wages rather than praising free labor, and sometimes that means standing up to our own elected officials. **[Will you join our fight to elect these candidates to office, the ones who believe in PAID internships and livable wages? The working class is the backbone of our country and it’s critical we have elected officials who represent our party’s people. Donate now>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39234491/318937817/-2038882143?refcode=211201_FR_gottheimer

Josh Gottheimer, a Democrat worth $9M , recently announced that his office would be hiring for their year-round internship program. I’m sure you can gather where this is going... = Gottheimer doesn’t even care to pretend he isn’t slime, because no one is holding him accountable and he thinks his seat is safe... It’s time for him to GO, and it’s time for our Party to hold him and others like him accountable. Why are these unpaid internships so egregious? When someone decides to hire unpaid interns, they are making a decision to leave out a huge portion of hardworking potential employees on the sidelines who simply cannot afford to work without pay. It’s a privilege to have an unpaid internship— to work knowing there is no need to worry about paying for rent or food, to know there is a safety net. Representatives (especially ones sitting 9 million dollars...) should know better than excluding individuals which further creates less opportunity for young people to pave a life of success. Established Democrats are clearly out of touch with their party, which is made up of working-class citizens. Gottheimer has opposed many proposals that would uplift his party and help blue collar workers; he worked hard to fight against the Build Back Better Act just to favor his own tax cuts. It’s time to elect officials who understand the importance of paying people livable wages rather than praising free labor, and sometimes that means standing up to our own elected officials. name: GOP Presidential
subject: What do you think of K-12 education these days?
body:
My name is Bill Gray, and I’m reaching out to you today as both a graduate of Hillsdale College and someone who works to expan
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6guti4qnmlkv5ppaqr7otl19uot8e558jqe9p9g_rp22sh2s8i66pj0spge8or2cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onnc9imcdb6mdg76odlmji62clh6iorbdb0csqj3dhhchr69pbn6gqrfcj0m3hbfduie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg75c36e1rjac77m9p6cclgm9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi4no)
| | This sponsored message from GOP Presidential is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztruefmcparud3vcbi96i34q49i2jsp8b0mcr678_rp22sh2s8i66pj0spge8or2cjh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend of Liberty, Greetings from Hillsdale, Michigan! My name is Bill Gray, and I’m reaching out to you today as both a graduate of Hillsdale College and someone who works to expand the College’s efforts to pursue truth and defend liberty nationwide. You might not know this, but it’s a task that has only grown harder over the years. Far too many of our country’s K-12 students are INDOCTRINATED rather than EDUCATED. In schools across the country, kids learn American history...but it’s being taught through the lens of dangerous ideologies like critical race theory. The result? More and more young Americans are conditioned to look past our common humanity to categorize people according to characteristics like race. You’ve probably seen the battles over our children’s K-12 education play out in headlines and heated school board meetings across the country. And it’s a promising sign that we’ve watched candidates surge to victory while promising to return greater control to parents. Today, though, I want to make sure you have the chance to let your voice be heard on what’s happening in YOUR community. After all, no one knows the local schools better than those who call it home. The survey is only a few simple questions long. Here’s the first question as a preview: **“Do you think that American civics education, especially the teaching of American history, is at a crisis point?”** We’ve created a secure page for you HERE, where you can share your thoughts. You can also follow the link below to take your survey. If you could take it in the next couple of days, the team and I at Hillsdale would really appreciate it: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/k-12-survey/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvi01s7v1urun10bfenuu9gh3j1q8c92frd9jl0g_rp22sh2s8i66pj0spge8or2cjh2bs)** Your survey answers will help us understand how you see the situation in _your_ backyard and what you think _your_ children should learn. And your answers will inform our efforts to restore excellence to K-12 education (especially in the critical subjects of American history and civics). This work will impact millions of communities nationwide just like yours for the better by passing on America’s great heritage of liberty to current and future generations. I know you’re busy, so we have made sure this survey is short and to the point. Enjoy the rest of your day, and thank you in advance for your opinions! With appreciation, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for GOP Presidential, [please use this preferences page](http://e.goppresidential.com/prefs/9z2zvaejv827gvoo12l4iv651u5h56atdfs4nk6hckg).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zf8lchfpd5mktu142hrg4svkp3cojudq9t4v3dho_rp22sh2s8i66pj0spge8or2cjh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

Peter — I need your help to defend Roe. | | Peter,

Today SCOTUS heard arguments in a Mississippi case that directly challenges Roe v. Wade.

Once again, the future of Roe — and all reproductive rights — lies in the hands of the Supreme Court.

This is the case that anti-choice extremists have been chasing for decades. And now it’s up to the court to defend reproductive rights for people all across the country.

We are already risking everything with a Texas law that puts the most extreme abortion ban in place that we’ve seen in recent memory — even turning citizens into bounty hunters to intimidate caregivers and those seeking care.

These are attacks on our constitutional rights.

clean_body: Peter — I need your help to defend Roe. | | Peter, Today SCOTUS heard arguments in a Mississippi case that directly challenges Roe v. Wade. Once again, the future of Roe — and all reproductive rights — lies in the hands of the Supreme Court. This is the case that anti-choice extremists have been chasing for decades. And now it’s up to the court to defend reproductive rights for people all across the country. We are already risking everything with a Texas law that puts the most extreme abortion ban in place that we’ve seen in recent memory — even turning citizens into bounty hunters to intimidate caregivers and those seeking care. These are attacks on our constitutional rights. I promise you I will never stop fighting for our reproductive rights, but I really need you by my side. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | | = ---|---|--- = | | = = | | = Thank you for your support, Dr. Caraveo | Dr. Yadira Caraveo is a pediatrician, state representative, and daughter of immigrants. She’s running to represent Colorado’s new Congressional district in Congress and to be the first Latina to represent Colorado in Congress. In the state legislature, Dr. Caraveo has a strong record for delivering real results for Colorado families — and she has proven she isn’t afraid to go toe-to-toe with special interests. She’s ready to take on tough fights in Congress. But she can’t do it alone. = | = = Learn more at: Follow along: | | ---|---|--- | PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS PO Box 953, Eastlake, CO 80614 If you would like to receive fewer emails, please .** If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please.**

|

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39235101/318940288/-766995749?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzA0ZDllZi1kNjUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cOgkqyTieMAd8Q6hQQ1qQ-wS-54EfgPBBRsf9-kNgEs=&emci=7860c5b7-bd52-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&emdi=0304d9ef-d652-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&ceid=15639879)

Hi friend,

I know everyone is recovering from all the delicious food at Thanksgiving and family time, but an issue just came up that I have to share with you:

**Just yesterday, far-right judges on the Wisconsin Supreme Court decided that the GOP's rigged maps should essentially stay the same for another decade.**

The last time these maps were updated (by Republicans) was in 2011. They didn't reflect the changing demographics of our state then, and they still don't today. Every ten years, the Republicans have to bend over backwards to cling to the shrinking number of people that support them, **but we can't let them get away with this.**

**[We need to make it clear that this isn't what Wisconsin wants. Donate $5 today to send a message to Wisconsin Republicans -- this cannot and will not stand.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39235102/318940289/-1921549807?refcode=em21_211201_eomty&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzA0ZDllZi1kNjUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cOgkqyTieMAd8Q6hQQ1qQ-wS-54EfgPBBRsf9-kNgEs=)**

Make no mistake, friends. This is an attack on Wisconsin voters -- it's un-American, undemocratic, and an attempt at cementing their minority rule in our state for the next ten years.

What's more, we all know Bryan Steil won't stand up to his party members -- on this issue, or any other.

**[Unless we want another two years of a do-nothing Republican, we need to raise funds, voices and take back the district. Even $5 can help get Steil out of office next November.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39235103/318940290/-1921549807?refcode=em21_211201_eomty&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzA0ZDllZi1kNjUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cOgkqyTieMAd8Q6hQQ1qQ-wS-54EfgPBBRsf9-kNgEs=)** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39235104/318940291/-1921549807?refcode=em21_211201_eomty&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzA0ZDllZi1kNjUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cOgkqyTieMAd8Q6hQQ1qQ-wS-54EfgPBBRsf9-kNgEs=) | [Express Donate $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39235105/318940292/-1921549807?refcode=em21_211201_eomty&express_lane=true&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzA0ZDllZi1kNjUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cOgkqyTieMAd8Q6hQQ1qQ-wS-54EfgPBBRsf9-kNgEs=)

[Express Donate $250](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39235108/318940295/-1921549807?refcode=em21_211201_eomty&express_lane=true&amount=250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzA0ZDllZi1kNjUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cOgkqyTieMAd8Q6hQQ1qQ-wS-54EfgPBBRsf9-kNgEs=) | [Donate Other Amount](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39235109/318940296/-1921549807?refcode=em21_211201_eomty&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzA0ZDllZi1kNjUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cOgkqyTieMAd8Q6hQQ1qQ-wS-54EfgPBBRsf9-kNgEs=)

Friends, I know we just came off of a big fundraising push -- and I continue to be impressed by _just how much support we're getting._

Issues like these are exactly why I'm running. And I wouldn't be able to do so without supporters like you. This campaign is able to keep on going because of you. I have spent the last few weeks going to events and talking to people in our district, and the one thing that keeps coming up is that we need a change in leadership. **[Well, if we keep building on all this momentum we've got, that change is coming.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39235110/318940297/-1921549807?refcode=em21_211201_eomty&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzA0ZDllZi1kNjUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cOgkqyTieMAd8Q6hQQ1qQ-wS-54EfgPBBRsf9-kNgEs=)**

I've got to get back on the road, but once again, **thank you. Your support doesn't go unnoticed. Together, we'll bring a strong leader who will fight for fair representation to WI-01.**

Thank you for your support.

body:
Did you hear the news?? Democrats are trying to ban President Trump’s new social media! They BANNED President Trump o

name: Brent Bozell
subject: Top 5 media lies of 2021
body:
The Leftwing media are merchants of lies, half-truths, and deception...
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zq5c7usqa2hdvfi3a6d44se78h98a3tpej01bdi8_rp22sh2s8i66pj0spgeaob1c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tdgclo72cjnm5qedc5mmjh7epblmuqjepr1mlqr9otgmlrr6ppie1obachnc1oefkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1pb0pjgesqj8dti6hj38o5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)

Friend,

The Leftwing media are merchants of lies, half-truths, and deception... Their true objective is NOT to report the news but push their radical agenda.

My name is Brent Bozell, I am the President and Founder of the Media Research Center (MRC). MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical Left-wing agenda in the media.

Thanks to MRC, roughly 90% of Americans DO NOT trust the Fake News media anymore.

You and I are winning the war against Fake News media outlets such as MSNBC, NBC, CNN, and more. You can support MRC's mission to expose the Leftwing media by donating $10, $20.22, $50, $100 or any by clicking here.

Radical leftists in the media are attempting to take over our elections, pass budgets that will bankrupt our nation, chip away at the Second Amendment, and destroy our culture.

Here are the TOP 5 biggest media lies of 2021:

1. **Staging a fake racist stunt against a GOP gubernatorial candidate:** Members of the "Lincoln Project" staged a photo op in front of Glenn Youngkin's campaign bus, holding tiki torches and pretending to be racist supporters of the GOP candidate. The story was PROVEN fake and CNN continued to support the stunt in any way.

Disgusting. [**Help the Media Research Center fight Fake News like CNN by donating $10, $50, $100, $250 or more here >>>**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5drr76eg0vbd7fc02mfdopavufniddekpilp8a0_rp22sh2s8i66pj0spgeaob1c1h2bs)

2. **Attempting to put Kyle Rittenhouse behind bars:** It's no secret the Leftwing media was trying to influence the jury to convict Kyle Rittenhouse and destroy this young man's life. The judge even barred MSNBC from the courtroom when they followed the jury's bus back to their hotel...

[**Help the Media Research Center expose MSNBC and Fake News Journalists by donating $10, $50, $100, $250 or or more here >>>**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9dptgbn5vko7n3gkmsrbgbea8geijkm6c560gdg_rp22sh2s8i66pj0spgeaob1c1h2bs)

3. **Covering up a rape in order to protect Woke educators:** A father attended a school board meeting in Loudoun county Virginia, demanding answers and accountability for his daughter being raped by a "non-binary" boy wearing a skirt. Instead of answers, this man was arrested and now the FBI is monitoring parents who are involved in their child's education.

The media decided to side with the Loudoun county school officials and helped cover up the rape story.

This is a disgusting new low for the Fake News media. [**Help the Media Research Center spread the TRUTH about stories like this by donating $10, $50, $100, $250, or more here >>>**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpign4kospp007n19dr1uc0huvv7ku4ls9mh9kfo_rp22sh2s8i66pj0spgeaob1c1h2bs)

4. **Defending Anthony Fauci 's lies to Congress: **Fauci lied to Congress and MSNBC, CNN, NBC, the New York Times, and more all continued to defend him. This man needs to be fired for his lies to the American people.

[**Help the Media Research Center hold LIARS like Anthony Fauci by sharing the truth! Donate $10, $50, $100, $250 or more here >>>**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z86qbvc04rn51hqi2q4eecm0pfith8tu5p6hsn5o_rp22sh2s8i66pj0spgeaob1c1h2bs)

5. **Protecting Joe Biden 's failing Presidency:** Biased news anchors and reporters are doing everything possible to keep Biden in power. They are covering up his failures in Afghanistan, inflation, huge deficits, and more.

Why am I sharing these with you? Because they are only the tip of the iceberg.

The Fake News media is one of the greatest threats to our Republic, to our constitution, to our culture, and to the principles of liberty.

MRC has SHATTERED trust in the Fake News media... but they have become aggressive and distribute lies through new mediums such as social media.

I am asking you to invest in the Media Research Center and help us combat Fake News media.

Here is how MRC is FIGHTING BACK!

* MRC records all Fake News media outlets to identify lies, half-truths, and lies of omission. In fact, we have over 800,000 hours of recorded video and audio from TV, radio, and podcasts.

* We use this content to expose the truth and show everyday Americans how the Fake News media is using their influence to enact socialism, advocate for Critical Race Theory, and sabotage conservatives.

* MRC is combatting online censorship by building MASSIVE social media pages to distribute the truth. I am proud to report MRC's social media team has several MILLION followers and we reach millions of Americans each week with our message.

My goal is to raise $5,000 from online supporters in the next 48 hours. Please support the Media Research Center's critical mission by making a donation using one of the links below:

[**Donate $10 >>>
Donate $20.22 >>>
Donate $50 >>>
Donate $100 >>>
Donate $250 >>>
Donate $500 >>>
Donate $1,000 >>>
Donate ANY Amount >>>**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3hncp9gpfcccon46cthjbsuultp1jphjrfnnrsg_rp22sh2s8i66pj0spgeaob1c1h2bs)

Your support empowers MRC to expose bias in the media, hold the media accountable, and spread the truth. The United States will never remain a free country without holding the Leftwing media accountable.

I am counting on your support.

Thank you for everything, friend.

Brent Bozell
Founder & President of MRC

name: Nina Turner
subject: World AIDS Day 2021
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina Turner for Us
body:
#MyVoiceMyAction
#

Dear Friend,

Since 1988, World AIDS Day has been observed every year on December 1. It is an opportunity for people across the world to join together in the fight against HIV.

This year, the CDC is focusing on domestic and global themes to promote inclusion, equity, and better health for all people affected by HIV and AIDS. The purpose is to empower communities, partners, and healthcare providers to promote testing, prevention, and treatment, as well as reduce HIV stigma.

**You can help elevate these initiatives by using these World AIDS Day 2021 resources:**

name: Michelle Lujan Grisham
subject: We've accomplished so much together
disclaimer_text: Paid for by New Mexicans for Michelle, John Wertheim, Treasurer
body:
I'm so grateful to have you by my side
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39236465/318946591/-1540418300?refcode=jtk1119-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzlkNzM0Zi1kYTUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WoV17ccVPXSc-CJ3W5kuEq9yB2AHOktoKjS6M9ILRlY=)
---
Peter,

I'm so grateful to have you by my side as I push New Mexico toward a brighter future. As the year comes to a close, I'm looking back on the accomplishments we've made together, and I'm so proud of our progress. **Since the start of 2021, we have:**
| | | | **Saved lives from the COVID-19 pandemic** by implementing one of the most successful vaccine rollouts in the country |
---|---|---|---
| | | | **Put money back into the pockets of working families **by making the most progressive changes to our state's tax laws in recent history |
---|---|---|---
| | | | **Strengthened public education** by improving equity in school and increasing funding for schools that need it most |
---|---|---|---
| | | | **Legalized adult-use cannabis **to bring a burgeoning industry to our state that will stimulate our economy and create jobs |
---|---|---|---
Your grassroots support has helped our movement accomplish all of this and so much more – but all of our progress could be erased in an instant if the GOP flips New Mexico. It's up to us to keep New Mexico blue, and I need your support now more than ever.
**There's a special legislative session starting in days, so I won't be able to fundraise until March. I need to raise $150,000 before I enter this fundraising blackout, but I'm coming up short. If I don't meet this goal, I could start off 2022 behind the GOP, so I'm really counting on you to donate now:**
**[This is a critical moment for our campaign, Peter: Will you donate $5 right now to help me keep pushing New Mexico forward? Every dollar will help me hit my goal and defend New Mexico from the GOP.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39236466/318946592/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1119-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzlkNzM0Zi1kYTUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WoV17ccVPXSc-CJ3W5kuEq9yB2AHOktoKjS6M9ILRlY=)**
Thank you again for your support this year. There's no limit to what we can accomplish if we work together.

Michelle Lujan Grisham
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39236467/318946593/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1119-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzlkNzM0Zi1kYTUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WoV17ccVPXSc-CJ3W5kuEq9yB2AHOktoKjS6M9ILRlY=)

name: Team Greitens
subject: Governor Eric Greitens Statement On The Supreme Court And Protecting The Unborn
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for U
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Governor Eric Greitens Statement On The Supreme Court And Protecting The Unborn
---
| St. Louis, MO - Former Navy SEAL and Missouri governor Eric Greitens issued the following statement on the Supreme Court case that may ultimately lead to the overturning of Roe v. Wade: "Today marks the start of an important challenge in the Supreme Court that will decide if we are a country that defends the unborn and most vulnerable, or a country that de-values the meaning of life. "The state of Mississippi is defending their right to protect life and if they are successful in doing so, the horrendous landmark decision of Roe v Wade may be sent to the ash heap of history. "I am 100% pro-life and believe the sanctity of life and that of an unborn child is worth fighting for. Every life has meaning and value, endowed to us by our Creator. "As governor, I called a pro-life special session in the legislature because weak, establishment RINO's failed to act, instead siding with the liberal agenda. We stood up to those weak elected officials and achieved the Missouri Miracle--protecting life and the most vulnerable. "President Donald Trump deserves credit for nominating enough conservative Supreme Court justices to make even the thought of overturning Roe v. Wade a possibility. Without a president who stands up for the unborn, the fight for life would not be where it is today." Watch the [video below](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dJTkthIaTXMUySzAvgOlviJwAiPjCXmnPe0yHPDRUz1KDPaLz7Im33NTQZgzzer_0sDFApHO2eiu2ajq__KrA96J-1ZDHl9b9kbvTm3C9tJz0w6ScwWyABSsqtcU96CgMagphhyJDDtYnE8HZrRGSQ==&c=bTh-ru5y_tkyBdsnn6W6Wx-x288Ofv3FaRp79Ec26gPkDjDD9fCKHw==&ch=lJ1RUQV__4Pug9GqtoHd-nP_EXSq39XhOB1w-yfwojY6WECIEeiQcg==) to learn more about Governor Greitens fighting for the pro-life movement:

name: Charlie Crist
subject: Gov. DeSantis asks to end Roe v. Wade
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
|
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39236517/318946977/-1901457658?refcode=20210901_f_1_fl&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDczYzI5YS1kYTUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ywpxP1vYyXEhg67aGV615ASu3onL7rBBbWHLILVsMyM=)
---
**Ron DeSantis asks Supreme Court to overturn Roe v. Wade**
_The Tampa Bay Times_ , July 29, 2021
Friend,

When the U.S. Supreme Court handed down Roe v. Wade in 1973, they were making a clear declaration: _a woman’s body belongs to her._

Ever since, the right to self-determination has been under relentless siege by abortion opponents. Today, the Supreme Court heard arguments in Mississippi’s case that would overturn Roe v. Wade. **Gov. DeSantis supports them.** In fact, he’s _already_ signed laws restricting abortion access in Florida.

**If anti-choice advocates and Gov. DeSantis get the ruling they want, states could be given much greater leeway to ban abortion -- in any and all cases.**

**[Please add your name and join me in demanding that the Supreme Court protect a woman’s right to choose.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39236518/318946979/722733845?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDczYzI5YS1kYTUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ywpxP1vYyXEhg67aGV615ASu3onL7rBBbWHLILVsMyM=&emci=6558c859-d652-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&emdi=f073c29a-da52-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&ceid=8807089)**

No one should have their most personal medical decisions controlled by politicians -- those decisions must remain between a woman, her family, her medical provider and her faith. As Florida’s 44th governor, I vetoed an anti-choice bill, and in Congress, I voted against a 20-week abortion ban. As your next governor, I will continue to defend reproductive rights -- no matter what.

**You have my word.**

**[I cannot be silent on this. Join me in calling on the Supreme Court to uphold Roe v. Wade.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39236520/318946980/722733845?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDczYzI5YS1kYTUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ywpxP1vYyXEhg67aGV615ASu3onL7rBBbWHLILVsMyM=&emci=6558c859-d652-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&emdi=f073c29a-da52-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&ceid=8807089)**

name: Pro Life Update
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zoppds3s8ponush6vboc263ogtdk3s284uo58drg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk1p7fcdkmcqjas3h6gonact66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2u9pb4ojimopj0t9m6prm6pbimhq34c5immqr5cj3c3i74o73e1qn1dlkcmojadtnq9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhm0slgcpo7ed9k6upb6phks2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or6c3j61pb2cph649fg)
| This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z081ce5b6m7tfejndr9210gh85r3t91unucso7u0_rp22sh2s8i66pj0spgeaoj6c9h2bs)
---|---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zcko8eoraho8hiic5jlbl8bmhlpfq5jjshfq0si8_rp22sh2s8i66pj0spgeaoj6c9h2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zgh7p63fh58vths5binfuumucg6gk9gvl6nlvm00_rp22sh2s8i66pj0spgeaoj6c9h2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: URGENT: SCOTUS just heard a direct challenge to Roe v. Wade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
Folks – _Roe v. Wade_ is under attack like never before. Today, the Supreme Court heard arguments on a Mississippi abortion ban, directly challenging the 50-year precedent set by _Roe v. Wade_. If overturned, this could wipe out access to reproductive health care in states with Republican-led legislatures across the country, including New Hampshire, where Republicans passed a restrictive abortion ban with no exceptions for rape or incest earlier this year. This rollback of our constitutional rights is a dangerous attack on women's health and economic freedom. **For decades,_Roe v. Wade_ has protected a woman’s constitutional right to make her own health care decisions, and we must continue to protect this critical precedent.** That’s why I joined my colleagues in the Senate in introducing the Women’s Health Protection Act to guarantee the right to access an abortion. **[Will you stand with me and protect access to abortion by adding your name in support of this vital legislation?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39236692/318947611/-1180880590?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTcyN2FlYy1kYjUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=53NMSw73GXeww1nTEGfMU68nbsFceRAmL3SZsfNC1iU=&emci=09727aec-db52-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&emdi=0a727aec-db52-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&ceid=5452893)** | | [Add your name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39236693/318947612/-1180880590?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTcyN2FlYy1kYjUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=53NMSw73GXeww1nTEGfMU68nbsFceRAmL3SZsfNC1iU=&emci=09727aec-db52-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&emdi=0a727aec-db52-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&ceid=5452893)

Thank you for taking action.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan
P.S. Mitch McConnell forced three anti-choice judges onto the Supreme Court -- laying the groundwork for this very moment. And he says that if there’s another opening, he’ll block any of Biden’s nominees. If McConnell takes back control of the Senate, he and the rest of the GOP will strip women of their reproductive freedom. **[We can't afford an anti-choice Republican to replace me in the Senate. Please chip in $5 to keep the Senate blue, stop Mitch McConnell from becoming the majority leader, and defend reproductive freedom for women across the country.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39236694/318947613/-913685435?refcode=e20211201_mwh-scotus&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTcyN2FlYy1kYjUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=53NMSw73GXeww1nTEGfMU68nbsFceRAmL3SZsfNC1iU=)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: High gas prices? Blame Biden
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Need to send him a message! |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=7e6f706ca9&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

Let's face it: Joe Biden is a screw-up.

_This guy can't do anything right. He screwed up Afghanistan, screwed up COVID response, screwing up the economy. And now, he's intentionally giving us higher gas prices._

Joe Biden hates America and hates Americans. That's the only way to put it. It's time to put a stop to him!

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a Christian and a combat vet [running to reclaim Florida's 9th district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=826d7a0b1e&e=afa21b7626), a swing district in the Orlando area last held by Republicans in 2013. This is a targeted district by the NRCC because, in a string Republican year, we are going to flip it to Red!**

It will be a strong Republican year in 2022, particularly in the Red-trending Free State of Florida, because of boneheaded Biden policies like hiking the price of gas.
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=426fc747ce&e=afa21b7626)
---
| The slavish Leftist devotion to climate alarmism is to blame for this. Biden lacks the mental capacity to stand up to the extremist Socialists.

The Socialists and crazy Left WANTS higher gas prices. They think that this will result in lower emissions.

Biden's extremist Energy Secretary, the woefully inept Jennifer Granholm, touts energy price hikes:

_U.S. Energy Secretary Jennifer Granholm laughed at the nation’s high gas prices on Friday when asked about the administration’s strategy to ramp up supply to meet demand.

“[In] Sturgis, Michigan, it is $2.89 a gallon. I guess that’s better than in California,” said Bloomberg Host Tom Keene as gas prices reach all-time highs on the West Coast. “What is the Granholm plan to increase oil production in America?”

“That is hilarious,” Granholm said, throwing her head back with laughter as Americans cope with rising prices at the pump compounded by inflation._

In reality, the only thing this will ensure is inflation and poverty and misery. The Washington Examiner reports:

_Granholm also addressed the likelihood that Americans will be paying higher home utility bills over the winter, and resorted to another set of blame-shifting talking points on that subject, saying "We have the same problem in fuels that the supply chains have, which is that the oil and gas companies are not flipping the switch as quickly as the demand requires."

What an extraordinary statement that is, given the ongoing efforts by Granholm and the rest of the Biden administration to inhibit the ability of the domestic oil and gas industry to get its business done in this country. From cancelling major pipeline projects via executive order to refusing to schedule and hold court-ordered federal lease sales to the implementation of an array of onerous new regulations at the Interior Department and the EPA, this administration been waging war on the U.S. oil industry since literally the day it took office._

When the Biden regime declared war on oil and gas, it declared war on ordinary Americans. It declared war on the American economy.

Higher gas prices were the start of high milk prices, higher meat prices, and others.

_**It's time to blame Biden for what he has done. It's time to send him a clear, loud message that we don't accept his sabotage of America!**_
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=86ddffb519&e=afa21b7626)
---
| **Even Dems are now asking Biden to reverse his course on his war on oil and gas. That's how bad his policies are.**

[I got more votes here in 2020 than any Republican ever had, because I stood bravely in the way of Biden and harshly railed against his Socialist policies. Will you help me finish the job and win this seat?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=791c919fe2&e=afa21b7626)

_Darren Soto is a Socialist Democrat unwilling to break with Biden- a loyal Socialist to the end. Like Biden, he hates Americans too._

Help me stand for everyday Americans who want no part of Biden's climate alarmism! [Help me put a stop on every bad idea Biden has!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=ded0b3c6c2&e=afa21b7626)

[Thank you for your support!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=93ef623f4f&e=afa21b7626)
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=f7085e7434&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=58417846e9&e=afa21b7626)

| P.S. I am in the fight of my life against the Democrat machine here in Florida. [Will you contribute before the end of this month to help me reach my goal?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=0b01b4ed1a&e=afa21b7626)

clean_body: Need to send him a message! | | | | Hi Peter, Let's face it: Joe Biden is a screw-up. This guy can't do anything right. He screwed up Afghanistan, screwed up COVID response, screwing up the economy. And now, he's intentionally giving us higher gas prices. Joe Biden hates America and hates Americans. That's the only way to put it. It's time to put a stop to him! My name is Bill Olson, and I am a Christian and a combat vet , a swing district in the Orlando area last held by Republicans in 2013. This is a targeted district by the NRCC because, in a string Republican year, we are going to flip it to Red! It will be a strong Republican year in 2022, particularly in the Red-trending Free State of Florida, because of boneheaded Biden policies like hiking the price of gas. | | The slavish Leftist devotion to climate alarmism is to blame for this. Biden lacks the mental capacity to stand up to the extremist Socialists. The Socialists and crazy Left WANTS higher gas prices. They think that this will result in lower emissions. Biden's extremist Energy Secretary, the woefully inept Jennifer Granholm, touts energy price hikes: U.S. Energy Secretary Jennifer Granholm laughed at the nation’s high gas prices on Friday when asked about the administration’s strategy to ramp up supply to meet demand. “[In] Sturgis, Michigan, it is $2.89 a gallon. I guess that’s better than in California,” said Bloomberg Host Tom Keene as gas prices reach all-time highs on the West Coast. “What is the Granholm plan to increase oil production in America?” “That is hilarious,” Granholm said, throwing her head back with laughter as Americans cope with rising prices at the pump compounded by inflation. In reality, the only thing this will ensure is inflation and poverty and misery. The Washington Examiner reports: Granholm also addressed the likelihood that Americans will be paying higher home utility bills over the winter, and resorted to another set of blame-shifting talking points on that subject, saying "We have the same problem in fuels that the supply chains have, which is that the oil and gas companies are not flipping the switch as quickly as the demand requires." What an extraordinary statement that is, given the ongoing efforts by Granholm and the rest of the Biden administration to inhibit the ability of the domestic oil and gas industry to get its business done in this country. From cancelling major pipeline projects via executive order to refusing to schedule and hold court-ordered federal lease sales to the implementation of an array of onerous new regulations at the Interior Department and the EPA, this administration been waging war on the U.S. oil industry since literally the day it took office. When the Biden regime declared war on oil and gas, it declared war on ordinary Americans. It declared war on the American economy. Higher gas prices were the start of high milk prices, higher meat prices, and others. It's time to blame Biden for what he has done. It's time to send him a clear, loud message that we don't accept his sabotage of America! | | Even Dems are now asking Biden to reverse his course on his war on oil and gas. That's how bad his policies are. Darren Soto is a Socialist Democrat unwilling to break with Biden- a loyal Socialist to the end. Like Biden, he hates Americans too. Help me stand for everyday Americans who want no part of Biden's climate alarmism! | | Bill Olson Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars Supports President Trump Not a Career Politician Hard Core Conservative Fighter | | P.S. I am in the fight of my life against the Democrat machine here in Florida. | | PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS William Olson is a retired member of the US Army Active Guard Reserve. name: Adam Schiff
subject: I’m curious for your feedback
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
body:
|
#
Derek, I can’t believe it’s already December. Over the past year, we saw Donald Trump finally leave office, welcomed President Biden to the White House, flipped the Senate, and kept our House majority — albeit by very slim margins. We passed the _American Rescue Plan Act_. Millions of Americans got the vaccine. We enacted the _Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act_. And we’re on the verge of sending the _Build Back Better Act_ to President Biden’s desk once the Senate passes this vital legislation that’s responding to the needs of so many Americans. Wow. Would you believe that all would happen last year? Don’t get me wrong, the past few months haven’t been easy. That’s why I wanted to reach out to find out what your most important priorities are as we enter the final month of the year. There’s still time to get universal pre-K, $500 billion in climate funding, Medicare and Medicaid expansion, and more during these final weeks and I want to make sure I’m laser-focused on the issues that matter to you most. **[Can you spare a minute (or two!) to fill out my December priorities survey? I truly value your feedback and it provides a fresh perspective to my work.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39237442/318951111/1556356158?contactdata=xvEJteVQKrSLAzNQJYYr0hWsriqHkWiSFcj6ND1qhMH6FFaCwrK%2FA%2FCuVvLmi98l2DvPcAKcN7EIrglQyamQ%2BWhdxaViaoaXeW9P%2FYlLQky6gMW8%2FF%2BIIyMZQvDprEr0CcFfrrGOPM3KA2Z9TAkkGApAoylVvPOVaWnWiMZ8NH0%3D&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20211201_PM1_V1_S3&ms=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20211201_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTQ4M2IzNC1kZjUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qtbVpUDgC6dtXzcy4brwH3-5TTqGBUT3y94PsyV1IHg=&emci=8fca092e-df52-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&emdi=45483b34-df52-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&ceid=33917617)** | | [TAKE MY SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39237443/318951112/1556356158?contactdata=xvEJteVQKrSLAzNQJYYr0hWsriqHkWiSFcj6ND1qhMH6FFaCwrK%2FA%2FCuVvLmi98l2DvPcAKcN7EIrglQyamQ%2BWhdxaViaoaXeW9P%2FYlLQky6gMW8%2FF%2BIIyMZQvDprEr0CcFfrrGOPM3KA2Z9TAkkGApAoylVvPOVaWnWiMZ8NH0%3D&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20211201_PM1_V1_S3&ms=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20211201_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTQ4M2IzNC1kZjUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qtbVpUDgC6dtXzcy4brwH3-5TTqGBUT3y94PsyV1IHg=&emci=8fca092e-df52-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&emdi=45483b34-df52-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&ceid=33917617)

subject: Thank you!

body:
|
