| | Peter,

Thank you so much for all of your support. Thanks to you, we were able to reach our November fundraising goal and garner the resources needed to keep moving forward.

With 2021 being a tough year and the holiday season kicking in, our team and I are overly grateful for your support.

Thank you for believing in our team and the hard work we do everyday for California. Whether you’ve donated, it’s critical that we have your support as we gear up for midterms next year.

Holding onto our Democratic majority may be our most important battle yet, but I’m confident with the support of folks like you, we can accomplish anything.

Best,

Mike Thompson

[**_P.S. If you weren’t able to make a donation towards our November fundraising deadline, but would like to make a contribution, you can do so here!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39238236/318956794/1782284535?refcode=MT_EM_EN_NL_211201_1_1&amount=10&refcode2=cf29314b-e252-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjI5MzE0Yi1lMjUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=itR3sXKCUnAG2eN9zkDQx3TNTw0qzXeNYYhHU0Z7z58=)

| | Well, this is pretty exciting! This morning, the BOLD Democrats — the campaign arm of the Congressional Hispanic Caucus — announced their endorsement of our campaign. Here's what Congressman Ruben Gallego (D-AZ), the chairman of BOLD PAC, had to say: "At a time when our nation needs transformational leaders in Washington, BOLD PAC is proud to stand with Andrea because she shares our values, is committed to putting families first, and is running a strong campaign that can win." **This is more than just an endorsement of my values — it's an endorsement of**** _your commitment_****to our campaign.** We're building a campaign that is growing from the bottom up, with hundreds of grassroots donors pitching in $6, $10, $27, $50. Every single donation is a vote of confidence — and that confidence has been rewarded with this critical endorsement from the BOLD Democrats. **[Will you help us celebrate this big endorsement by chipping in a donation right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39238537/318958187/1186169449?refcode=2021-12-01-boldpac&recurring=0&amount=6&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=b402a6f5-e352-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDAyYTZmNS1lMzUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m_mCZRwY0a_efjvw34lGz1M6Trk2vROrnINbyd8BxE8=)** Representation matters. clean_body: | | | Well, this is pretty exciting! This morning, the BOLD Democrats — the campaign arm of the Congressional Hispanic Caucus — announced their endorsement of our campaign. Here's what Congressman Ruben Gallego (D-AZ), the chairman of BOLD PAC, had to say: "At a time when our nation needs transformational leaders in Washington, BOLD PAC is proud to stand with Andrea because she shares our values, is committed to putting families first, and is running a strong campaign that can win." This is more than just an endorsement of my values — it's an endorsement of your commitmentto our campaign. We're building a campaign that is growing from the bottom up, with hundreds of grassroots donors pitching in $6, $10, $27, $50. Every single donation is a vote of confidence — and that confidence has been rewarded with this critical endorsement from the BOLD Democrats. = Representation matters. The new 6th district of Oregon is 20% Latino — more than any district in Oregon history. And I'm proud to be running to be Oregon's first Latina in Congress. I'm so grateful to everyone that's joining this historic campaign. We're fighting for bold, progressive values; for every working family; and for every child that hopes for a brighter future. name: Cargile For Congress
subject: Another CAGOP Betrayal
body:
With friends like this... | | | [](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=61a7d95898b6fc030e435ec7&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.cargileforcongress.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D61a7d5a9d4d16a6731163ddb%26ss_email_id%3D61a7d95898b6fc030e435ec7%26ss_campaign_name%3DAnother%2BCAGOP%2BBetrayal%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2021-12-01T20%253A22%253A36Z&w=5e0a32326458545293c3f231&l=en-US&s=2fGmxX4Fm2BOvAxPucWf7iQyROQ%3D)
---
|
## With friends like this...
---
I’m not picking on Mayor Acquanetta Warren because she stood in front of the White House and championed the infrastructure bill she worked on with HER president. A bill that was designed to destroy our country and one that was opposed by our entire party, with the exception of a few traitors.And I’m not picking on her because she publicly supported my Democrat Guatemalan Communist opponent, Norma Torres, or the fact that she used her visit to D.C. as a photo op to mug with a whole host of Democrat leaders.**I am picking on her because she sits as on the Executive Committee of the California Republican Party while doing all of the above.**
---
**See for yourself:** Click****[HERE](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=61a7d95898b6fc030e435ec7&u=https%3A%2F%2Frumble.com%2Fvpmzl3-mayor-acquanetta-warren.html&w=5e0a32326458545293c3f231&l=en-US&s=pK866vxhIHxzlzsIe0mKgadnWtg%3D) or on the image below to watch.
---
| [](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=61a7d95898b6fc030e435ec7&u=https%3A%2F%2Frumble.com%2Fvpmzl3-mayor-acquanetta-warren.html&w=5e0a32326458545293c3f231&l=en-US&s=pK866vxhIHxzlzsIe0mKgadnWtg%3D)
---
|
---
**And I blame Kevin McCarthy and Jessica Patterson for turning a blind eye to it!** What kind of feckless leadership allows such blatant subversion and undermining of our party and our principles? One thing is for sure, we need new leaders. With friends like Judas McCarthy, Ronna Iscariot and Benedict McConnell, who needs enemies?
---
|
---
**Pro-God, Pro-Family, Pro-Life, Pro-Jobs, Pro-Police and always America First!**
[www.CargileForCongress.com](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=61a7d95898b6fc030e435ec7&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.CargileForCongress.com&w=5e0a32326458545293c3f231&l=en-US&s=ftkFEn9eaGYkoDTzB2_qF3eryRI%3D)

**May God bless you and yours. And may God have mercy on the United States of America.**
---
|
---
[_ _**Support the Fight!**_ _](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=61a7d95898b6fc030e435ec7&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.anedot.com%2Fcargile-for-congress%2Fdonate&w=5e0a32326458545293c3f231&l=en-US&s=__YI6zVD-SevkSdYvGnCxoPdr-s%3D)

name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: Protect The Unborn
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
It’s Up to You and Me [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8103%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=piZPSL%2bI8DUUk3yJjBLxHg&sysid=1)
It’s Up to You and Me

| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19614%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1EahNmAmiwS9XncjkmxIqQ&sysid=1)
---

Folks,

I am coming to you with a request: help me fight for the unborn.

It is up to you and me to protect their lives and their rights when they do not have their own voice. This is dire, folks.
| [ACT HERE TO PROTECT THE UNBORN](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19625%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SFtfDN7%2bkqOiEVNF%2fjSyOg&sysid=1)
---

I’m pro-life. I’m anti-Roe v. Wade.

**There is not much else I can say other than that.**

Roe V. Wade is one of the most poorly reasoned decisions in the history of the United States.

We have to fight back. We have to speak for those who cannot speak for themselves.

**[Save a life,_today._](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19626%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=anyu5fushF9qCDXYjYD0PQ&sysid=1)**
[FIGHT FOR LIFE](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19627%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XoQTzh81bBNO6%2b3RiBkRWw&sysid=1)
---

God bless,

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19614%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1EahNmAmiwS9XncjkmxIqQ&sysid=1)
Senator John Kennedy

Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
---
John Kennedy for Us
P.O. Box 80418
Baton Rouge, LA 70808

If you would like to send donation by mail,**[click here](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19628%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rySitNLv4xk0jQAz8geOfQ&sysid=1)**
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8103%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=piZPSL%2bI8DUUk3yJjBLxHg&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8103%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=piZPSL%2bI8DUUk3yJjBLxHg&sysid=1)

name: Chelsea Clark
subject: A special day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chelsea Clark For Ohio 30 Garfield Place, Suite 900, Cincinnati, OH 45202
body:
Today, to me, marks another successful year of working to make Ohio better.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39239057/318960113/738274465?refcode=EM_FR_211201birthday_N_CC_OP_6_G_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWEwMzQ5Zi1lNjUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ij4mFal6PZIeFfDC034TKjscNiEW0EDaBCYYa3wTTCU=)
---
Hi Friend! When the campaign is at full speed, it can be easy to miss that another month has gone by. As we pushed through Election Day and into Thanksgiving, I could barely believe it was already almost December! I’m usually always looking forward to December 1st, when this year, I’m celebrating my birthday. My birthday reminds me of how different this world looks from when I was just another little girl in Ohio, for the good and the bad. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39239058/318960114/-1782880963?refcode=EM_FR_211201birthday_N_CC_OP_6_G_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWEwMzQ5Zi1lNjUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ij4mFal6PZIeFfDC034TKjscNiEW0EDaBCYYa3wTTCU=) On one hand, we’ve made fantastic leaps in science, technology, and human rights. On the other, Republicans continue to push back against our progress and try to limit the potential of Ohio and our people. As a young woman, I knew I wanted to be a part of those positive changes I had witnessed over the years. Now, as a mother and elected official, I can proudly say I am not stepping out of this fight. [**Could we make my birthday about all of us by growing our team’s strength with a donation of $5 or more?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39239059/318960116/-1782880963?refcode=EM_FR_211201birthday_N_CC_OP_6_G_N_L1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWEwMzQ5Zi1lNjUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ij4mFal6PZIeFfDC034TKjscNiEW0EDaBCYYa3wTTCU=) **[CHIP IN $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39239060/318960117/738274465?refcode=EM_FR_211201birthday_N_CC_OP_6_G_N_B1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWEwMzQ5Zi1lNjUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ij4mFal6PZIeFfDC034TKjscNiEW0EDaBCYYa3wTTCU=)** Despite all the jokes around birthdays, I have no worries about getting older. My time and my experience are exactly the reasons I know I should be your next Secretary of State. Today, to me, just marks another successful year of working to make Ohio better. I wanted to end this message with one last request from you. The strength in our movement is our care for one another. **I’ll be using today to spend some extra special time with the people I love - please do the same with yours.** Thank you,

Chelsea Clark | | | Democrat Chelsea Clark is a small business owner, a city councilwoman, a sixth-generation farmer, and a single mom. She's running to be Ohio's Secretary of State because the constitutional right to vote is under attack. Chelsea will fight to make sure that we all have access to vote, that all votes are counted, and that our elections are safe and secure.

**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39239062/318960118/738274465?refcode=EM_FR_211201birthday_N_CC_OP_6_G_N_biobox&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWEwMzQ5Zi1lNjUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ij4mFal6PZIeFfDC034TKjscNiEW0EDaBCYYa3wTTCU=)** Paid for by Chelsea Clark For Ohio 30 Garfield Place, Suite 900, Cincinnati, OH 45202
www.chelseaforohio.com

[Click here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39239063/318960119/-1249913955?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWEwMzQ5Zi1lNjUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ij4mFal6PZIeFfDC034TKjscNiEW0EDaBCYYa3wTTCU=&emci=cc51fce2-b452-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&emdi=59a0349f-e652-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&ceid=14488557) to receive fewer emails. name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Action for the week of Nov. 29th: Stop the socialists.
body:
| |
---
**Action items for this week include:**
* Stop the Socialists
* Reminders about school board webinars and defending doctors

See below for details!

_Note: in order to share any links, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it._
|
---
**Stop the Socialists**
Call both of your Senators with the two following messages. It’s super fast and simple, and it makes a difference!

**** The Democrats call their bill, “Build Back Better,” or BBB. It’s also called “Reconciliation.” But we all know that that the only thing that bill is building is a socialist, anti-American nightmare. Tell your Senators to vote NO on this.

**** Suale Omarova is an actual communist. She is also the nominee for the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency. Tell your Senators they must vote NO on her confirmation.

Hi

We’re coming directly to you today because Morgan wants to know your
candid thoughts on our fundraising efforts.

Peter, our government could not be more clear: they do not care about protecting our liberty.

We've got Fauci trying to run the world. Biden's mandate madness. And the DOJ going after concerned parents.

_It 's a nightmare the way they've gone after our freedom. And that's exactly what I told Fox News earlier this week. _

When it comes down to it, there are too many politicians in Washington who cannot be counted on.

They won't fight the growing government, or take on Fauci, or stand up to the layers of abuse that threaten our freedom.

If we don't defend our Constitution now, we may as well kiss our freedom goodbye.

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

name: Max Steiner
subject: The next step
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39239378/318960975/390307162?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTJiOGRkOC1lNzUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QYfFUkIz0jz-m6We3PIYyyfHh9Loam3ipvXog3w4bI8=)
Friend,

I know my team and I were in touch with you a lot over the past week. Sorry about that. We had an important end-of-month fundraising goal to meet, but I'm excited to let you know that we met the mark on our goal. A tremendous number of people already chipped in, take a look: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39239379/318960976/-209993060?refcode=em-12.1.21-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTJiOGRkOC1lNzUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QYfFUkIz0jz-m6We3PIYyyfHh9Loam3ipvXog3w4bI8=) Thank you for supporting my campaign by regularly reading these emails and talking to friends and family. I hope I'll be able to convince you to take the next step by joining 2,299 supporters and making a contribution to our campaign. Let me explain why:

I think it's safe to say that we're truly giving Doug a run for his money. Earlier this quarter, we announced that we outraised his entire haul from last quarter. I can't wait to see what we ended the quarter with. It's going to be huge, and it's a clear sign that we're gaining traction.

I think it's safe to say that we're truly giving Doug LaMalfa a run for his money. We outraised him last quarter, and if you've had the chance to talk to your neighbors or read the local paper -- you'd see that a ton of people are fed up with his indifference to the real issues facing working families, farmers, and small businesses here in the North State.

It was on full display over the past month as he voted against the infrastructure deal and threatened to block funding for roads, bridges, transit, broadband, and wildland fire protections.

Unlike LaMalfa, I'll put the community first, which is one of the main reasons I rely on individual donors instead of corporate PACs and special interests in the first place. You help keep me focused on the issues at hand and run a campaign that can truly reach everyone in this community.

Thanks again for your support.

Max Steiner
Veteran for Congress

PS. If you weren't able to get your contribution in before the end of last month, help me reach my stretch goal of doubling the number of contributors to our campaign by the end of 2021. **[Chip in here>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39239380/318960977/-209993060?refcode=em-12.1.21-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTJiOGRkOC1lNzUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QYfFUkIz0jz-m6We3PIYyyfHh9Loam3ipvXog3w4bI8=)**

| **[Contribute »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39239381/318960978/-209993060?refcode=em-12.1.21-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTJiOGRkOC1lNzUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QYfFUkIz0jz-m6We3PIYyyfHh9Loam3ipvXog3w4bI8=)**

name: Matt West
subject: I’m worried.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Matt West for Congress
body:
Can I count on your signature? | It doesn't look good, friend. All eyes are on the Supreme Court today as they hear arguments about an extreme Mississippi law that could overturn _Roe v. Wade._ If the conservative majority on SCOTUS sides with GOP extremists and anti-choice leaders, Republicans everywhere will be emboldened to strictly limit or ban abortion access. I don’t even want to begin to imagine what that looks like. Women and pregnant people's lives are at stake. **_[That’s why I am emailing you today to ask that you add your name next to mine on this petition telling the Supreme Court to strike down this egregious anti-choice law>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39239422/318961214/-509071333?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzU3OTg0Yy1lODUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=431qbFv8sPVwnsSMyJEs4NdVKQ61BYF98OwsuI9wOYk=&emci=656de321-2952-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&emdi=4357984c-e852-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&ceid=5643049)_** **We won’t let far-right extremists drag us back to the 1950s.** We need to work together and speak out. In a democracy, our voices are our most powerful defense. **_[So I’ll ask once more, friend: Will you sign this petition telling the Supreme Court to do the right thing and protect _Roe v. name: Jake Evans
subject: CNN Is Attacking My Campaign!
body:
I am being targeted by the fake news media because...
---
| | | | | |
---
| | Dear Fellow Patriot,
I am being targeted by the fake news media outlet known as CNN.
They've identified me as one of 12 Republican "Young Guns" across the country who are "embracing" President Trump.
I have often believed that you are honored by your friends, but distinguished by your enemies and I will PROUDLY wear the attacks from CNN and the fake news media as a badge of honor.
While the Democrats and Nancy Pelosi have CNN and George Soros on their side, we have the American people on ours.

body:
Her Hilarious Take on AOC & Spanberger. | | |
---
| | [ ](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=257e3c7560&e=ae0ea222da)
---
[READ THE FOX NEWS ARTICLE ](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=744203a3d7&e=ae0ea222da)

---
| Friend,

Did you see our press release that Fox News wrote about it?

Check out the release and article below!
**Tina Ramirez Invites Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez to Visit Virginia, Campaign for Abigail Spanberger **
_Why Limit Their Partnership to Building Back Better? _

**CHESTERFIELD, Va.** – Today, Tina Ramirez, a Republican candidate for Virginia’s 7th Congressional District, invited Democratic Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez (NY-14) to visit Virginia, and to campaign for 7th District incumbent Democratic Rep. Abigail Spanberger. This invitation is in response to Ocasio-Cortez’s previous comments claiming it was a mistake to not include her and her progressive allies’ campaigns this year in Virginia.

**“For the past few years, Abigail Spanberger has been living a double life. In Virginia, she presents herself as a moderate Democrat. But that mask comes off in Washington,”** said Ramirez.**“Having only interacted with Abigail Spanberger in Washington, it’s no wonder why Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez thinks a progressive message would be popular in Virginia. Especially after Spanberger voted for a multi-trillion dollar wish list masquerading as an infrastructure bill by the most ridiculous and dishonest of definitions. I welcome Alexandria to visit Virginia to show voters who Abigail Spanberger really is when the cameras aren’t on.”**

In response to the Republican sweep of Virginia in this year’s elections, Ocasio-Cortez told the New York Times, **“Before the Virginia elections, it was very clear that our help and our participation was not wanted or asked for, which is fine. I’m not here to tell people how to run their races. But at the same time, to consider the members here that have some of the tightest relationships to our political base as just a uniform liability - and not something that can be selectively deployed, or consulted, or anything- I think it’s just sad. I think it was a mistake.”**

Regarding progressives’ signature social spending bill recently supported by Rep. Spanberger, Ocasio-Cortez remarked, the bill would give Democrats “**a shot to go back to our communities and say we delivered... What really dampens turnout is when Democrats make promises they don’t keep.” **

---

This bill will be an incredible first step forward for this country – and as governor, I will make sure that these funds go where they're most needed in the state of New York.

I will continue to stand up to the powerful on behalf of the vulnerable by prioritizing funds for public housing, so that every last New Yorker has a roof over their heads and a warm bed to sleep in at night.

I will always put the voices and opinions of the public first and foremost in my work, which is why I want to make sure that passionate advocates like you are on my side: **_So please, before 11:59 p.m. tonight, will you help us reach 5,000 responses to this official approval poll?_**

name: Gibbons for Ohio
subject: The End of the Year is Almost Here! Check out the latest news from #TeamGibbons
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sZjB9K1IRKV1ctr8Qa0us3YZA8b34sZDOtNXF77SSDdygudV62crVXGzUxsqNdhPyAe6Jtom_b--IJvHGTvlpFUYIUiyQg1wXuyS99nm88hLB8XWVhmJKccv0uJguqLpipML17BIQgsSpuHNiwjJt5PMB8TxT4kCGQM0ZOJGCw1jsoIiOv4gsw==&c=tjIhB4dilUWpDprS_4AXjOXvDNBJFl_Od4KLhKlk-T9wJVZQ-0Kc1w==&ch=6uj6S-gvmQGve2clJXva1vxps379Pj-GRBDKv22iMtVtVDwcH_tXWQ==)
---
| Peter,
I hope that you enjoyed your Thanksgiving with family and friends. It is hard to believe we're down to the last month of 2021. In just a few short weeks we welcome a New Year. It also means #TeamGibbons will be down to just five months to share our message with Ohio voters.
On Monday night, I participated in the last Ohio Press Network Republican Senate forum. This event garnered a large turnout from people in Butler County and the surrounding area. It also demonstrated that our message is resonating with voters and how many people are excited to be involved in this primary process.
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sZjB9K1IRKV1ctr8Qa0us3YZA8b34sZDOtNXF77SSDdygudV62crVXwsd6hYCXgsGc7haeoFaM_1czRU2EeV91wN9DS1ZCiLAgAx9CAZ_Tqs01cdKgV35A5aJRqdwMwtyOCM3EOqPwYF6pUkqCEN620R4N0jN7QOicio_NvzV3iWVqEUmnzf7uwpmXxLVvZFwDM8g0_cACU=&c=tjIhB4dilUWpDprS_4AXjOXvDNBJFl_Od4KLhKlk-T9wJVZQ-0Kc1w==&ch=6uj6S-gvmQGve2clJXva1vxps379Pj-GRBDKv22iMtVtVDwcH_tXWQ==)
---
| On Tuesday, I was a guest on the Brian Thomas Morning Show on 55KRC in Cincinnati where I highlighted my core values and the issues I plan to tackle in the Senate. If you're interested in listening to the full interview, [click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sZjB9K1IRKV1ctr8Qa0us3YZA8b34sZDOtNXF77SSDdygudV62crVXwsd6hYCXgsR4tG-Ia4EyAZQ8uRbkxPVNeWjF9zNCiNf-DJxDm3zJ9rOJVT6dzuz4OsmEvvIaAmuBJnIUVDqL3ctkPsnnsNIlaVtdvOrgx1Ny98plAO49xailTvvuAcNA==&c=tjIhB4dilUWpDprS_4AXjOXvDNBJFl_Od4KLhKlk-T9wJVZQ-0Kc1w==&ch=6uj6S-gvmQGve2clJXva1vxps379Pj-GRBDKv22iMtVtVDwcH_tXWQ==).
*** NEW AD ALERT: This week we are releasing two new ads which will both be airing across the Buckeye State.
On Tuesday, our ad titled "Cheaters" hit the airwaves. You can watch it [here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sZjB9K1IRKV1ctr8Qa0us3YZA8b34sZDOtNXF77SSDdygudV62crVXwsd6hYCXgsR55BFB89N6y3WsHk7Dp9JdqhlfabltmFLDK0hhy63xVxCiNwViPbUzhzWDbV21TRkY_NQaNZx7KzlM-cQHGC0sjNG7W7wJ5mwDw-vF1buOlTT0A5ew4LIg==&c=tjIhB4dilUWpDprS_4AXjOXvDNBJFl_Od4KLhKlk-T9wJVZQ-0Kc1w==&ch=6uj6S-gvmQGve2clJXva1vxps379Pj-GRBDKv22iMtVtVDwcH_tXWQ==).
Tomorrow, we will launch an ad that exposes the truth about a "Never Trump" opponent of mine. President Trump made America safer, stronger, and more prosperous than ever before and I proudly support his America First agenda and will fight for it in Washington. Make sure to keep an eye out for it on TV or preview it online below!
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sZjB9K1IRKV1ctr8Qa0us3YZA8b34sZDOtNXF77SSDdygudV62crVXwsd6hYCXgsUwW5ew9Jb2AkDfk8m4MiDIuXbDO_Ve-L-qL8VhkGItmJHxsvhE98TB2dULkGyGFUb7E8iAhaaD8kjY7Oy7sXpA==&c=tjIhB4dilUWpDprS_4AXjOXvDNBJFl_Od4KLhKlk-T9wJVZQ-0Kc1w==&ch=6uj6S-gvmQGve2clJXva1vxps379Pj-GRBDKv22iMtVtVDwcH_tXWQ==)
---
| Finally, on Saturday, I am honored to attend a grassroots reception hosted by Matt & Keri Miller at the LM & M Farm in Bellbrook. The event will begin at 5:30 and if you are interested in attending please [RSVP here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sZjB9K1IRKV1ctr8Qa0us3YZA8b34sZDOtNXF77SSDdygudV62crVXwsd6hYCXgs4OZZbTcKnwd3r9hTn4roZVsDLK6z7SVlF-QqtTAJwPpNZ9Jjs_6Dp17yref7hfOzGi86NwXusglUbgyhgMSlTwO75Cv0c6KaX_V4ZZQT8JMOk9BMe1PhW9kWJ63KHgwBPlpgPhPpYgXa0iaiU6eh_iyNiqAgxqrQTq-CTCX3GxweutAk7QdOid2g3jfsAeQS&c=tjIhB4dilUWpDprS_4AXjOXvDNBJFl_Od4KLhKlk-T9wJVZQ-0Kc1w==&ch=6uj6S-gvmQGve2clJXva1vxps379Pj-GRBDKv22iMtVtVDwcH_tXWQ==).
Our team is growing and so is our statewide support! We would love to come visit, if you have any tour or event suggestions, please email info@gibbonsforohio.com.
Hope to see you on the trail soon!
In Liberty,
Mike Gibbons Candidate for U.S. Senate
---
| | |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sZjB9K1IRKV1ctr8Qa0us3YZA8b34sZDOtNXF77SSDdygudV62crVYI0OuI1bKpaGANCXy62WzcVZGiBd8LTepVwmDmGOyxziUJHMyqGmWYw4rOzoZMzPWTs6B-ReynK4EQLdOaVsyxeeCY4rbY_Fw==&c=tjIhB4dilUWpDprS_4AXjOXvDNBJFl_Od4KLhKlk-T9wJVZQ-0Kc1w==&ch=6uj6S-gvmQGve2clJXva1vxps379Pj-GRBDKv22iMtVtVDwcH_tXWQ==)

name: Ben Shapiro
subject: 9 Antifa Leftists Arrested
body:
Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system. It’s never been more important that we expose it, because
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zpfd48i0tjnqn5jlg645f8v40scph3466uhvsdc8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbr6ep9hm8p66plk69ir4orjm6p66s5km6o6atr4c1pn1c30sspb1pjjmqom8ptgcv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj661rjadhgeth6cdb4mdi6fc5lclp238h1e8he4933cpgecp72c5i61oh5u)
Fellow Patriot, Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system. It’s never been more important that we expose it, because the Left has lit an ideological fire, and that fire is now consuming the minds of young Americans, burning itself through the most aspects of American culture and politics. That’s why it’s of utmost importance that I hear back from you today. I’m no stranger to the authoritarian attitudes on campus; I famously felt the brunt of it when conservative students invited me to speak on the University of California, Berkeley campus. [**HELP US FIGHT THE RADICAL LEFT**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zvvfs41fjctgqlsp5egtjliul4qfaib1vgfd32dg_rp22sh2s8i66pj0spie4ob4c3h2bs) Radical leftist groups like Antifa vowed to riot and cause harm to others. The fear of violence from leftist agitators was so great that:
* It cost $600,000 in security expenses and required hundreds of policemen to ensure that agitators didn’t disrupt or try to cause violence at my speech.
* The University shut down six buildings on campus during my speech and erected concrete barricades (YES, a wall) to secure the Berkeley campus.
* For the first time in 20 years, the City of Berkeley voted to allow the use of pepper spray against violent protesters.
* In the end, police arrested nine leftists for trying to sneak banned weapons into our event—with the likely intent to do harm.

It’s no longer just about the Left trying to suppress your conservative views on campus. It’s about using the threat of violence to silence the conservative values you and I share. Meanwhile, schools roll out the red carpet for leftists like Angela Davis, Bill Ayers, Barack Obama, Bill Clinton, and Bernie Sanders. At Berkeley, taxpayer-funded school administrators tried to derail my event from even taking place. They told me that they didn’t have a lecture hall available, which was a lie. School administrators even cut the venue in half by not allowing students to sit in the balcony—a dirty tactic to minimize attendance. _**The good news is the radical Left’s attempts to silence me completely backfired.**_**** More than 600 students showed up, and we were able to host an engaging and civil event. Then, OVER 10 MILLION PEOPLE watched my speech online (that’s more viewers than any of the major evening newscasts). This victory for the Conservative Movement would have never happened if it weren’t for the **Young America’s Foundation** **(YAF)**. When Berkeley tried to illegally block me from coming to campus, YAF sued the university —**and won.** But the radicals who rioted and tried to incite violence at Berkeley are relentless. Their stranglehold on America’s universities has not yet been broken. **Young America’s Foundation** has been an incredible partner in making sure I am able to share our conservative values with students on campuses across the country. In fact, I speak on campuses **_exclusively_** through YAF because I know YAF has the experience and leadership necessary to run the nation’s leading campus lecture program. Today YAF needs your help. **[Will you contribute $35 today to ensure that YAF can continue to present speakers, including Dr. Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich, Senator Ted Cruz, and many others to high school and college students? Without you, the mission to pass along our conservative values to future generations will stall out.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zgvjaik1p1arnn4ogcp16rvad79rucl8h3atqc9o_rp22sh2s8i66pj0spie4ob4c3h2bs)** Let me tell you a little bit more about what YAF does to advance conservative ideas. Speaking to an audience of Young America’s Foundation students, Vice President Mike Pence noted, “Since its founding in 1960, YAF has been a bulwark of American greatness.” YAF valiantly defends the values we share by educating impressionable young people who have been ideologically poisoned by leftist propaganda for decades, by the very teachers and professors they’re told to trust. YAF’s team is the best at what they do. They are _**#1: the LARGEST and MOST effective conservative youth outreach organization in America**._ Here’s why:
* YAF introduces young audiences to the biggest names in the Conservative Movement through their leading campus lecture program. YAF speakers are the most inspiring conservative voices in America, including **Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich,** YAF’s Ronald Reagan Presidential Scholar and Vice President **Mike Pence, Dinesh D’Souza, Lila Rose, Steve Forbes,** Lt. Col.**Allen West** , Speaker**Newt Gingrich, Michael Knowles, Dana Loesch, James O’Keefe,** NFL star and Congressman **Burgess Owens, Star Parker,** Fox News’s**Jesse Watters,** and many others.
* YAF teaches **_millions of students_ **across the nation YOUR conservative values through breakthrough conferences, training seminars, and campus activism initiatives and activities. (In fact, YAF is the only Conservative Movement organization that has a full suite of conservative educational programs for high school students!)
* And YAF preserves and protects President Reagan’s ranch in Santa Barbara, California and Boyhood Home in Dixon, Illinois. They saved these national treasures so young people can learn about Ronald Reagan’s lasting accomplishments.

_No other organization reaches conservative students with foundational American ideas on a bigger scale than Young America’s Foundation._ _That’s why I prefer YAF to be my sole sponsor for campus events._ They fight for the right to ensure alternative voices are heard on college campuses. They stop campuses from being turned into Leftist echo chambers. I am glad I have YAF on my side and the side of the students. But YAF can’t do this alone. As the Left continues to stoop to desperate new lows to silence conservatives, it’s become more important than ever that our values are shared with the next generation of thought leaders. We both know that the Left doesn’t want a fair discussion of ideas. But that’s why YAF needs your help today. At any moment, a scheduled event could get shut down by campus radicals or administrators, and the YAF team must be ready to engage them on a moment’s notice. [**Will you contribute $35 or more today so that YAF’s rapid response team will always be ready to leap into action the next time leftists decide to shut down free speech and deprive students of the chance to hear your conservative ideas?**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zibij1jdtflhs4pj935is75g686rqklf133im0h8_rp22sh2s8i66pj0spie4ob4c3h2bs) Friend, a donation of $35 or whatever you choose does more than you know. The impact amplifying conservative voices will have on the future of our country can’t be overstated. I cannot encourage you enough to consider giving to YAF today. Partnering with YAF today is our opportunity to win a generation that values freedom. I can’t think of a better investment. Ronald Reagan stated, “There is no better way to establish hope for the future than to enlighten young minds.” I look forward to hearing back from you. -Ben Ben Shapiro [**Will you support Young America’s Foundation with a contribution of $35, $50, $100, or even $1000 today, to save this generation by presenting conservative ideas to students across the country?**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zdt6hgcn8d86tr3p5hbos2khmeue0ntioc3clsp8_rp22sh2s8i66pj0spie4ob4c3h2bs) [**DONATE**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zaiilaer86gkjcqrdogko9f93nq7tihpdi0gaof0_rp22sh2s8i66pj0spie4ob4c3h2bs) [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zb2b3ma00khfui4m25m4ffkoi6m416i517emes28_rp22sh2s8i66pj0spie4ob4c3h2bs) | | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0m9flobknvl77sdq2qcp65kkvkn7lgj0pkf38qg_rp22sh2s8i66pj0spie4ob4c3h2bs) | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zht2l8nob7ji17a0dcs3q9bbobn1tq85jl2mc2gg_rp22sh2s8i66pj0spie4ob4c3h2bs) | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zn3t90ege3f6ea8tais0kqukggccgpa82osvh098_rp22sh2s8i66pj0spie4ob4c3h2bs)

clean_body: Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system. It’s never been more important that we expose it, because Fellow Patriot, Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system. It’s never been more important that we expose it, because the Left has lit an ideological fire, and that fire is now consuming the minds of young Americans, burning itself through the most aspects of American culture and politics. That’s why it’s of utmost importance that I hear back from you today. I’m no stranger to the authoritarian attitudes on campus; I famously felt the brunt of it when conservative students invited me to speak on the University of California, Berkeley campus. Radical leftist groups like Antifa vowed to riot and cause harm to others. The fear of violence from leftist agitators was so great that: It cost $600,000 in security expenses and required hundreds of policemen to ensure that agitators didn’t disrupt or try to cause violence at my speech. The University shut down six buildings on campus during my speech and erected concrete barricades (YES, a wall) to secure the Berkeley campus. For the first time in 20 years, the City of Berkeley voted to allow the use of pepper spray against violent protesters. In the end, police arrested nine leftists for trying to sneak banned weapons into our event—with the likely intent to do harm. It’s no longer just about the Left trying to suppress your conservative views on campus. It’s about using the threat of violence to silence the conservative values you and I share. Meanwhile, schools roll out the red carpet for leftists like Angela Davis, Bill Ayers, Barack Obama, Bill Clinton, and Bernie Sanders. At Berkeley, taxpayer-funded school administrators tried to derail my event from even taking place. They told me that they didn’t have a lecture hall available, which was a lie. School administrators even cut the venue in half by not allowing students to sit in the balcony—a dirty tactic to minimize attendance. The good news is the radical Left’s attempts to silence me completely backfired.** More than 600 students showed up, and we were able to host an engaging and civil event. Then, OVER 10 MILLION PEOPLE watched my speech online (that’s more viewers than any of the major evening newscasts). This victory for the Conservative Movement would have never happened if it weren’t for the Young America’s Foundation (YAF). When Berkeley tried to illegally block me from coming to campus, YAF sued the university —and won. But the radicals who rioted and tried to incite violence at Berkeley are relentless. Their stranglehold on America’s universities has not yet been broken. Young America’s Foundation has been an incredible partner in making sure I am able to share our conservative values with students on campuses across the country. In fact, I speak on campuses exclusively through YAF because I know YAF has the experience and leadership necessary to run the nation’s leading campus lecture program. Today YAF needs your help. Let me tell you a little bit more about what YAF does to advance conservative ideas. Speaking to an audience of Young America’s Foundation students, Vice President Mike Pence noted, “Since its founding in 1960, YAF has been a bulwark of American greatness.” YAF valiantly defends the values we share by educating impressionable young people who have been ideologically poisoned by leftist propaganda for decades, by the very teachers and professors they’re told to trust. YAF’s team is the best at what they do. They are #1: the LARGEST and MOST effective conservative youth outreach organization in America. Here’s why: YAF introduces young audiences to the biggest names in the Conservative Movement through their leading campus lecture program. YAF speakers are the most inspiring conservative voices in America, including Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich, YAF’s Ronald Reagan Presidential Scholar and Vice President Mike Pence, Dinesh D’Souza, Lila Rose, Steve Forbes, Lt. Col.Allen West , SpeakerNewt Gingrich, Michael Knowles, Dana Loesch, James O’Keefe, NFL star and Congressman Burgess Owens, Star Parker, Fox News’sJesse Watters, and many others. YAF teaches millions of students across the nation YOUR conservative values through breakthrough conferences, training seminars, and campus activism initiatives and activities. (In fact, YAF is the only Conservative Movement organization that has a full suite of conservative educational programs for high school students!) And YAF preserves and protects President Reagan’s ranch in Santa Barbara, California and Boyhood Home in Dixon, Illinois. They saved these national treasures so young people can learn about Ronald Reagan’s lasting accomplishments. No other organization reaches conservative students with foundational American ideas on a bigger scale than Young America’s Foundation. That’s why I prefer YAF to be my sole sponsor for campus events. They fight for the right to ensure alternative voices are heard on college campuses. They stop campuses from being turned into Leftist echo chambers. I am glad I have YAF on my side and the side of the students. But YAF can’t do this alone. As the Left continues to stoop to desperate new lows to silence conservatives, it’s become more important than ever that our values are shared with the next generation of thought leaders. We both know that the Left doesn’t want a fair discussion of ideas. But that’s why YAF needs your help today. At any moment, a scheduled event could get shut down by campus radicals or administrators, and the YAF team must be ready to engage them on a moment’s notice. Friend, a donation of $35 or whatever you choose does more than you know. The impact amplifying conservative voices will have on the future of our country can’t be overstated. I cannot encourage you enough to consider giving to YAF today. Partnering with YAF today is our opportunity to win a generation that values freedom. I can’t think of a better investment. Ronald Reagan stated, “There is no better way to establish hope for the future than to enlighten young minds.” I look forward to hearing back from you. -Ben Ben Shapiro | | | | ---|---|--- 11480 Commerce Park Dr, 6th Floor Reston, VA 20191-1556 If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Defense News, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

| [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/6/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjIxMzM1LWVhN2RmYjUzZTU1MTQyZjhiYmJkMmE0YjkzMDQxMzUw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMTI2MDY0NDI4Mg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9vbmxpbmUuaGlsbHNkYWxlLmVkdS9sYW5kaW5nL3RoZS1mZWRlcmFsaXN0LXBhcGVycy8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1mZWRlcmFsaXN0cGFwZXJzX29jJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFFX0ZGTzEyMDEyMDIx&K=aQK9d5FdHojJU_6j-rewDg)[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/6/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjIxMzM1LWVhN2RmYjUzZTU1MTQyZjhiYmJkMmE0YjkzMDQxMzUw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMTI2MDY0NDI4Mg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9vbmxpbmUuaGlsbHNkYWxlLmVkdS9sYW5kaW5nL3RoZS1mZWRlcmFsaXN0LXBhcGVycz91dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWZlZGVyYWxpc3RwYXBlcnNfb2MmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QUVfRkZPMTIwMTIwMjE&K=USSxqBntlL1UG5UECSv4BQ)Dear Fellow American,
I hope you’re having a good day today.
You may have heard a lot of talk in the media lately about how our Constitution, as designed by the Founding Fathers, is flawed and outdated.
It may make you wonder, as it does me: How should defenders of the Constitution respond to these charges?
Well, a few early defenders of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given us the guide: The Federalist Papers.
These essays were written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, The Federalist Papers, and were published initially as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution.
Thomas Jefferson described **[The Federalist Papers](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/6/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjIxMzM1LWVhN2RmYjUzZTU1MTQyZjhiYmJkMmE0YjkzMDQxMzUw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMTI2MDY0NDI4Mg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9vbmxpbmUuaGlsbHNkYWxlLmVkdS9sYW5kaW5nL3RoZS1mZWRlcmFsaXN0LXBhcGVycz91dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWZlZGVyYWxpc3RwYXBlcnNfb2MmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QUVfRkZPMTIwMTIwMjE&K=7zMk26knZPLCx-yo5rN_YQ)** as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.”
There is no better guide to understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than through the words of the Founders themselves. That’s why I’d like to give you the chance to enroll in Hillsdale’s free online course,**[“The Federalist Papers,”](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/6/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjIxMzM1LWVhN2RmYjUzZTU1MTQyZjhiYmJkMmE0YjkzMDQxMzUw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMTI2MDY0NDI4Mg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9vbmxpbmUuaGlsbHNkYWxlLmVkdS9sYW5kaW5nL3RoZS1mZWRlcmFsaXN0LXBhcGVycz91dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWZlZGVyYWxpc3RwYXBlcnNfb2MmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QUVfRkZPMTIwMTIwMjE&K=Rnx9mkRmXwCz4JYes7iDhA)** today.
Taught by Hillsdale College’s politics faculty, this ten-lecture course explores the major themes of this classic work of American politics, such as the problem of majority faction, the importance of separation of powers, the nature of the three branches of government, and the argument concerning the Bill of Rights.
Thanks for reading my email, and I hope you’ll activate your free enrollment in **[“The Federalist Papers”](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/6/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjIxMzM1LWVhN2RmYjUzZTU1MTQyZjhiYmJkMmE0YjkzMDQxMzUw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMTI2MDY0NDI4Mg%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9vbmxpbmUuaGlsbHNkYWxlLmVkdS9sYW5kaW5nL3RoZS1mZWRlcmFsaXN0LXBhcGVycz91dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWZlZGVyYWxpc3RwYXBlcnNfb2MmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QUVfRkZPMTIwMTIwMjE&K=1CMiFj8TO780xMFrB81Lqg)** today.
[Activate your free course now »](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/6/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjIxMzM1LWVhN2RmYjUzZTU1MTQyZjhiYmJkMmE0YjkzMDQxMzUw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMTI2MDY0NDI4Mg%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9vbmxpbmUuaGlsbHNkYWxlLmVkdS9sYW5kaW5nL3RoZS1mZWRlcmFsaXN0LXBhcGVycz91dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWZlZGVyYWxpc3RwYXBlcnNfb2MmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QUVfRkZPMTIwMTIwMjE&K=vQswchfhaV7xXULxEwLkmw) Warm regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
* * *
## What students are saying
“Hillsdale College's online offerings have deepened my education and enriched my life.”**\- Fred D.** “Extraordinary in their simplicity and so fulfilling in their content. Thank you for creating this avenue to knowledge.”**\- John C.** [Activate your free course now »](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/6/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjIxMzM1LWVhN2RmYjUzZTU1MTQyZjhiYmJkMmE0YjkzMDQxMzUw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMTI2MDY0NDI4Mg%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9vbmxpbmUuaGlsbHNkYWxlLmVkdS9sYW5kaW5nL3RoZS1mZWRlcmFsaXN0LXBhcGVycz91dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWZlZGVyYWxpc3RwYXBlcnNfb2MmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QUVfRkZPMTIwMTIwMjE&K=4acXis07WnkbuQQBn0kMuQ)

clean_body: Do you agree? | Peter, The Democrats will do, say, and spend whatever it takes to win -- that much has always been clear. But it’s still shocking to see the lengths they’ve been willing to go to undermine trust in our elections and encourage illegal and questionable voting. North Carolina Republicans are taking action. But Democrat Governor Roy Cooper REFUSES to sign the Election Day Integrity Act that overwhelmingly passed the legislature. It’s clear that the only way we’re going to ever have true election integrity is by defeating every single Democrat who’s standing in the way. | Defend Election Integrity EMAIL: SUPPORTER ID: #05966106 DEADLINE: 11:59 PM TONIGHT SUGGESTED GIFT: $10 or more | | | | | | | Thank you. name: Ron DeSantis
subject: Corporate Media's Optional Reality
body:
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a1b4e4aae28d41eb9873b53465de4397&_e=t6pP68tnlaNm0loM7NYrG4zyw6j8hsvHMAv9gt_4HHKk2ayNWp9d1BKRYNO_hmmMN6n3cY_jfxfvIJ3aocQuvioMLWln8WNV8YZbCOdnDHtu1fkp_GjrAXacbQa8SxXrXeEZ18KEgf1rBCAczu9Zlnuut2tNsdoA-odeXA4xWrB9zEmDzCTKg_7Tyh5tPuRMR7LxteQWhMdOWdTrIRvFWhMPkJmle8drPhU2H1_Mo0uYS-rzVvf0_hfgrdt_chzlCbjUD8t3Jbd1MmqO6kHebSP9wcySd9PvLRH10_EHtZSlL_osPZfof_sYG9QBsMAmh4uPzS9FgbQiKWYuNSI9B9izxKjN6uEckQi9trKE2keYBOLBNVntT1Qxej1oKc5y6mxJElXFFNNmuk7F2RsyPA%3D%3D)
Friend --
**The corporate media is at it again.**
If you only consumed legacy, corporate media sources, you'd think that a SUV mysteriously drove into a Christmas parade in Waukesha, Wisconsin, accidentally killing at least six people and injuring many more.
You wouldn't know the name Darrell Brooks. Or that he was a career criminal with a strong animus against people who don't subscribe to his radical beliefs AND who was recently let out of jail on almost ZERO bail. And you certainly wouldn't know that he intentionally rammed his vehicle into the parade, thereby murdering innocent lives during the holiday season.
[**JOIN THE FIGHT AGAINST THE MEDIA'S AGENDA**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a1b4e4aae28d41eb9873b53465de4397&_e=t6pP68tnlaNm0loM7NYrG4zyw6j8hsvHMAv9gt_4HHKk2ayNWp9d1BKRYNO_hmmMN6n3cY_jfxfvIJ3aocQuvioMLWln8WNV8YZbCOdnDHtu1fkp_GjrAXacbQa8SxXrXeEZ18KEgf1rBCAczu9Zlnuut2tNsdoA-odeXA4xWrB9zEmDzCTKg_7Tyh5tPuRM4MqwNkWN9ytx75vA0swFmvWbRyl-7tT52kRDJsvF0pcB8Nqsfa1VUOCeVj7iQLwmlhrGh2mWfpqEIynGdYnyjMycvCjSm2oRvPeUazjCo6EsGwbAHCR8mZmTwtvtwi24mcAYZgqyJ97ukG1HMkOqGta4A0Djg3WHL8vHNNC0RFj8x804PlLRf-C4Bmj1NHIoHdzinPG8Mz0CoPiR80I9ig%3D%3D)
Corporate media is more apt to characterize a frustrated parent speaking out at a school board meeting as a "domestic terrorist" than someone like Brooks who rammed a vehicle into a parade of innocent people. _**That's the current state of our media, DeSantis.**_
**And it all comes down to this:** Brooks' view was almost assuredly colored by lies peddled by the media for the past year.
[**DONATE TO MAKE SURE THE TRUTH IS LOUDER THAN THE MEDIA'S LIES**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a1b4e4aae28d41eb9873b53465de4397&_e=t6pP68tnlaNm0loM7NYrG4zyw6j8hsvHMAv9gt_4HHKk2ayNWp9d1BKRYNO_hmmMN6n3cY_jfxfvIJ3aocQuvioMLWln8WNV8YZbCOdnDHtu1fkp_GjrAXacbQa8SxXrXeEZ18KEgf1rBCAczu9Zlnuut2tNsdoA-odeXA4xWrB9zEmDzCTKg_7Tyh5tPuRMFThDEsVX7EObzHHoAyjoKQHUHynGoo6s82CNZSL6uLM6Zs_uVDpGlcGGEalPt0tWWvQPox-OeWFM3i4gCvz4WZaaSjgb9DXG2e0XaScbUIpgSFm31FwI-4TH9a5VqAH_u9rklBJv1S8opNGvvF0fvD3dU4EH2wsHZXdHrtv21CsvrXU6oIO7DzH3z3sn-u74UJLKNn0TZ94s6dHnPhtnMg%3D%3D)
We can't let the media get away with creating an optional reality in which facts don't matter. We simply cannot succeed as a society that is governed by false, partisan narratives.
We need to join together and make our voices heard. I've been standing up against the corporate media since I've been Governor and will continue to do so, but I need your help to get my message out in the face of media lies.
[**Donate now to help me continue the fight against the partisan and RADICAL media that are seeking to divide this country.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a1b4e4aae28d41eb9873b53465de4397&_e=t6pP68tnlaNm0loM7NYrG4zyw6j8hsvHMAv9gt_4HHKk2ayNWp9d1BKRYNO_hmmMN6n3cY_jfxfvIJ3aocQuvioMLWln8WNV8YZbCOdnDHtu1fkp_GjrAXacbQa8SxXrXeEZ18KEgf1rBCAczu9Zlnuut2tNsdoA-odeXA4xWrB9zEmDzCTKg_7Tyh5tPuRMIJeCkfBMDaiZVH2CHAJ3u3wn_6Ba4BzdvviSk1FAI9ekLAdGjSvS8NBE-zpFA-Mbh0uAIzCRP1u0rmMrSFa2TeWx3G0_EPzIMjjtxoZvSxzoCAadQKAttn41y9ruQuyut9cg_6Anng7Kj-QzbVbRsvvnnl1m3l1rtVpAzc_1Gd6MGmdstiP__kW-euTfxbuP9CcSB70aoODcI8OOvVeyDA%3D%3D)
We can't let the media continue to tear our country apart. This buck stops with me. **Let's fight back together.**
Thank you for your continued support,
Ron DeSantis

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a1b4e4aae28d41eb9873b53465de4397&_e=t6pP68tnlaNm0loM7NYrG4zyw6j8hsvHMAv9gt_4HHKk2ayNWp9d1BKRYNO_hmmMN6n3cY_jfxfvIJ3aocQuvioMLWln8WNV8YZbCOdnDHtu1fkp_GjrAXacbQa8SxXrXeEZ18KEgf1rBCAczu9Zlnuut2tNsdoA-odeXA4xWrB9zEmDzCTKg_7Tyh5tPuRM1x-jH0p1EVzNJs2pA1coq3a0wzeVxhMR83ss8bVdYP_uADJ4vJHI1Ko5XrIPwveAMer9IKUBuK36Q9BYFPW7nocSeo0sKW1cYPEwVJqvEgEYiXzPvKf5CUJ7qxP0zHfljWUZL_WFv9qbI-cp1rNaEbTY1yRymAjyHNSm2zLHiB0ZwuJxuJM-FTCbQU1dLm0ggLQAN8Q0WbpoWFQFblyv0g%3D%3D "FIGHT BACK!") [FIGHT BACK!](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a1b4e4aae28d41eb9873b53465de4397&_e=t6pP68tnlaNm0loM7NYrG4zyw6j8hsvHMAv9gt_4HHKk2ayNWp9d1BKRYNO_hmmMN6n3cY_jfxfvIJ3aocQuvioMLWln8WNV8YZbCOdnDHtu1fkp_GjrAXacbQa8SxXrXeEZ18KEgf1rBCAczu9Zlnuut2tNsdoA-odeXA4xWrB9zEmDzCTKg_7Tyh5tPuRMiSHSKXkd5zldKoKy8MEgDJIjirAuqZy4953vjTlcfUVNhApbLau5pUZ5WDQSjgou5D4nD5IzDxoZtPX69v6UoEV_kaG6ZtE8I3J7gMfOXFnnYVnUFIVLCqx2yDF3fHaRvm2wIEVqEF8a9KAMOLpMS7BwEbunOPzlze5I7EY1H9qBNLBdnTMRcqEiqtQnBG8PHUTwdkzobPj6vVJdBtJoJQ%3D%3D)
---

Ron DeSantis for Governor | 610 S. Boulevard, Tampa, FL 33606

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: How many more children will we allow to die before enough is enough?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This tragedy didn’t have to happen.
#

Friends,
I wanted to reach out after yesterday’s shooting at Oxford High School in Michigan, which left three students dead and 8 more people wounded.
My heart breaks knowing these students will never receive their diplomas because their lives were cut short.
Oxford High had cameras, active shooter drills, and guards. None of that prevented an armed 15-year-old from leaving murder and mayhem in his wake.
We can express outrage after every shooting, but it means nothing if our politicians refuse to act. How many more children will we allow to die before enough is enough?
This only happens in the United States of America. It happens here because a minority of lawmakers in Washington value gun lobby campaign contributions more than the safety of our children. Time and time again these politicians block the lifesaving measures we so desperately need.
Every day that our country does not pass safer gun laws is another day that we fail our children. This tragedy didn’t have to happen. It’s long past time for our elected leaders to pass commonsense gun safety laws. Our children’s lives—all of our lives—depend on it.
Sincerely,
Gabby Giffords
[**Make a $3 contribution so we can fight to elect a Congress who will act on gun violence. Do it today. Especially today. Send a message that we are in this together until the fight is won.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-dec21?refcode=em211201-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=1273_3935704_uZNNIl&akid=1273%2E3935704%2EuZNNIl)
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-dec21?refcode=em211201-1-subs&t=2&refcode2=1273_3935704_uZNNIl&akid=1273%2E3935704%2EuZNNIl)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1273%2E3935704%2EuZNNIl) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Team Kilmer
subject: One of the most consequential reproductive rights cases ever
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

Earlier today, the Supreme Court heard oral arguments in the case _Dobbs v. Jackson Women 's Health Organization_.

We won't mince words: this is one of the most consequential reproductive rights cases to ever reach the highest Court in the land. The decision in _Dobbs_ could unravel _Roe v. Wade_ and trigger abortion bans in 26 states.

It never should have gotten to this crisis point. One single decision by the Supreme Court should not have the power to force reproductive rights back 50 years -- and it still doesn't have to.

**[Regardless of the Court's decision in this case, Congress has the power to protect reproductive freedom. The House took action earlier this year by passing the Women's Health Protection Act, and now the Senate must do the same. Sign on if you agree >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/GGsNkASQkkEQ5lSx8XfKUBIOBNndu8pSVtboLm3_uOE=/9Bmjq9PWs7toYwlC6JPIVnxU5P-0IeIU5z_bepFJC0M=?ms=em21_211201_Dobbs_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&refcode=em21_211201_Dobbs_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&source=em21_211201_Dobbs_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211201_Dobbs_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata={{ContactData}})**

In _Dobbs v. Jackson_ , the State of Mississippi has explicitly asked the Supreme Court to overturn _Roe v. Wade_. If they do, nearly half the people of reproductive age in America could lose access to abortion _overnight_.

Derek has always been guided by the principle that decisions about health care should only be made between a person and their doctor -- not in the White House, United States Capitol, or in the Supreme Court. So Derek is working to defend the right to choose and ensure people are able to get the care they need -- no matter who they are or where they live.

**We can 't just wait around and hope the Supreme Court makes the right decision in this case. We all need to take action to protect abortion access.**

**[Will you add your name next to Derek's today to demand the Senate pass the Women's Health Protection Act without delay? Reproductive freedom for millions of Americans is on the line.](https://act.myngp.com/el/GGsNkASQkkEQ5lSx8XfKUBIOBNndu8pSVtboLm3_uOE=/9Bmjq9PWs7toYwlC6JPIVnxU5P-0IeIU5z_bepFJC0M=?ms=em21_211201_Dobbs_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&refcode=em21_211201_Dobbs_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&source=em21_211201_Dobbs_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211201_Dobbs_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata={{ContactData}})**

Thank you,

Team Kilmer
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.myngp.com/el/GGsNkASQkkEQ5lSx8XfKUBIOBNndu8pSVtboLm3_uOE=/9Bmjq9PWs7toYwlC6JPIVnxU5P-0IeIU5z_bepFJC0M=?ms=em21_211201_Dobbs_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&refcode=em21_211201_Dobbs_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&source=em21_211201_Dobbs_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211201_Dobbs_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata={{ContactData}})

Wade and trigger abortion bans in 26 states. It never should have gotten to this crisis point. One single decision by the Supreme Court should not have the power to force reproductive rights back 50 years -- and it still doesn't have to. ={{ContactData}} In Dobbs v. name: Derrick Van Orden
subject: I know a thing or two about deadlines.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Deadlines are important. And House Republicans just missed a BIG one.
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?2z87i--fgxr-4qqlpo7&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

|
| | | | | | [EXPRESS DONATE $5](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2z87i-1ncbl-4qqlpo7/ "Generic Button")
---
Hey there, it's Derrick Van Orden–retired Navy SEAL, Afghanistan War Veteran & Trump-endorsed conservative running to FIRE Pelosi.

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2z87i-1ncbm-4qqlpo8/)
---

As a Navy SEAL, I know a thing or two about sticking to tight deadlines...and House Republicans just missed a HUGE one. **That’s right, House GOP completely blew their End of Month Deadline.**

That’s why I’m reaching out to ask for your help. Can House Republicans, the America First Movement, and I count on you to chip in before we fail again?
---
| | | [6X MATCH NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2z87i-1ncbn-4qqlpo9/ "Generic Button")
---
**All hope is NOT lost.** In fact, House Republican Leadership tells me if we get 100 more America First Patriots to chip in IMMEDIATELY, we will catch up to Pelosi’s Radical Left House Democrats!

If I am going to fight back against the Radical Left’s attacks, I need people like you, to stand with House Republicans NOW. Every single day, Nancy Pelosi and her Radical Left cohort are rising in the polls. **_Every blown deadline, every missed goal, and every grassroots supporter who fails to take action means one thing: Republicans lose and we let Trump down._**

**[Too many patriots FAILED to help House Republicans across the finish line for their November End-of-Month deadline.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2z87i-1ncbo-4qqlpo0/ "Too many patriots FAILED to help House Republicans across the finish line for their November End-of-Month deadline.")**
---
| | | [6X MATCH NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2z87i-1ncbp-4qqlpo1/ "Generic Button")
---

I’ve convinced House GOP to extend our deadline! Help us NOW, or else we’ll FAIL again!

Thank you,

Derrick Van Orden
Senior Chief Petty Officer, US Navy (ret.)

Derrick Van Orden is a U.S. Navy Veteran. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the U.S. Department of Defense or the Department of the Navy.
---
| |
* * *

[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2z87i-1ncbq-4qqlpo2/ "Trump Image Link")

**ATTN TRUMP PATRIOTS: TRUMP’S 2024 RUN HINGES ON FLIPPING 5 SEATS RED!**

Pelosi’s raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. She’s determined to ERASE Trump’s legacy and OBLITERATE his allies in Congress... _because she knows if we TAKE BACK THE HOUSE, Trump might run for PRESIDENT!_

We’re facing an uphill battle. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER. **[Can we count on you to step up?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2z87i-1ncbr-4qqlpo3/ "%%=v\(@sFirstName\)=%%, can we count on you to step up?")**
---
| | | [DONATE](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2z87i-1ncbs-4qqlpo4/ "Donate Button in Footer")
---

Thank you for your continued support and thank you for being a dedicated member of our team.

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2z87i-1ncbt-4qqlpo5/)
---

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: Did we already discuss this? FWD: This is bad. Really bad. 🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
| | |
It's Congressman Dan Crenshaw. I wouldn't be reaching out if it weren't dire. Let me give it to you straight:

Too many patriots ignored my humble plea, and we blew our fundraising goal for November. **That leaves us completely defenseless, underfunded, and TRAILING behind Nancy Pelosi 's National Democrats by MILLIONS.**
---
| | | [GIVE $35 - HELP DAN CATCH UP](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58915204:6dY42jE2N:m:1:3253819041:E57EEB373E2C760C028714FCC5A3C994:r "GIVE $35 – HELP DAN CATCH UP")
---
_**Your contribution has 300% impact until midnight.**_
Last month, we blew our goal because too many true Americans ignored my humble request. So, when the Democrats spent a ton of money attacking Republicans,**we didn 't have enough resources to fight back. **

**Now, we 're being outraised, outspent, and important polls predict us LOSING in some key districts. **

We literally cannot afford to lose support from anyone reading this email. Without your full support, we're doomed. **[Please make a 300% matched donation immediately to avoid falling into a pattern of losing to Biden and the radical left.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58915204:6dY42jE2N:m:1:3253819041:E57EEB373E2C760C028714FCC5A3C994:r "Please make a 300%
matched donation immediately to avoid falling into a pattern of losing to Biden and the radical left.")**
---
| | | [GIVE $35 - HELP DAN CATCH UP](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58915204:6dY42jE2N:m:1:3253819041:E57EEB373E2C760C028714FCC5A3C994:r "GIVE $35 – HELP DAN CATCH UP")
---
_**Your contribution has 300% impact until midnight.**_
Please, it would mean a lot to me and House Republicans.

Thank you,
Congressman Dan Crenshaw

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Dan Crenshaw
Subject: This is bad. Really bad.

---
It's Dan Crenshaw. I just got this text and my heart sank:

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58915204:6dY42jE2N:m:1:3253819041:E57EEB373E2C760C028714FCC5A3C994:r)
---

This is bad. _Really bad._

I know this isn't what you want to hear right now: _**but Nancy Pelosi and the Radical Left have BUCKETS of money at the ready. Falling short of our goal simply isn't an option - falling short means we lose the House Majority for good.**_

---
| | | [300% MATCH NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58915204:6dY42jE2N:m:1:3253819041:E57EEB373E2C760C028714FCC5A3C994:r "Generic Button")
---

I REFUSE to sit back and allow the Radical Left to take over our country. I know you won't either, which is why today I'm coming to you with a humble request:

**[Can I count on you to rush a 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 minutes? $5, $10, $25, or even just $1 will go a long way to ensuring we close the fundraising gap.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58915204:6dY42jE2N:m:1:3253819041:E57EEB373E2C760C028714FCC5A3C994:r "Can I count on
you to rush a 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 minutes? $5, $10, $25, or even just $1 will go a long way to ensuring we close the
fundraising gap.")**

I can't extend this offer to everyone and I can only offer it to you for a limited time - but it's critical you rush support before the deadline. _If we fail to make our mark, the Liberal Media, pollsters, and pundits will say it 's indicative of the electoral outcome and everything will snowball. _

**[BUT, if every patriot who gets this email chips in, we'll crush our fundraising goal and leave the Radical Left in the dust. Remember, all donations made in the next 45 minutes will be 300% matched >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58915204:6dY42jE2N:m:1:3253819041:E57EEB373E2C760C028714FCC5A3C994:r "BUT, if every
patriot who gets this email chips in, we’ll crush our fundraising goal and leave the Radical Left in the dust. Remember, all donations made in
the next 45 minutes will be 300% matched >>>")**

---
| | | [300% MATCH NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58915204:6dY42jE2N:m:1:3253819041:E57EEB373E2C760C028714FCC5A3C994:r "Generic Button")
---

We're in a great position to take back the House from Nancy Pelosi - we're just FIVE SEATS AWAY from restoring an America First Agenda in Washington. But Pelosi knows it, just as well as we do, _and she 's panicking._

_She 's dialing up dark money donors.

She's depositing max-out checks.

And last month she outspent and outraised us by MILLIONS._

**Pelosi 's working day and night to ensure we fail. If we fall short of our goal, the Left will BURY us. We can't let Pelosi win, simply because she outspent us. **

There's no way we make our mark without you.

**[I can't extend this deadline again - even for Top Patriots like you. So please, rush your 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 min.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58915204:6dY42jE2N:m:1:3253819041:E57EEB373E2C760C028714FCC5A3C994:r "I can’t extend this deadline again – even for Top Patriots like you. So please,
rush your 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 min.")**

Thank you,

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58915204:6dY42jE2N:m:1:3253819041:E57EEB373E2C760C028714FCC5A3C994:r)
---
Dan Crenshaw

The final redistricting map is set to be released this month, and far-right extremist Devin Nunes could be making his official announcement to run in our district any day now. He's got a $12 million war chest behind him, not to mention the hundreds of thousands in dark money that the GOP has already been pouring into attack ads against us.

name: Vernon Jones for Governor
subject: Statement by Vernon Jones (R), Candidate for GA Governor, Response To Stacey Abrams Running For Governor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jones for Georgia JonesforGeorgia
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
|
---
| Statement by Vernon Jones (R), Candidate for Governor of the State of Georgia
---
| \- December 1, 2021 -
---
| "Today, Stacey Abrams joined the race for Governor with plans to introduce the same failed, liberal agenda in Georgia that is hurting Americans in every corner of the country.
Radical leftists like Stacey Abrams are why I left the Democrat Party, and the last thing I will allow them to take is our beloved state. That is why I am running for Governor.
In 2018, Brian Kemp defeated Stacey Abrams by the skin of his teeth. And in 2020, he betrayed us.
In 2022, we cannot afford to cut it so close. I am the only candidate in the race for Governor who can grow the party, defeat Stacey Abrams, and Take Georgia Back".
---

Hi, Peter – it's Hilary, Gov. Lujan Grisham's campaign manager.
Our finance team just told me some pretty alarming news, so I had to reach out to you right away: **We're still short of our $150,000 goal, and we only have a few days left before a three-month fundraising blackout.**
I can't overstate how important it is for us to reach this goal tonight. Missing it means that we'll have to make some tough budget cuts, like cutting ad buys, slashing some canvassing dates, or cancelling phone-banking sessions – all of which could make a meaningful difference in this race.
To be frank, this election is just too important to cut ANY of our voter outreach programs. Everything from voting rights to reproductive health care is on the line here, so we really have to put our nose to the grindstone to elect Democrats down the ballot to defend New Mexico from the GOP.
**I know we're reaching out a lot, but these last few days before our fundraising blackout are so important. Please, if you have $5 to give, will you donate to our campaign right now? **

name: Team Holly
subject: Marjorie Taylor Greene lacks substance and decency
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holly for Congress
body:
https://www.holly4congress.com/ [https://www.holly4congress.com/]
Peter,
I’m writing today to share my deepest appreciation for all of our nation’s veterans. Growing up on army bases and in a family full of veterans, I learned discipline very early on and that service is meant to be selfless.
Today, we want to honor members of the Armed Forces that have defended our nation’s freedom and protected our country's future.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88943/images/Image%20from%20iOS%20%2851%29.jpg]Today also reminds us that we must do more to protect our veterans when they re-enter civilian life. After returning home many veterans are not given adequate support. GA-14 has a considerable veteran population yet we only have one VA hospital in the district and no veterans’ cemeteries . We must do better. We will do better. That's why I'm running to change the way that we treat our veterans when they return home.
We owe a debt to those who’ve placed their lives on the line to protect our freedom as Americans, and we have to do better to provide for their care and to honor their sacrifices.
Sincerely,
Holly McCormack.
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc?refcode=em1111] Join the #MackPack [https://www.holly4congress.com/]
https://www.facebook.com/HollyForCongress/ [https://www.facebook.com/HollyForCongress/] https://twitter.com/Holly_4Congress [https://twitter.com/Holly_4Congress] https://www.instagram.com/hollyforcongress/ [https://www.instagram.com/hollyforcongress/] http://www.hollyforcongress.org/ [http://www.hollyforcongress.org/]

name: John Fetterman
subject: re: Dr. Oz →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We can’t let a multi-millionaire celebrity doctor buy this U.S. Senate seat and destroy our Democratic Senate majority.
#
Derek, I know you get a lot of emails from my campaign. And I realize they can begin to pile up.
But I'm reaching out again because you urgently need to see this:
**Late last night on Fox News, celebrity pseudoscience doctor Dr. Oz announced to Sean Hannity that he is *officially* running to be Pennsylvania’s next senator.**
[****](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37876?refcode=em20211201-3675&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3675%2E434096%2E1ZMrbs)
Derek, I'm not kidding you. You probably recognize him from his television show. **But here’s the truth about Dr. Oz that you absolutely must know:**
❌ Dr. Oz is a Republican multi-millionaire who is 100% ready to self-fund this race with unlimited cash — starting with a reported multi-million dollar ad buy.
❌ He’s a longtime resident of New Jersey — NOT of Pennsylvania.
❌ He’s one of Donald Trump’s favorite doctors + a Trump administration appointee.
❌ He loves to push deadly disinformation about COVID-19 and highlight vaccine deniers on his TV show.
Derek, if Dr. Oz makes it to the general election, he’ll have the entire backing of the Republican establishment + unlimited dark money behind him.
**That’s why it’s so critical to raise as much money as possible right now to defeat Dr. Oz + fight back.**
[**_Will you rush a donation of $5 to ensure our campaign has what it takes to win this election? We can’t let a multi-millionaire celebrity doctor buy this U.S. Senate seat and destroy our Democratic Senate majority._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37876?refcode=em20211201-3675&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3675%2E434096%2E1ZMrbs)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37876?refcode=em20211201-3675&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=3675%2E434096%2E1ZMrbs)**
Thank you for your support,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211201-3675-footer&t=22&refcode2=3675_434096_1ZMrbs&akid=3675%2E434096%2E1ZMrbs)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

Press Event: 9 AM on Friday, December 3rd at the Ohio Republican Party State Central Committee Meeting

Mark Pukita and others will participate in a press event at 9 AM on Friday, December 3, just before the Ohio Republican Party (ORP) State Central Committee meeting. The press event will be in room Birch 4 at the Nationwide Hotel and Conference Center, the same location as the ORP meeting. Mr. Pukita and others are focusing on cleaning up party corruption and stopping the practice of insider Primary endorsements from the State Central Committee.

The press conference is one of several events being sponsored by Mark Pukita and welcomes all candidates and State Central Committee members who share a sincere desire to clean up an Ohio Republican Party plagued with direct and indirect scandals that have included:

- Larry Householder's $61m bribe scandal that tainted 2018 and 2020 Ohio House races.
- The indictment of former Party Chair Matt Borgess as part of the Householder scandal. Mr. Borgess was Chair Emeritus at the time of his indictment.
- Notable financial irregularities during the tenure of former Party Chair Jane Timken including loss of equity, an FEC fine, property tax issues and more.
- Unauthorized financial transfers to the campaigns of Mike DeWine and David Yost by Bob Paduchik. Transfers which took place without the approval of, or transparency to, the State Central Committee members who employ Paduchik.
- Errant endorsements which have needed to be repealed due to scandals (District 65 2020 House Primary).
- The ECOT scandal where Republican leaders, to this day, seem to look the other way at a donor-driven scandal that costs taxpayers tens of millions of dollars.
- Past House Speaker Cliff Rosenberger who had to resign over accepting gifts and vacations.
- DeWine appointees such as PUCO Chair Sam Randazzo being directly implicated in a bribery culture that has permeated the Ohio Republican Party for far too long.
- Ongoing bad faith such as current Party Chair Bob Paduchik purging committees of State Central Committee members who seek transparency and accountability in party finances.

Mr. Pukita will be hosting other events during the event including an ORP Christmas party after-party, training on how to run for State Central Committee, and volunteer training. The full list of events is in the image.

New Pukita Radio Ads to Debut at the ORP Meeting

At the conclusion of the Friday press event, Mark Pukita will reveal eight new radio ads that will not disappoint. The titles of the ads:

- Caricatures II
- Josh Mandel
- Jane Timken
- Vance and Moreno
- LGBTQ
- Fat
- The Border
- WOKE at School

name: Dr. Gillian Battino
subject: I’m back in the office
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Battino for U
body:
After a big push to end November strong, I’m back in the office reading mammograms and helping women fight breast cancer. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39246822/318974069/464806879?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YWRjODQyOC1mNDUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e24wUbYsmeEMbjurDN7kzkbpTjP8i_yronHMoAYOC2w=&emci=8ecef5fb-c352-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&emdi=7adc8428-f452-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&ceid=25515813) | Hey there, After a big push to end November strong, I’m back in the office reading mammograms and helping women fight breast cancer. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39246823/318974070/1807662573?refcode=E12720-20211101-ThankYou-SL-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YWRjODQyOC1mNDUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e24wUbYsmeEMbjurDN7kzkbpTjP8i_yronHMoAYOC2w=) But before I get back into the swing of things, I wanted to pause to say _**thank you**_ for all of your donations, words of encouragement, and support last month! Even with the holiday, this grassroots team really flexed its muscle — helping us hit our fundraising goal and stay on track into the last month of the year.
