name: Ben Shapiro
subject: 9 Antifa Leftists Arrested
body:
Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6526%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=JaX9IJ43uMYQIWSdy1otXQ&sysid=1)
Fellow Patriot, Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system. It’s never been more important that we expose it, because the Left has lit an ideological fire, and that fire is now consuming the minds of young Americans, burning itself through the most aspects of American culture and politics. That’s why it’s of utmost importance that I hear back from you today. I’m no stranger to the authoritarian attitudes on campus; I famously felt the brunt of it when conservative students invited me to speak on the University of California, Berkeley campus. [**HELP US FIGHT THE RADICAL LEFT**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67314%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=i7PF5gs%2fZ0hOJP%2fZty67AQ&sysid=1) Radical leftist groups like Antifa vowed to riot and cause harm to others. The fear of violence from leftist agitators was so great that:
* It cost $600,000 in security expenses and required hundreds of policemen to ensure that agitators didn’t disrupt or try to cause violence at my speech.
* The University shut down six buildings on campus during my speech and erected concrete barricades (YES, a wall) to secure the Berkeley campus.
* For the first time in 20 years, the City of Berkeley voted to allow the use of pepper spray against violent protesters.
* In the end, police arrested nine leftists for trying to sneak banned weapons into our event--with the likely intent to do harm.

It’s no longer just about the Left trying to suppress your conservative views on campus. It’s about using the threat of violence to silence the conservative values you and I share. Meanwhile, schools roll out the red carpet for leftists like Angela Davis, Bill Ayers, Barack Obama, Bill Clinton, and Bernie Sanders. At Berkeley, taxpayer-funded school administrators tried to derail my event from even taking place. They told me that they didn’t have a lecture hall available, which was a lie. School administrators even cut the venue in half by not allowing students to sit in the balcony--a dirty tactic to minimize attendance. _**The good news is the radical Left’s attempts to silence me completely backfired.**_**** More than 600 students showed up, and we were able to host an engaging and civil event. Then, OVER 10 MILLION PEOPLE watched my speech online (that’s more viewers than any of the major evening newscasts). This victory for the Conservative Movement would have never happened if it weren’t for the **Young America’s Foundation** **(YAF)**. When Berkeley tried to illegally block me from coming to campus, YAF sued the university --**and won.** But the radicals who rioted and tried to incite violence at Berkeley are relentless. Their stranglehold on America’s universities has not yet been broken. **Young America’s Foundation** has been an incredible partner in making sure I am able to share our conservative values with students on campuses across the country. In fact, I speak on campuses **_exclusively_** through YAF because I know YAF has the experience and leadership necessary to run the nation’s leading campus lecture program. Today YAF needs your help. **[Will you contribute $35 today to ensure that YAF can continue to present speakers, including Dr. Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich, Senator Ted Cruz, and many others to high school and college students? Without you, the mission to pass along our conservative values to future generations will stall out.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67325%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=w2EUcHMhMD9ZMx8bw%2fMicw&sysid=1)** Let me tell you a little bit more about what YAF does to advance conservative ideas. Speaking to an audience of Young America’s Foundation students, Vice President Mike Pence noted, “Since its founding in 1960, YAF has been a bulwark of American greatness.” YAF valiantly defends the values we share by educating impressionable young people who have been ideologically poisoned by leftist propaganda for decades, by the very teachers and professors they’re told to trust. YAF’s team is the best at what they do. They are _**#1: the LARGEST and MOST effective conservative youth outreach organization in America**._ Here’s why:
* YAF introduces young audiences to the biggest names in the Conservative Movement through their leading campus lecture program. YAF speakers are the most inspiring conservative voices in America, including **Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich,** YAF’s Ronald Reagan Presidential Scholar and Vice President **Mike Pence, Dinesh D’Souza, Lila Rose, Steve Forbes,** Lt. Col.**Allen West** , Speaker**Newt Gingrich, Michael Knowles, Dana Loesch, James O’Keefe,** NFL star and Congressman **Burgess Owens, Star Parker,** Fox News’s**Jesse Watters,** and many others.
* YAF teaches **_millions of students_ **across the nation YOUR conservative values through breakthrough conferences, training seminars, and campus activism initiatives and activities. (In fact, YAF is the only Conservative Movement organization that has a full suite of conservative educational programs for high school students!)
* And YAF preserves and protects President Reagan’s ranch in Santa Barbara, California and Boyhood Home in Dixon, Illinois. They saved these national treasures so young people can learn about Ronald Reagan’s lasting accomplishments.

_No other organization reaches conservative students with foundational American ideas on a bigger scale than Young America’s Foundation._ _That’s why I prefer YAF to be my sole sponsor for campus events._ They fight for the right to ensure alternative voices are heard on college campuses. They stop campuses from being turned into Leftist echo chambers. I am glad I have YAF on my side and the side of the students. But YAF can’t do this alone. As the Left continues to stoop to desperate new lows to silence conservatives, it’s become more important than ever that our values are shared with the next generation of thought leaders. We both know that the Left doesn’t want a fair discussion of ideas. But that’s why YAF needs your help today. At any moment, a scheduled event could get shut down by campus radicals or administrators, and the YAF team must be ready to engage them on a moment’s notice. [**Will you contribute $35 or more today so that YAF’s rapid response team will always be ready to leap into action the next time leftists decide to shut down free speech and deprive students of the chance to hear your conservative ideas?**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67326%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lg2soh977xBkvfxzZEjCKA&sysid=1) Friend, a donation of $35 or whatever you choose does more than you know. The impact amplifying conservative voices will have on the future of our country can’t be overstated. I cannot encourage you enough to consider giving to YAF today. Partnering with YAF today is our opportunity to win a generation that values freedom. I can’t think of a better investment. Ronald Reagan stated, “There is no better way to establish hope for the future than to enlighten young minds.” I look forward to hearing back from you. -Ben Ben Shapiro [**Will you support Young America’s Foundation with a contribution of $35, $50, $100, or even $1000 today, to save this generation by presenting conservative ideas to students across the country?**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67327%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=y6d2uXqRMnLk2CH1wZeCMw&sysid=1) [**DONATE**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67328%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iE1ok0nnP3f53T6DYBEy2w&sysid=1) [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67329%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xJ6hJC%2faorW%2fjvmBM1qKPg&sysid=1) | | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67320%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Rl0RMfNQhlJbJq2vlGlu1w&sysid=1) | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67321%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=f2LqGTLhvjsIKoFvj6bWtw&sysid=1) | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67322%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qDJ7Ap1yy5OwW6tyWk9CFQ&sysid=1)
---|---|---
**[www.yaf.org](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67323%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Bw%2bJp4PyZSMI%2bZaJ%2fFB%2bjA&sysid=1)**

11480 Commerce Park Dr, 6th Floor
Reston, VA 20191-1556

**[Privacy Policy](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67324%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pWvFWf8AR5LRPckd1rBWgw&sysid=1) **
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6526%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=JaX9IJ43uMYQIWSdy1otXQ&sysid=1)_

name: Brad Pfaff
subject: Bad news from the WI Supreme Court:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pfaff for Congress This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail

We just got some bad news that could make our race even harder.

Friends --

I wanted to say thank you for all of your help this week in hitting our November fundraising goal.

Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, we hit our end-of-month goal out of the park.

But I wish we had time to celebrate. We just got some bad news that could make our race even harder.

**The Wisconsin Supreme Court just signaled they may rule in favor of the Republicans in their gerrymandering lawsuit -- which means Wisconsin may remain gerrymandered in favor of Republicans.**

Look, that means they could make this district easier for Derrick Van Orden to win. And with so much at stake for our democracy, that would be utterly devastating for the people of Wisconsin.

**[So I know you’ve already been asked a lot. But if you could chip in just $5 to help us start this month strong, I would be forever grateful:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39247469/318975409/-1995343361?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2021.12.01_b1_wicourt_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=5&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2021.12.01_b1_wicourt_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWM2NGUzZi1mNjUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bHUJgil9VLLlf9LJ0QmwmuO_MU03FWNbvAdMTUIn5rw=)** | [GIVE $5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39247471/318975411/-1995343361?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2021.12.01_b1_wicourt_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=5&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2021.12.01_b1_wicourt_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWM2NGUzZi1mNjUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bHUJgil9VLLlf9LJ0QmwmuO_MU03FWNbvAdMTUIn5rw=)

body:
When I saw this news from POLITICO late last night, I had to write to you.
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39247505/318975531/-999108642?refcode=bpi-email-LaunchEmaillogo&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzA0Mjg4OC1mNjUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qjXX_EFlawtBG-2a2gawfKSnFmePXXBrN-WdLsXu5VA=)

Team,

When I saw this news from POLITICO late last night, I had to write to you.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39247506/318975532/85189443?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzA0Mjg4OC1mNjUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qjXX_EFlawtBG-2a2gawfKSnFmePXXBrN-WdLsXu5VA=&emci=0df60adc-f452-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&emdi=83042888-f652-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&ceid=14684837)
**Today, the Supreme Court heard oral arguments in the most consequential abortion rights case in 50 years.** With Donald Trump's conservative supermajority on the Court, their decision has the potential to severely restrict or completely overturn _Roe v. Wade._

Team, we must send a message that Marylanders will **NOT** stand for threats to reproductive health care, including the right to safe, legal abortion.

_**[Add your name to my emergency petition to show your support to reproductive freedom. I need 3,000 signatures before midnight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39247507/318975533/85189443?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzA0Mjg4OC1mNjUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qjXX_EFlawtBG-2a2gawfKSnFmePXXBrN-WdLsXu5VA=&emci=0df60adc-f452-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&emdi=83042888-f652-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&ceid=14684837)**_
********[SIGN YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39247508/318975534/-557306540?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzA0Mjg4OC1mNjUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qjXX_EFlawtBG-2a2gawfKSnFmePXXBrN-WdLsXu5VA=&emci=0df60adc-f452-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&emdi=83042888-f652-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&ceid=14684837)********
I promise that as your governor, I will continue to uphold laws that preserve reproductive freedom here in Maryland, just as I did as President Obama's Head of Civil Rights prosecuting anti-abortion extremists under the FACE Act.

Unfortunately, I can't promise the same for the rest of the country. That's why your voice in this moment is so crucial, team.**We need to send a clear message that every person deserves the right to have control over their own body and health, including reproductive care, without fear or harassment.**

**[Add your name alongside mine to show your support for reproductive freedom in Maryland and across the country. The louder our voices are, the bigger impact we can make here at home and across the country.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39247509/318975535/85189443?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzA0Mjg4OC1mNjUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qjXX_EFlawtBG-2a2gawfKSnFmePXXBrN-WdLsXu5VA=&emci=0df60adc-f452-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&emdi=83042888-f652-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&ceid=14684837)**
******************[SIGN YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39247510/318975536/-557306540?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzA0Mjg4OC1mNjUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qjXX_EFlawtBG-2a2gawfKSnFmePXXBrN-WdLsXu5VA=&emci=0df60adc-f452-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&emdi=83042888-f652-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&ceid=14684837)******************

Tom

body:
We can win this race and win back the Senate majority, but we need your help. We can win this race and win back the Senate majority, but we need your help. |

Friends,

In a headline that's hard to believe, **longtime _New Jersey_ resident Dr. Oz has announced that he's jumping into the Pennsylvania Senate race as a Republican** \-- and just take wild guess which network had him on to announce his candidacy:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39247651/318976234/212407962?refcode=em21_211201_droz&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGRmNmFhNC1mNzUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sXVHoPLsnu6aKCOJrn5YarBuVE8Kp8X_5Z9cXQ0SJAA=)
---

You guessed it. It's fitting that he went on Sean Hannity's wacky, conspiracy-laden primetime show on Fox News to announce that he wants to be Pennsylvania's next Senator. After all, Dr. Oz has spent the last year and a half pushing disinformation and pseudoscientific treatment options during a pandemic that has killed more than 777,000 Americans.

**[Friend, as a frequent guest on Fox News and friend of Donald Trump, "Dr." Oz is the last person we need representing Pennsylvania in the Senate. Can you chip in to help Conor beat back his newest challenger?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39247652/318976235/212407962?refcode=em21_211201_droz&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGRmNmFhNC1mNzUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sXVHoPLsnu6aKCOJrn5YarBuVE8Kp8X_5Z9cXQ0SJAA=)**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39247653/318976236/212407962?refcode=em21_211201_droz&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGRmNmFhNC1mNzUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sXVHoPLsnu6aKCOJrn5YarBuVE8Kp8X_5Z9cXQ0SJAA=)
**Look, a lot of people are laughing at Dr. Oz and thinking his candidacy is a joke. But it isn't. He has millions of dollars and millions of followers. He has more money and name recognition than anyone in this race, on either side, by a factor of 10 at least -- maybe more.**

We need to face the fact that 2022 is going to be a tough year, and we need to nominate serious candidates to do serious work in the Senate. **That's exactly why we need Conor Lamb to win the Democratic primary, so he can beat Dr. Oz -- or whoever Trump chooses to represent his party -- and start getting things done in the Senate.**

**[Dr. Oz may not be a serious person, but he's a serious candidate who has more money than he knows what to do with -- and he'll have even more when Trump and the GOP super PACs get behind him. That's why we need you to step up TODAY to help Conor Lamb win the primary and defeat the Republican nominee next November.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39247654/318976237/212407962?refcode=em21_211201_droz&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGRmNmFhNC1mNzUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sXVHoPLsnu6aKCOJrn5YarBuVE8Kp8X_5Z9cXQ0SJAA=)**

name: Self Reliance Central
subject: What do you think of K-12 education these days?
body:
My name is Bill Gray, and I’m reaching out to you today as both a graduate of Hillsdale College and someone who works to expan
This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zq69pvluvclsp2ibodlpftplrujf2g5b0pe9imao_rp22sh2s8i66pj0spieeo72cjh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend of Liberty, Greetings from Hillsdale, Michigan! My name is Bill Gray, and I’m reaching out to you today as both a graduate of Hillsdale College and someone who works to expand the College’s efforts to pursue truth and defend liberty nationwide. You might not know this, but it’s a task that has only grown harder over the years. Far too many of our country’s K-12 students are INDOCTRINATED rather than EDUCATED. In schools across the country, kids learn American history...but it’s being taught through the lens of dangerous ideologies like critical race theory. The result? More and more young Americans are conditioned to look past our common humanity to categorize people according to characteristics like race. You’ve probably seen the battles over our children’s K-12 education play out in headlines and heated school board meetings across the country. And it’s a promising sign that we’ve watched candidates surge to victory while promising to return greater control to parents. Today, though, I want to make sure you have the chance to let your voice be heard on what’s happening in YOUR community. After all, no one knows the local schools better than those who call it home. The survey is only a few simple questions long. Here’s the first question as a preview: **“Do you think that American civics education, especially the teaching of American history, is at a crisis point?”** We’ve created a secure page for you HERE, where you can share your thoughts. You can also follow the link below to take your survey. If you could take it in the next couple of days, the team and I at Hillsdale would really appreciate it: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/k-12-survey/](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zaerrnb9aqbve9nh9v0t6dk83o3kvusjpcn42ajg_rp22sh2s8i66pj0spieeo72cjh2bs)** Your survey answers will help us understand how you see the situation in _your_ backyard and what you think _your_ children should learn. And your answers will inform our efforts to restore excellence to K-12 education (especially in the critical subjects of American history and civics). This work will impact millions of communities nationwide just like yours for the better by passing on America’s great heritage of liberty to current and future generations. I know you’re busy, so we have made sure this survey is short and to the point. Enjoy the rest of your day, and thank you in advance for your opinions! With appreciation, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---
| This email was sent by: Self-Reliance Central
MATERIAL CONNECTION DISCLOSURE: You should assume that the sender of this email has an affiliate relationship and/or another material connection to the persons or businesses mentioned in this message and may receive commissions from purchases you make on subsequent web sites. You should not rely solely on information contained in this email to evaluate the product or service being endorsed. Always exercise due diligence before purchasing any product or service.
---

subject: Yvette Herrell wants to overturn Roe v. Wade
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39247705/318976405/282571568?refcode=fl_email_pt_20211201roevwade_GV_full_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmRmOWIxMy1mODUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n2BC0eOR8wQhyDTB5NGyZ-L1ZlAjk2X915y3Gp6xWm4=)

**** Team, I originally planned on sending a quick note to thank you for your generosity and helping our campaign reach our November fundraising deadline, but I have breaking news to share and an important ask to make. Right now, the Supreme Court is hearing a case on Mississippi’s 15-week abortion ban, and conservative justices have signaled they’re in support of restricting reproductive freedom. **Not only that, but my far-right opponent Rep. Yvette Herrell took to Twitter to solidly confirm she’s against letting women choose and wants to see _Roe v. Wade_ overturned:** | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39247706/318976406/203849599?refcode=fl_email_pt_20211201roevwade_GV_full_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmRmOWIxMy1mODUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n2BC0eOR8wQhyDTB5NGyZ-L1ZlAjk2X915y3Gp6xWm4=&emci=afdf9b13-f852-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&emdi=b2df9b13-f852-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&ceid=4482565)
---
Let me be clear about what this means: Herrell wants your and your loved ones’ right to reproductive choice ripped away from you. On this issue, and so many others, she wants to move New Mexico and our country backward.
We can’t let her and other anti-choice Republicans succeed at rolling back our rights.
Despite a “no” vote from Herrell, the U.S. House successfully passed the Women's Health Protection Act in September to codify _Roe v. Wade_ and defend every person’s right to choose. But until it’s passed in the Senate and signed into law, choice is actively under attack.
[**Please join me in demanding the Senate pass the Women’s Health Protection Act to preserve the right to an abortion ASAP.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39247707/318976407/203849599?refcode=fl_email_pt_20211201roevwade_GV_full_SLA_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmRmOWIxMy1mODUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n2BC0eOR8wQhyDTB5NGyZ-L1ZlAjk2X915y3Gp6xWm4=&emci=afdf9b13-f852-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&emdi=b2df9b13-f852-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&ceid=4482565)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39247708/318976408/203849599?refcode=fl_email_pt_20211201roevwade_GV_full_SLA_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmRmOWIxMy1mODUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n2BC0eOR8wQhyDTB5NGyZ-L1ZlAjk2X915y3Gp6xWm4=&emci=afdf9b13-f852-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&emdi=b2df9b13-f852-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&ceid=4482565)

name: Eddie Geller
subject: Roe v. Wade
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EDDIE GELLER FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Hey friends, some pretty bleak news today. Earlier, the GOP-stacked Supreme Court—remember how they stole not one but TWO seats from Democratic presidents?—signaled that they’re on the verge of overturning _Roe v. Wade_ , the landmark 1973 decision that guarantees every person’s right to an abortion. Let’s stop right there for a sec: **Abortion is a fundamental right.** No state, judge, politician, or governing body should be allowed to stand in the way of a deeply personal decision between a person and their doctor. Full stop. My opponent, Scott Franklin, is unfortunately one of those politicians actively working against the right to choose. Earlier this year, he got up in front of the House of Representatives to call for a ban on federal funding for abortion services. The best and only way we can prevent politicians like Franklin from telling people what they can and can’t do with their bodies is by codifying _Roe v. Wade_ into law. Here’s my promise to you: **Once I'm in Congress, I will fight to do just that, protecting every person’s right to choose both on a national level and locally here in Florida.** Last thing I’ll say: This is much, much bigger than politics. People’s lives and health hang in the balance. The very real experiences of pain, suffering, and trauma that have resulted from draconian policies like the one from Mississippi brought before the Supreme Court today should remind us all that political decisions are often life and death for so many. We have to do better, and we have to speak out. Thanks for standing with me to protect choice. Eddie
---
| Eddie Geller is an activist, millennial, and former comedian running to bring real representation to the people of Florida's 15th District, and flip a longtime Republican seat in the process. As your Congressman, he’ll fight for the issues that matter most to Floridians: good paying jobs, affordable health care, fighting the climate crisis, and defending our democracy. clean_body: | Hey friends, some pretty bleak news today. Earlier, the GOP-stacked Supreme Court—remember how they stole not one but TWO seats from Democratic presidents?—signaled that they’re on the verge of overturning Roe v. Wade , the landmark 1973 decision that guarantees every person’s right to an abortion. Let’s stop right there for a sec: Abortion is a fundamental right. No state, judge, politician, or governing body should be allowed to stand in the way of a deeply personal decision between a person and their doctor. Full stop. My opponent, Scott Franklin, is unfortunately one of those politicians actively working against the right to choose. Earlier this year, he got up in front of the House of Representatives to call for a ban on federal funding for abortion services. The best and only way we can prevent politicians like Franklin from telling people what they can and can’t do with their bodies is by codifying Roe v. Wade into law. Here’s my promise to you: Once I'm in Congress, I will fight to do just that, protecting every person’s right to choose both on a national level and locally here in Florida. Last thing I’ll say: This is much, much bigger than politics. People’s lives and health hang in the balance. The very real experiences of pain, suffering, and trauma that have resulted from draconian policies like the one from Mississippi brought before the Supreme Court today should remind us all that political decisions are often life and death for so many. We have to do better, and we have to speak out. Thanks for standing with me to protect choice. Eddie | Eddie Geller is an activist, millennial, and former comedian running to bring real representation to the people of Florida's 15th District, and flip a longtime Republican seat in the process. As your Congressman, he’ll fight for the issues that matter most to Floridians: good paying jobs, affordable health care, fighting the climate crisis, and defending our democracy. = | = | PAID FOR BY EDDIE GELLER FOR CONGRESS Eddie Geller for Congress P.O. name: Steve Carra
subject: a tragedy at Oxford High School... the democrats are already demanding more gun control... HELL NO!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Steve Carra for Congress** ](https://em
body:
Let me start by saying that the events at Oxford High School yesterday are absolutely tragic. I cannot imagine the pain and suffering
| [ ](https://em.carraforcongress.com/e3t/Btc/W3+113/d2rBZm04/MVxzrny28D-W7677by3DTKTZW5yX2x94BzkD8N7Wbrym3lLBmV1-WJV7CgPJYW6-crs68G1PKKW7PQ5-35WTJdSW7RQ8z45zK18YN3KJ3spBBN06W4yPpH240dR3bW6RVtCg3_DtpxW3XNmnn5-jxSLW1wmvqf7h8Y70W541H6h51jVRNW31XPyj5SgmBNN2-hQYBRW3xjW2BHXHz83T8bjW2ts1W-7BQyfFW6FPy2729lsY1VvrrMZ316chtN1GVqrQD2l9KW1N632G7dPyVFW1Lt-GX1B5bZQN8rcKPLc9MqlW83yZHx2Ht29KW5b91Bv7hld9gW3BlTsf6G7VBR33j51)
---
Peter,

Let me start by saying that the events at Oxford High School yesterday are absolutely tragic. I cannot imagine the pain and suffering a parent and community must face when they lose a child.

This is why it is so sickening to see the left on MSNBC and CNN screaming for more gun control. For gosh sakes... let the damn parents mourn the loss of their child before demanding political reactions.

_But this is nothing new. This is the radical left's playbook.... to take advantage of every single tragedy for their political views._

Well, I've had enough. And I've had enough of the RINO Republicans sitting back and doing nothing.

Today, like always, I'm going on offense.

I am officially submitting a bill to arm Michigan teachers.

My bill provides teachers who want to protect their students with secure access to a weapon lockbox.

This is not a time for us to sit back. We must defend the Second Amendment with everything we have. That means common-sense solutions that DEFEND MICHIGAN CHILDREN.

We have created a country and state where *Gun Free Zones* are applauded as some sort of safe haven... yet maniacs enter them with a gun and our children are defenseless. No more.

My bill will allow teachers who wish to have access to a weapon to defend themselves and their students the right to do so.

I'm asking Americans and Michiganders everywhere to join me in this battle.
---
---
Steve Carra
Michigan Candidate for Congress
Personal cell phone number: 269-267-4641

I cannot imagine the pain and suffering | Peter, Let me start by saying that the events at Oxford High School yesterday are absolutely tragic. I cannot imagine the pain and suffering a parent and community must face when they lose a child. This is why it is so sickening to see the left on MSNBC and CNN screaming for more gun control. For gosh sakes... let the damn parents mourn the loss of their child before demanding political reactions. But this is nothing new. This is the radical left's playbook.... to take advantage of every single tragedy for their political views. Well, I've had enough. And I've had enough of the RINO Republicans sitting back and doing nothing. Today, like always, I'm going on offense. I am officially submitting a bill to arm Michigan teachers. My bill provides teachers who want to protect their students with secure access to a weapon lockbox. This is not a time for us to sit back. We must defend the Second Amendment with everything we have. That means common-sense solutions that DEFEND MICHIGAN CHILDREN. We have created a country and state where Gun Free Zones are applauded as some sort of safe haven... yet maniacs enter them with a gun and our children are defenseless. No more. My bill will allow teachers who wish to have access to a weapon to defend themselves and their students the right to do so. I'm asking Americans and Michiganders everywhere to join me in this battle. Steve Carra Michigan Candidate for Congress Personal cell phone number: 269-267-4641 | | | Steve Carra for Congress, PO Box 404, Three Rivers, MI 49093, United States

| Peter,

Huge news! Stacey Abrams, my good friend and fellow Truman Scholar, just announced she’s running for governor of Georgia in 2022. From her resiliency in the fight for voting rights to the Democratic momentum she built in Georgia to help us win back the Senate, Stacey is a true champion of progressive policy – and I’m thrilled she’s entered the race.

We need more bold progressives like her in office, and we need to elect Democratic governors who stand up for the underdogs and fight for everyone to have a seat at the table of opportunity. We have the chance to do that in 2022, but only if we invest in these races now. [_**So, will you make a split contribution to support Stacey’s campaign today? Any amount you’re able to give will make such an impact in starting her campaign off strong.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39248473/318979559/-422177984?refcode=BLU-KING-20211201-1-EM&&&&amount=25&refcode2=882ca675-fa52-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODJjYTY3NS1mYTUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zwRhz5mj4DNa-1ZA86AOoddP0y1sAhj5W2ToY1Jga00=)

clean_body: We need more bold progressives like her in office. | = | Peter, Huge news! Stacey Abrams, my good friend and fellow Truman Scholar, just announced she’s running for governor of Georgia in 2022. From her resiliency in the fight for voting rights to the Democratic momentum she built in Georgia to help us win back the Senate, Stacey is a true champion of progressive policy – and I’m thrilled she’s entered the race. We need more bold progressives like her in office, and we need to elect Democratic governors who stand up for the underdogs and fight for everyone to have a seat at the table of opportunity. We have the chance to do that in 2022, but only if we invest in these races now. = | | | = | = | = | = | = | = With your support, I know Stacey and I can lead our states toward more just and equitable futures to create real, meaningful change. = | = Thank you for your support, John King * | | = Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer John King for Governor PO Box 8429 Silver Spring, MD 20107 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = If you would like to learn more about John King's historic campaign for Maryland governor, visit his . name: need your response (Left Action)
subject: Stand with workers: Tell the Senate to pass the PRO Act!
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Sign the Petition: Support striking workers. Urge the Senate to pass the PRO Act!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7361fafa-2550-46c7-afe6-129ddfb80a2e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T358cdca6-9135-4f98-9c5a-2a0407b3361a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Workers across the country have been going on strike, fighting over cuts to pay and benefits, and advocating for greater safety precautions through the pandemic. _And they’ve had enough. _ That’s why earlier this year, the House passed the **Protecting the Right to Organize Act of 2021 (PRO Act)** \-- one of the most significant worker empowerment acts since the Great Depression. The PRO Act protects the rights of workers to freely organize and unionize. Passing the PRO Act would protect workers' rights to bargain for fair pay and benefits, protect them from unfair labor practices and working conditions, and protect them from discriminatory practices within the workplace. It would also help close the door on the gender pay gap and racial pay gap. **The right to organize within the workplace is an essential right that Congress must work to protect.** [Sign the Petition: Support striking workers. Urge the Senate to pass the PRO Act. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0089839f-d66e-4d60-a3dc-76bb40b81310/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | Workers across the country have been going on strike, fighting over cuts to pay and benefits, and advocating for greater safety precautions through the pandemic. And they’ve had enough. That’s why earlier this year, the House passed the Protecting the Right to Organize Act of 2021 (PRO Act) \-- one of the most significant worker empowerment acts since the Great Depression. The PRO Act protects the rights of workers to freely organize and unionize. Passing the PRO Act would protect workers' rights to bargain for fair pay and benefits, protect them from unfair labor practices and working conditions, and protect them from discriminatory practices within the workplace. It would also help close the door on the gender pay gap and racial pay gap. The right to organize within the workplace is an essential right that Congress must work to protect. | | | | | | | Looking to reach progressive activists?. Looking to take action on another front? Check out the . name: Michael Bennet
subject: The Supreme Court heard arguments on Mississippi’s dangerous abortion ban today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
The fight to defend Roe v. Wade and uphold the right to safe and legal abortion care has reached a dangerous place. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39248747/318980595/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzk0NDg2NC1mYjUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0D6cOb7EK_exXy5Dxwfey7deQBisCcX28OOPdOjkfZg=)
Folks, Today the Supreme Court heard arguments regarding a Mississippi abortion law that threatens _Roe v. Wade_. _Roe v. Wade_ established the right to access abortion care nationwide. Mississippi’s law challenges _Roe_ by banning abortions at 15 weeks. If the court sides with Mississippi this could effectively reverse Roe and put the reproductive freedom of millions at risk. I co-sponsored the _Women’s Health Protection Act_ , because I believe the right to access safe abortion care should not depend on what state you live in. As the attacks against abortion rights continue, it becomes more critical that _Roe_ is enshrined into law and we protect access to abortion care. Time is working against us here, so the more grassroots support I can show for protecting reproductive freedom the better. **Will you add your name to my petition in support of the _Women’s Health Protection Act_? While the Supreme Court justices deliberate this case, we must enshrine access to reproductive care into law once and for all. ** | | **[ADD MY NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39248748/318980596/-2109611595?refcode=AU_MFB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20211201_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzk0NDg2NC1mYjUyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0D6cOb7EK_exXy5Dxwfey7deQBisCcX28OOPdOjkfZg=&emci=10cc17e3-f452-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&emdi=cc944864-fb52-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&ceid=1295540)**

Thank you for standing up for choice with me,
Michael

name: Rainee Taylor, Evergreen Action
subject: The biggest, the baddest, and the most consequential
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
13 investments in 60 seconds
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4089?t=3&akid=12919%2E53494%2EhMdzVl) Friend, I'm sure you've heard the news, but it's worth celebrating again: A few weeks ago, the House passed the largest climate investment in history. The biggest, the baddest, and the most consequential (if and when it passes the Senate). But the bill contains so many significant climate programs that it can be hard to keep them all straight! That's why we just created a new one-minute explainer video that sums up the 13 biggest climate investments in the Build Back Better Act. [**_As we rally support to get this historic bill through the Senate, will you watch and share our video today?_**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4089?t=4&akid=12919%2E53494%2EhMdzVl) [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4089?t=5&akid=12919%2E53494%2EhMdzVl) | [WATCH & SHARE ON TWITTER](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4090?t=6&akid=12919%2E53494%2EhMdzVl)
---

[WATCH & SHARE ON INSTAGRAM](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4091?t=7&akid=12919%2E53494%2EhMdzVl)
---

[WATCH & SHARE ON FACEBOOK](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4089?t=8&akid=12919%2E53494%2EhMdzVl)
---
We have just one final push to get this bill passed in the Senate, and it all starts with spreading awareness of these transformative climate investments. [**_Will you share our video with your friends and family today?_**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4089?t=9&akid=12919%2E53494%2EhMdzVl)
Thanks for sticking with us through thick and thin. Now, let's do this,
Rainee Taylor
Digital Advisor, Evergreen Action

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Stacey Abrams is running
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
body:
|

She put her whole being into rebuilding Georgia’s Democratic infrastructure from the ground up and her tireless efforts paid off big time in 2020 when Georgia elected Senators Ossoff and Warnock to flip the Senate Majority Blue.
In 2018, Stacey narrowly lost to Brian Kemp when he administered an election he was running in as Georgia’s sitting secretary of state. name: =?utf-8?Q?Sara=20Walsh?=
subject: Protecting Life
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Walsh for Congress
body:
All life is precious. This truth has guided my service in the Missouri House of Representatives over the past four years. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f528c7e2ce1c/protecting-life?e=4df934edcc)
---
| |
---
| | Friends,

**All life is precious.** This truth has guided my service in the Missouri House of Representatives over the past four years, where I am proud of our efforts to make Missouri one of the most pro-life states in the nation. It’s why I served as a past board member for Missouri Right to Life, and it’s why I volunteered in a local pregnancy resource center.

I am confident that one day—whether it is next year or decades from now— _Roe v. Wade_ will be overturned, and abortion will be seen for the moral abomination it is.

Until that happens, we must do everything in our power to defend the unborn.

That’s why, earlier today, I filed the Born Alive Abortion Survivors Protection Act, which will be considered in the upcoming legislative session that begins in January.

My legislation will grant any child born alive during or after an attempted abortion the same rights and privileges possessed by any other live-born child. The act would require doctors to provide the same care for a baby born alive after a failed attempt at abortion as they would for any child of the same gestational age. After providing appropriate care, they would be required to ensure that the baby is immediately transported and admitted to a hospital.

Believe it or not, current Missouri law does not require medical professionals to provide care to precious newborns who survive abortions. This is unconscionable.

Passage of this bill will be my primary focus this upcoming legislative session, and I will continue my pro-life advocacy if I am elected to Congress.

God Bless,
Sara Walsh
---

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stop Stacey, Inc
body:
---

| For Immediate Release Wednesday, December 1, 2021
STOP STACEY, INC. RESPONDS TO ABRAMS' ANNOUNCEMENT
ATLANTA - In light of Stacey Abrams' announcement to run for Governor in 2022, Stop Stacey, a national, grassroots organization, issued the following statement:
"Radical Stacey Abrams never stopped running for Governor of Georgia," said Jeremy Brand, Senior Strategist. "Every speech made, book published, crisis manufactured, television appearance, and endorsement provided has lead up to this moment. It's all part of her grand, glorious plan for absolute power.
"Abrams officially joins the race as the same left-wing radical who was soundly defeated in 2018. The only difference is that now she's a certified grifter who exploited her loyal followers to pad her own pocket - making millions and living a life of luxury along the way.
"A radical, socialist millionaire running for Georgia Governor is absolutely hilarious and doomed for failure. We look forward to exposing Stacey's Soros funded, dark money network, holding Stacey accountable for killing jobs and economic opportunity in Georgia, and highlighting Stacey's insane agenda in the weeks and months ahead.
"Rest assured, we will do whatever it takes to Stop Stacey and Keep Georgia Red."

Stop Stacey, Inc. is a registered independent expenditure committee in Georgia with the sole purpose of undermining Stacey Abrams' rise and ultimately ending her political career at the ballot box.
---

Friend,
I am continually blown away by your support -- from contributions, to actions, to kind words.**I couldn’t be prouder to know you are in this fight with us.**
We share the same values, goals, and aspirations for our community. We want to protect and expand Medicare and Social Security. We want clean, reliable water supplies. We want to fight the devastating impacts of climate change while investing in clean energy jobs that will put generations of Arizonans to work.
Year-end fundraising reports are the best indication of support in the community and the strength of our campaign going into 2022. So while they may seem arbitrary, these deadlines serve a very real purpose.
**Thank you for helping my team and I hit our end-of-month goal. We couldn't do this without you. **
Appreciatively,
Kirsten

name: Team Erica Smith
subject: We’re asking for your endorsement
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
[1]Erica Smith

Just last week, Erica Smith announced her campaign for North Carolina’s
2nd Congressional District and we’ve already seen an outpouring of
grassroots support.

This is Erica’s home and she’s never forgotten it for a second. Erica was
born and raised in NC-02 and her entire life has been centered around
uplifting and caring for her community. That passion is what drives our
campaign.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/sign/official_endorse?refcode=em20211201-660&t=1001&akid=660%2E3698%2EuQZ3VA ]Can
you join our moral movement for NC-02? Your personal endorsement today
will play a critical role in legitimizing our campaign to our
corporate-backed opponents.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/sign/official_endorse?refcode=em20211201-660&t=1002&akid=660%2E3698%2EuQZ3VA ]Add your endorsement

It’s time that someone who has lived the struggles that folks are facing
can be our representative, not removed career politicians. From the
community, for the community — that’s what Erica’s all about.

But running this campaign the right way, with no fossil fuel, corporate,
or super PAC funds is hard. We’re going to need a strong show of
support from day one to have a chance in this race.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/sign/official_endorse?refcode=em20211201-660&t=1003&akid=660%2E3698%2EuQZ3VA ]That’s why it’s absolutely critical you sign on right now and become an
Official Erica Smith for U.S. House Endorser today. Can Erica count on
your official endorsement?

As one of the only “toss-up” races in the country, winning this House seat
is critical to retaining a Democratic majority in 2022. Erica has already
represented 9 of the 17 counties in the district and she’s never lost an
election here.

Erica is the only candidate with the track record to prove that she can
win this race. Let’s get her across the finish line. [ https://act.ericaforus.com/sign/official_endorse?refcode=em20211201-660&t=1004&akid=660%2E3698%2EuQZ3VA ]Give Erica your official endorsement
today and help us build on the momentum we’re already seeing as early as
possible.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/sign/official_endorse?refcode=em20211201-660&t=1005&akid=660%2E3698%2EuQZ3VA ]Add your endorsement

Thank you for being a part of this team,

Team Erica Smith

Contribute to Erica's campaign:https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20211201-660-footer&t=1006&refcode2=660_3698_uQZ3VA&akid=660%2E3698%2EuQZ3VA

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ericaforus.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=660%2E3698%2EuQZ3VA

PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

From the community, for the community — that’s what Erica’s all about. But running this campaign the right way, with no fossil fuel, corporate, or super PAC funds is hard. We’re going to need a strong show of support from day one to have a chance in this race. [ ]That’s why it’s absolutely critical you sign on right now and become an Official Erica Smith for U.S. House Endorser today. Can Erica count on your official endorsement? As one of the only “toss-up” races in the country, winning this House seat is critical to retaining a Democratic majority in 2022. Erica has already represented 9 of the 17 counties in the district and she’s never lost an election here. Erica is the only candidate with the track record to prove that she can win this race. Let’s get her across the finish line. [ ]Give Erica your official endorsement today and help us build on the momentum we’re already seeing as early as possible. [ ]Add your endorsement Thank you for being a part of this team, Team Erica Smith Contribute to Erica's campaign:

name: Katie Baker
subject: Maryland Reporter article and the fight for reproductive rights
body:
Who we elect as our next governor is going to have a major impact on women’s reproductive rights in Maryland because it will get kicked back to the states | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDPAZiEt8wwS6hp5wOIb3CiJKYp5ppLVwQFYuOLTkk_1PmWxxTj45cAu0es5k8xP1Iulnl0iln5_OcaoGh0veBZ0Yk6b6ZXOTooRb86Qdby7m6kw5OtRmyznFCWyNnuNeM8GuZfb2aw_u-PqJPKdP2NF_lxHBmIRBpFbhP7tiZEqEhSP7kUawu4WPBvzHm0_8Pi4DbF51p0DR4wyAQyTMamhhdnHrmbOCBzOiy-M57toAfRWsVBlHE53cWgpXHdLgieyyzypSQMflvflS5qbTx_RPniUBHZN7JgC1Du-KcwoN/3hh/hM1-90H4SXyBl7Ic_dhfkA/h0/SFbT4bIi8duASZ9_is8o9qwkQ_NigWJrE9kTAuvPReY)
---
Hi friends, Earlier today, the Supreme Court of the United States heard oral arguments on a Mississippi abortion law that**could have nationwide implications for our reproductive freedom.** Doug recently discussed this threat to Roe v. Wade with Bryan Renbaum of the [Maryland Reporter](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/tTBUZwcBH_2q13Ow12s-jey-IdG_myLJIngwA1tKmBYEAMNS4OVBI7Qrgxgz6653dMl9kvJAogVsHjgHVhW0o4e3v2p5VZFl76d0jscLYn09-XAKBL4Ox9fVvz7Jk98AD13MYjpPo_1kWHCHLlKM4GEFJOaMNXh3CCWZYQxGu2s3daDJzETkNfDZkC4jfqGFnealbwTrHOugmiwe3H870hRmtnFQKyLB3gNnB5AWEw7tH-YTm3IWZMUBQCG8AKkSNvrZDpUxxQbj0sTRHgRKIYsirOpjmPztWFI-rJH7REZzscG2bo60N7lbnAdxblHFi6EL92HxNJOQLg3LwC5sYuucFjCzILbBCDzlLWa3mDcqWvN79R41br01iFzRv647pNCTUSiutl_me7G45VlHbm2Z_z-U2cmD-j9z1K8HG_Pokfr3P8zNS_QwN5rVSibidhl8kQAESxD4ExANSvKbkCQ2j7BRzJAythmYLPljM1A/3hh/hM1-90H4SXyBl7Ic_dhfkA/h1/zy7j42e1ts1iccPb8E4PeO6J25CMilqtwVWGnD8dmH0), and I wanted to be sure you saw highlights from the resulting article below.
---
| [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/tTBUZwcBH_2q13Ow12s-jey-IdG_myLJIngwA1tKmBYEAMNS4OVBI7Qrgxgz6653dMl9kvJAogVsHjgHVhW0o4e3v2p5VZFl76d0jscLYn09-XAKBL4Ox9fVvz7Jk98AD13MYjpPo_1kWHCHLlKM4CrwURQ3RnLs8PhcLdtOgGOT9UF_xHwyugup1FxK_1N5KbEkp1M7xQym5at63vZ6cG3cWTr5TB4_6x_6kG1yAP6J8wiF3KPYz6eqBQ6q5j79eLugFpyKEaRSElEBF8x8TTMYDYbdmTIASqST70WJCWOPPh-DbkiAZz9-4xmWb3MeZBpie8hwh9bPh6aVbNpONwlIMKeLh9zx7QQlZ-VWNg1XggL8lm3GI5GuNFCCUeXJbHwaarsAzpoVey0UEgR0vgv2BupNZWhpw3WA19nVnpkL1fsrNZthtNSVfHMo_1ywfjVXJdIAh2ausm44NfD05zAsCHMNMwC-QAX_dHSl5v7QmCcAaWBeVg7VIfAFZY9Qm7TK0VD_WDxMNOzdUeQbWNyybqDFrhh3YpC87gCNzK4hsBFljGOPAMAdZm_bMpjc/3hh/hM1-90H4SXyBl7Ic_dhfkA/h2/Qb8Kfs9nTfN-N6AyntKJ-ZaZsHt-2zAs3E8vAZrIZjo)
---
**Gansler: SCOTUS Likely To Chip Away At Reproductive Rights in Mississippi Case**
---
_[ ...] __Former state attorney general and Democratic gubernatorial candidate Doug Gansler predicted that the U.S. Supreme Court will likely weaken or possibly even eliminate federal abortion rights when it renders a decision in a high-profile case challenging the 1973 landmark Roe. v. Wade decision._ _ _ _On Wednesday, the 6-3 conservative-leaning court is scheduled to hear oral arguments in a case brought by Mississippi. The first real challenge to Roe comes as numerous other states, including Texas and Oklahoma, have recently enacted laws that limit access to abortion. _ _[...] "On December 1st, when the Supreme Court hears the Mississippi case, **they are not hearing it because they want to rubber stamp Roe v. Wade. They are hearing it because they are either going to overturn Roe v. Wade or significantly scale it back** ,"__Gansler told MarylandReporter.com._ **_" So who we elect as our next governor is going to have a major impact on women's reproductive rights in Maryland because it will get kicked back to the states," Gansler added._** _[...] "It is not clear whether this will be a situation of ongoing death by a thousand cuts, reducing access to abortion incrementally until the right essentially disappears, or whether the Court will eliminate the right altogether," Michele Gilman, a professor at the University of Baltimore School of Law, said. "**Either way, the result will be harmful for women** , particularly low-income women who struggle the most to effectuate their rights even under the current legal landscape." [...]_
---
**[If you agree with Doug and think reproductive rights are worth fighting for, please share his post on Twitter or Facebook.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDPAZiEt8wwS6hp5wOIb3CiJKYp5ppLVwQFYuOLTkk_1PmWxxTj45cAu0es5k8xP1Iulnl0iln5_OcaoGh0veBZ3p71ucGEKx0qQnmC141vBG6dtMu5YK6AeGLwNbht5erCUV1UAtY0AIltio-srL6_1QqCCzPDhFVtIElC0qrDSjTg1MQY_Vro8JBuAl0XYVWgW5dPqXF2EtcKLcbfb-OZxN030OYfA9c7Wzryrovh_I9JCQA7aFdHgFNNM0HsFMzlwD9LmWg1kEFC7EUXPAEoHg0QKHzDDjThBxc82w3L74/3hh/hM1-90H4SXyBl7Ic_dhfkA/h3/wNY6giWlLg9NXTNHsZf-XZUXYFo3hAMkM-vqkhBtsmc)**
---
| [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhlhvYlzlcGeKI0osoL0os7kn2j3DZXAvIqSd5Yqpd_W79ErqSkFC8b1wJkU9VZ45u2vwZxXB-47dN5PJZXUGAtiZZkVPDpHXsTaJwLrCDXQI9LoqcKcqqMD_Y5GCT03D_TyEpZm2SeXzbq6d58DqPeaimu6HFvK1SB2UM786tPgTKu8oduc7cOUMBNJyUJROZf7W4oXQuP0OqgZfFDtZvZ7dLWvMToq-5BbqAnjncYGJ8mpFfkbHKjTvwsXdgl2THWauXd-Z3P61unHHDZ8djU3T7c8S0PephNnfVJuM5Ovr/3hh/hM1-90H4SXyBl7Ic_dhfkA/h4/laBXmDtd0LOleE5A3D-oEMCRrbSXPoX0hTK87FTUTps)
---
[ **SHARE ON FACEBOOK**
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDPAZiEt8wwS6hp5wOIb3CiJKYp5ppLVwQFYuOLTkk_1PmWxxTj45cAu0es5k8xP1Iulnl0iln5_OcaoGh0veBZ0Us1CzL_H8WlXtTV4Fz8LygSV_3W0sDfhYpC-1ZERNACmY51CWsTo-A9pv2v_bls1mgum_wyAiSHzDozgnrctgHZ98FRSY7tXxwzmqdwm4L3i2xWjBaTVBVI-2GaMqRkxJWU8Yjhv6zUqBbupOZjj0Z5PuLgJH2jM6oXqy6SFiyLl5RIWGdLQW66dRy1iiVpZ2RC3i-fEHWeisxVy1wA1X/3hh/hM1-90H4SXyBl7Ic_dhfkA/h5/_7Jo3k9A1IuwTT3Gzqpe7HO39arxNtNZBSO_OCa6Xnk)
---
[ **SHARE ON TWITTER**
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhlhvYlzlcGeKI0osoL0os7kn2j3DZXAvIqSd5Yqpd_W79ErqSkFC8b1wJkU9VZ45u2vwZxXB-47dN5PJZXUGAtgBxJ3mz3cCBI9i11VLrI-wxDoVfJJC4nKQOj9NMe69HUyHMIorav9RuLb4OjVCxLjX6lmrhKXghKjxfbV8HsIaLhEHQWoDidOSJ4EP-4OGsOmzhO0nFm2Mi5nRqcldRVx6ZUf7Lxj9pZ_yBh7xL6GEsbJhI2iNcbDSFl2Cmlt-5PFagTCxL4ItfF5cuxvs-4v9NahIUr2eirAP_qQmb6OS/3hh/hM1-90H4SXyBl7Ic_dhfkA/h6/94wIps1L6E6jeadbpYlSppzuagtcneOfHasaA-eH_BA)
---
It's critical that Maryland has a fierce fighter for reproductive rights in the Governor's office, as the governor appoints the judges in our state. Furthermore, the governor hires and promotes countless public servants who shape and enforce Maryland's laws. With reproductive rights being stripped and attacked all across the country, we can't risk experimenting with unproven candidates who might not fight as hard for us and with us as Doug will. Doug has a proven record as Attorney General of fighting for Marylanders' reproductive freedom and has a command of the legal system that is unmatched in this race. **If you care about reproductive rights, join our campaign and help us elect a Governor who will stand with women and all Marylanders in this continued fight. **
---
Thanks, Katie Baker _Team Gansler_
---

Wade with Bryan Renbaum of the , and I wanted to be sure you saw highlights from the resulting article below. | Gansler: SCOTUS Likely To Chip Away At Reproductive Rights in Mississippi Case [ ...] Former state attorney general and Democratic gubernatorial candidate Doug Gansler predicted that the U.S. Supreme Court will likely weaken or possibly even eliminate federal abortion rights when it renders a decision in a high-profile case challenging the 1973 landmark Roe. v. Wade decision. On Wednesday, the 6-3 conservative-leaning court is scheduled to hear oral arguments in a case brought by Mississippi. The first real challenge to Roe comes as numerous other states, including Texas and Oklahoma, have recently enacted laws that limit access to abortion. [...] "On December 1st, when the Supreme Court hears the Mississippi case, they are not hearing it because they want to rubber stamp Roe v. Wade. They are hearing it because they are either going to overturn Roe v. Wade or significantly scale it back ,"Gansler told MarylandReporter.com. " So who we elect as our next governor is going to have a major impact on women's reproductive rights in Maryland because it will get kicked back to the states," Gansler added. [...] "It is not clear whether this will be a situation of ongoing death by a thousand cuts, reducing access to abortion incrementally until the right essentially disappears, or whether the Court will eliminate the right altogether," Michele Gilman, a professor at the University of Baltimore School of Law, said. "Either way, the result will be harmful for women , particularly low-income women who struggle the most to effectuate their rights even under the current legal landscape." [...] | It's critical that Maryland has a fierce fighter for reproductive rights in the Governor's office, as the governor appoints the judges in our state. Furthermore, the governor hires and promotes countless public servants who shape and enforce Maryland's laws. With reproductive rights being stripped and attacked all across the country, we can't risk experimenting with unproven candidates who might not fight as hard for us and with us as Doug will. Doug has a proven record as Attorney General of fighting for Marylanders' reproductive freedom and has a command of the legal system that is unmatched in this race. If you care about reproductive rights, join our campaign and help us elect a Governor who will stand with women and all Marylanders in this continued fight. Thanks, Katie Baker Team Gansler By Authority: Friends of Doug Gansler, Terry Denney, Treasurer; Ana Sol Gutierrez, Chair. Friends of Doug Gansler P.O. Box 31102 Bethesda, MD 20824 United States | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Friends of Doug Gansler, please .

name: Morgan Harper
subject: Roe v Wade itself is before the Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
The Supreme Court is hearing arguments that could overturn Roe v Wade today
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20211201-431-footer-ak&t=2&akid=431%2E90090%2EeMkpSh)
Today, the Supreme Court is hearing arguments in Dobbs v Jackson Women’s Health Organization, a legal case that directly challenges the constitutional right to an abortion.
This case could have catastrophic effects for the right to choose across our country. Not only could the Supreme Court allow Mississippi to ban nearly all abortions beyond 15 weeks, **but the state has also asked the Court to _overturn Roe itself._**
If this conservative Supreme Court is so determined to legislate from their supposedly impartial position, we have to make sure we have legislators who are willing to fight back. **I'm the only candidate in this race with a 100% pro-choice record — something my opponent Tim Ryan can’t say.**
**[We need to send a bold, progressive champion for the right to choose to the Senate from Ohio. If you agree, rush $5 so we can fight back against this attack on our rights today.](https://act.morganharper.org/go/16545?t=3&akid=431%2E90090%2EeMkpSh)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/16551?refcode=em20211201-431&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=431%2E90090%2EeMkpSh)**
**Rep. Tim Ryan, who has voted 72% of the time against a woman’s right to choose** , can’t be trusted to enact federal changes to protect our constitutional right. We can’t keep relying on career politicians who vote for corporate interests, not their deeply held values.
I’m proud to have stood side by side with organizers and advocates fighting for our right to choose, and I’ll continue to do so in Washington with your help. **[Please, rush a contribution of whatever makes sense for you so we can fight back and elect a 100% pro-choice Senator in 2022.](https://act.morganharper.org/go/16545?t=23&akid=431%2E90090%2EeMkpSh)**
In solidarity,
Morgan Harper
[****](https://act.morganharper.org/go/16545?t=24&akid=431%2E90090%2EeMkpSh)
Morgan Harper for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20211201-431-footer&t=25&refcode2=431_90090_eMkpSh&akid=431%2E90090%2EeMkpSh)**

Email us: contact@morganharper.org

name: Val Demings
subject: Friend, I am grateful for your support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
Together, we will defeat Marco Rubio, win better leadership for Florida and defend our Democratic Senate majority.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39250304/318990143/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1812-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYmUwNzIzYS0wNDUzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HpVyGZolHqGLhaEeeU3wB8QYTWYCa71KIsrCUx1RegA=)
---
I am incredibly grateful to you, friend, and this entire grassroots team. After I shared that I narrowly missed my important End of Month goal, grassroots supporters stepped up to close the fundraising gap and keep my campaign on track.
**Together, I know we will defeat Marco Rubio, flip Florida blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority.**
Throughout my career in public service, I've witnessed unending bravery, strength and resolve – fueling my belief in the power of people to come together and drive real change. **That's exactly what I know this team is capable of, and why I continue to call on you. I'm truly grateful you step up whenever I do.**

This will not be easy. Florida Senate margins are always slim, and Republicans already have practically limitless resources to attack us with. But I have faith in this campaign, friend, because of supporters like you. Let's keep it up, from now all the way to Election Day.
Thank you again.

Congresswoman Val Demings

clean_body: Together, we will defeat Marco Rubio, win better leadership for Florida and defend our Democratic Senate majority. | | | = I am incredibly grateful to you, friend, and this entire grassroots team. After I shared that I narrowly missed my important End of Month goal, grassroots supporters stepped up to close the fundraising gap and keep my campaign on track. Together, I know we will defeat Marco Rubio, flip Florida blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority. Throughout my career in public service, I've witnessed unending bravery, strength and resolve – fueling my belief in the power of people to come together and drive real change. That's exactly what I know this team is capable of, and why I continue to call on you. I'm truly grateful you step up whenever I do. This will not be easy. Florida Senate margins are always slim, and Republicans already have practically limitless resources to attack us with. But I have faith in this campaign, friend, because of supporters like you. Let's keep it up, from now all the way to Election Day. Thank you again. Congresswoman Val Demings | | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. body:

Friend, **Mississippi’s Attorney General just defended the state’s “abortion ban” in front of the U.S. Supreme Court — asking the justices to overturn _Roe v. Wade_.** Mississippi’s leaders know that their ban is unconstitutional. They’ve admitted they’re only doing this because we have new justices who they believe will stand with them to overturn 48 years of legal precedent. I refuse to stand by as politicians try to control our reproductive freedom, and that’s one of many reasons I’m running for office. I believe that everyone deserves the freedom to make their own decisions about their reproductive health — including the decision to have an abortion. **My opponent, Elise Stefanik, voted _for_ a 20-week abortion ban, _against_ a health of the mother exemption, and over the past few years has raised over a million dollars to _support anti-choice candidates across the country._** [**If the Supreme Court won’t protect our reproductive rights, then we have to do it ourselves. Will you sign my petition demanding that Congress make Roe v. Wade the law of the land?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39250322/318991163/-1714857540?refcode=fl_email_pet_2021201mississippi_bf_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTU5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGNkZTNjZi0wNDUzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=41kHI-GDpg-7IHKSibRJQDgCITf5NEeAN19IAKzdNB0=&emci=4d920af7-eb52-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&emdi=98cde3cf-0453-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&ceid=15140248) | [PROTECT ROE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39250323/318991191/-1714857540?refcode=fl_email_pet_2021201mississippi_bf_full_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTU5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGNkZTNjZi0wNDUzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=41kHI-GDpg-7IHKSibRJQDgCITf5NEeAN19IAKzdNB0=&emci=4d920af7-eb52-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&emdi=98cde3cf-0453-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&ceid=15140248)

We can elect a real progressive to the Governor’s office — but only if we organize together. [_**Read her note below, then chip in right away to help power our campaign to victory.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39250484/318995985/1699647371?refcode=em_20211201_f_t_baker2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjEwMjIwNS0wNzUzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=92cHfULhUr6ZismZJjM-bCXcwBKkoYZP8qpSvXsStjU=) Thanks, Team Sonia \---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Sonia Chang-Díaz
Date: Wed, Dec 1, 2021
Subject: Governor Baker is out Team, Today, Governor Baker announced he is not running for reelection in Massachusetts. [_**We have a real chance to turn the page on the status quo, but we have no time to waste: can you chip into our campaign right away?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39250487/318996017/676662639?refcode=em_20211201_f_t_baker2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjEwMjIwNS0wNzUzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=92cHfULhUr6ZismZJjM-bCXcwBKkoYZP8qpSvXsStjU=) It’s clear: The people of Massachusetts are ready for a new chapter with new leadership. For far too long, people in power have asked working families to wait for change — despite a growing affordable housing crisis, inaccessible and expensive child and health care, the existential threat of climate change, and long-standing racial injustice. Our next Governor must be someone willing to take on challenges even when they’re hard — who recognizes the urgency of this moment, who tackles these issues with the courage to solve them, and who has a record of winning bold, systemic change on Beacon Hill. I’m proud to be building a grassroots movement with all of you, across age, class, and faith to put power back in the hands of the people and to elect a governor who's not afraid to fight for our values. [_**But it’s going to take all of us working together. Chip in to our campaign today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39250489/318996020/676662639?refcode=em_20211201_f_t_baker2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjEwMjIwNS0wNzUzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=92cHfULhUr6ZismZJjM-bCXcwBKkoYZP8qpSvXsStjU=) Saludos, Sonia

clean_body: With Governor Baker officially out of the race in Massachusetts, we have to act now. | | | | | Team, Did you see Sonia’s message earlier today? With Governor Baker officially out of the race in Massachusetts, we have to act now. We can elect a real progressive to the Governor’s office — but only if we organize together. = Thanks, Team Sonia \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Sonia Chang-Díaz Date: Wed, Dec 1, 2021 Subject: Governor Baker is out Team, Today, Governor Baker announced he is not running for reelection in Massachusetts. = It’s clear: The people of Massachusetts are ready for a new chapter with new leadership. For far too long, people in power have asked working families to wait for change — despite a growing affordable housing crisis, inaccessible and expensive child and health care, the existential threat of climate change, and long-standing racial injustice. Our next Governor must be someone willing to take on challenges even when they’re hard — who recognizes the urgency of this moment, who tackles these issues with the courage to solve them, and who has a record of winning bold, systemic change on Beacon Hill. I’m proud to be building a grassroots movement with all of you, across age, class, and faith to put power back in the hands of the people and to elect a governor who's not afraid to fight for our values. = Saludos, Sonia | | | | | = | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | ---|---|---|--- | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you believe you received this email in error or wish to no longer receive emails from us, . | Paid for by the Committee to Elect Sonia Chang-Díaz

# _Join Us Saturday!_
The Cleveland “Guardians” have mandated the COVID vaccine for all employees. We are calling on all Patriots and defenders of medical freedom to join us at Progressive Field on December 4th at 11 a.m.

We must stand up for our workers and send a message to the Dolans that we will not tolerate unconstitutional mandates or healthcare discrimination. Bring your signs, flags and Chief Wahoo gear!

subject: SCOTUS could overturn Roe v. Wade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ehasz for Congress
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39250567/318999107/-46617290?ref=fl_em_pt_20211201RoevWade_ae_active_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmEyYmRiMS0wODUzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8zRGKzPJCLc-U70o0lYyVmBWNJdgJ_f3mDn8EgNhWgQ=)
---
Friend, [Reproductive choice is under attack right now. Sign my petition demanding the Senate protect it ASAP!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39250568/318999135/1461903657?ref=fl_em_pt_20211201RoevWade_ae_active_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmEyYmRiMS0wODUzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8zRGKzPJCLc-U70o0lYyVmBWNJdgJ_f3mDn8EgNhWgQ=&emci=820fb7ab-0853-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&emdi=92a2bdb1-0853-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&ceid=5643323) **Today, the Supreme Court began hearing a new case against reproductive choice that will determine whether or not Mississippi’s 15-week abortion ban is legal, and it could mean the end of _Roe v. Wade_ as we know it.** Thanks to Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell, the Supreme Court currently has a 6-3 conservative majority, and Justices Brett Kavanaugh, Neil Gorsuch, and Amy Coney Barrett have already signaled they’re open to more restrictions on choice. During oral arguments, Kavanaugh suggested the court should potentially be neutral on the issue, which would mean overturning _Roe v. Wade_ , and Barrett wondered why pregnant women who don’t want to raise a child can’t just opt for adoption, which completely ignores the legitimate dangers, trauma, and costs of childbirth. There’s no other way for me to say it: **This is bullshit** , team. Conservatives want to roll back the clock on reproductive rights, potentially leaving people like you and me with less freedom than the women who came before us. It’s absolutely backwards. **But Congress can stop this.** Last September, the Democratic House majority passed a law to codify _Roe v. Wade_ into federal law — _which my opponent Rep. Brian Fitzpatrick opposed_ — defending every person’s right to choice. We just need the Senate to pass it for it to become law. [**Let’s urge our Senators to take urgent action to defend choice by passing the Women’s Health Protection Act ASAP! Add your name to my petition now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39250569/318999163/1461903657?ref=fl_em_pt_20211201RoevWade_ae_active_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmEyYmRiMS0wODUzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8zRGKzPJCLc-U70o0lYyVmBWNJdgJ_f3mDn8EgNhWgQ=&emci=820fb7ab-0853-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&emdi=92a2bdb1-0853-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&ceid=5643323) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39250570/318999164/1461903657?ref=fl_em_pt_20211201RoevWade_ae_active_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmEyYmRiMS0wODUzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8zRGKzPJCLc-U70o0lYyVmBWNJdgJ_f3mDn8EgNhWgQ=&emci=820fb7ab-0853-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&emdi=92a2bdb1-0853-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&ceid=5643323)
---
I hope you’ll join me in taking action and raising your voice in defense of our reproductive freedom before it’s too late.
— Ashley

| Ashley Ehasz is a U.S. Army veteran, Apache helicopter pilot, and Democrat running to unseat Republican Brian Fitzpatrick and represent Pennsylvania’s 1st Congressional District: to provide our communities with the services and opportunities they need to thrive, to create positive change, and to ensure the next generation will have a better future ahead of them.

name: Young Kim
subject: A humble appeal 🙏
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Young Kim for Congress

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39250616/319001388/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGRhOTY4OC0wOTUzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hfp_e6x4Osy2f_3xpC7Gmlz_9l4mTKzVaQJQF4c0Mdw=&emci=c5bcf7b2-fa52-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&emdi=18da9688-0953-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&ceid=9494239)
---

| | Today, the Supreme Court heard arguments on the Mississippi law which bans abortions after 15 weeks of pregnancy. This case is right-wing activists' most egregious attempt yet to gut Roe v. Wade. **And we cannot let them get away with it.** [Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39250617/319001396/1596212816?refcode=2021-12-01-scotus&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=18da9688-0953-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGRhOTY4OC0wOTUzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hfp_e6x4Osy2f_3xpC7Gmlz_9l4mTKzVaQJQF4c0Mdw=) For nearly five decades, Republican politicians have attacked a woman's right to choose, carefully at first, and more aggressively in recent years. Then Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell installed not one, but three anti-abortion Justices to the Supreme Court. Now these right-wing activists believe their day has come. And frankly, I am not encouraged by the discourse in the court today. They seem poised to overturn _Roe v. Wade_. **We cannot stop fighting for reproductive freedom.** The House has acted, passing a federal law guaranteeing access to abortion in all 50 states. And the Senate must follow suit. But here is what we know: Whatever we do, if we do not retain the House and Senate in the 2022 elections, Republican extremists will turn the clock back. clean_body: | | | Today, the Supreme Court heard arguments on the Mississippi law which bans abortions after 15 weeks of pregnancy. This case is right-wing activists' most egregious attempt yet to gut Roe v. Wade. And we cannot let them get away with it. = For nearly five decades, Republican politicians have attacked a woman's right to choose, carefully at first, and more aggressively in recent years. Then Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell installed not one, but three anti-abortion Justices to the Supreme Court. Now these right-wing activists believe their day has come. And frankly, I am not encouraged by the discourse in the court today. They seem poised to overturn Roe v. Wade. We cannot stop fighting for reproductive freedom. The House has acted, passing a federal law guaranteeing access to abortion in all 50 states. And the Senate must follow suit. But here is what we know: Whatever we do, if we do not retain the House and Senate in the 2022 elections, Republican extremists will turn the clock back. = Women's rights are human rights. And I am here to fight. | | | |
