| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001A3Lu49wbaQYQkWiRN4WPyghROBeX8FrzxL10NiANLvnP_oUz9VcQ5WtquGWzF5GWaAjjjsTgdOaXHFjNMlvJJSOJgcAJOmCyIARkHkat2cYxuHKBHroSCVQa65HOmZZqItbT6jUmMyJGOa_CJYiVMsfguf-Rex_gorIBbWPUmBNMWM3DCZ-dW2gTo1dlF70x&c=-VQz4hjMOEYggwumuh-XEDCvZ0ZqPFLt6FNsrbbThK-752wTHN0J8A==&ch=0XrktuVK2uQHq0glnoZ1i__k5vxazLxw_XQBCGgR8EhmhDtNcCZZNQ==)

Dear Friend,
Have you seen the latest radical idea being pushed in New York City?
Far-left Democrats in the City Council are ramming through a bill that would give 800,000 NON-CITIZENS the right to vote.
They are covering up this anti-democratic initiative by calling non-citizens "municipal voters."
This INSANE policy would undermine our election security, devalue our civic duties, and dilute our right to vote.
[We need to stop this RADICAL proposal from going statewide! ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001A3Lu49wbaQYQkWiRN4WPyghROBeX8FrzxL10NiANLvnP_oUz9VcQ5WtquGWzF5GWaAjjjsTgdOaXHFjNMlvJJSOJgcAJOmCyIARkHkat2cYxuHKBHroSCVQa65HOmZZqItbT6jUmMyJGOa_CJYiVMsfguf-Rex_gorIBbWPUmBNMWM3DCZ-dW2gTo1dlF70x&c=-VQz4hjMOEYggwumuh-XEDCvZ0ZqPFLt6FNsrbbThK-752wTHN0J8A==&ch=0XrktuVK2uQHq0glnoZ1i__k5vxazLxw_XQBCGgR8EhmhDtNcCZZNQ==)

name: Republican Whip Steve Scalise
subject: miserable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
President Trump would be so, so disappointed.
Hey Peter -- I woke up to some miserable news today...
We just came up a few contributions short of my End-of-Month goal. If you're wondering why I'm so disappointed, know this: **it was the first test of our strength and determination since finding out Democrats outraised us by over two million bucks...**

name: Abby for Iowa Finance Update
subject: re: public FEC fundraising report
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
Hi Peter, we have news about Abby's campaign to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA): We hit our November fundraising goal. For all of you who chipped in, thank you so much for your support.

But we have a very important update: At the end of this month, we will have to publicly report our fundraising numbers to the FEC for the fourth and final quarter of the year. It will be a major test of the strength of our campaign – particularly since the Senate GOP campaign arm is already sitting on nearly $30 million in the bank, and they’re actively attacking Abby. The political pundits and national Republicans will be watching closely to see what this team is capable of.
That’s why hitting November’s fundraising goal – and every single grassroots goal we set – was so important. Every single dollar matters immensely in this Senate race, which the Des Moines Register has called a “marquee matchup.” So we already have a challenge: To stay on track with where we need to be before the most important FEC deadline of the year, we need another 150 grassroots contributions before midnight tonight.
**We know we ask a lot of you,**{**{FirstName or 'friend'}}, but it’s because the momentum is on our side. Recent polling numbers show Sen. Grassley is at his lowest approval rating in decades, and expert pollster J. Ann Selzer has said he’s weak.[Going toe to toe with Sen. Grassley, and his backers Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump, will take a massive surge in grassroots support. So please, to stay on track ahead of our FEC deadline, can Abby count on your donation of $5 – or whatever you can spare – to win in Iowa and protect our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39250890/319007541/-926345391?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk435-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTdlZTZlNy0wYjUzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0pWRmmt46mkKzJeUaH1CccePEbgxXpzj6tX3mk0ysNM=)**

name: Jana and Larry Long, Greg Abbott Supporters
subject: Our first ever offer: DOUBLE MATCHING all gifts
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEXANS FOR GREG ABBOTT
body:
As proud Greg Abbott supporters, we’re so excited to announce that we’ve decided to match ALL CONTRIBUTIONS in SUPPORT of our Republican Governor.
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?2zbuj--fgxr-4qqlpo2&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

| | Dear Fellow Conservative,

As proud Greg Abbott supporters, we’re so excited to announce that _**we’ve decided to match ALL CONTRIBUTIONS in SUPPORT of our Republican Governor.**_

Governor Greg Abbott is a PROUD conservative who always fights for the people of Texas. He’s CONTINUING to fight to secure the border in the wake of Joe Biden’s absence, create jobs across the state, defend the 2nd Amendment, and protect our law enforcement.

Now, in the wake of liberal Beto O’Rourke’s run for Governor, support is needed now more than ever, **[and that’s why we’ve decided to DOUBLE MATCH all contributions.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2zbuj-1nd4l-4qqlpo7/ "and that’s why we’ve decided to DOUBLE MATCH all contributions.")**

Fellow Conservative, like us, we know that you’re a strong conservative, _**[which is why we wanted to reach out to you FIRST today in order to offer you the chance to get your contribution to Governor Greg Abbott DOUBLE MATCHED.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2zbuj-1nd4m-4qqlpo8/ "which is why we wanted to reach out to you FIRST today in order to offer you the chance to get your contribution to Governor Greg Abbott DOUBLE MATCHED.")**_
**[EVERY DONATION MADE WILL BE DOUBLE MATCHED!](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2zbuj-1nd4n-4qqlpo9/ "EVERY DONATION MADE WILL BE DOUBLE MATCHED!")**

**[***TAKE ADVANTAGE OF THIS OFFER ASAP***](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2zbuj-1nd4o-4qqlpo0/ "***TAKE ADVANTAGE OF THIS OFFER ASAP***")

[GIVE $1,000>>>2X MATCHED TO $2,000](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2zbuj-1nd4p-4qqlpo1/ "GIVE $1,000>>>2X MATCHED TO $2,000")
[GIVE $500>>>2X MATCHED TO $1,000](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2zbuj-1nd4q-4qqlpo2/ "GIVE $500>>>2X MATCHED TO $1,000")
[GIVE $250>>>2X MATCHED TO $500](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2zbuj-1nd4r-4qqlpo3/ "GIVE $250>>>2X MATCHED TO $500")
[GIVE $100>>>2X MATCHED TO $200](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2zbuj-1nd4s-4qqlpo4/ "GIVE $100>>>2X MATCHED TO $200")
[GIVE $50>>>2X MATCHED TO $100](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2zbuj-1nd4t-4qqlpo5/ "GIVE $50>>>2X MATCHED TO $100")
[GIVE $25>>>2X MATCHED TO $50](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2zbuj-1nd4u-4qqlpo6/ "GIVE $25>>>2X MATCHED TO $50")**
This is the first time we’ve ever matched funds, Fellow Conservative, but it’s because we know just how critical this election is that we were forced to take this unprecedented action.

We couldn’t just sit by and let Beto O’Rourke buy his way to victory, _**[which is why we’re DOUBLE MATCHING all contributions.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2zbuj-1nd4v-4qqlpo7/ "which is why we’re DOUBLE MATCHING all contributions.")**_

Thank you so much for your support, Fellow Conservative. We’re so grateful for everything you’re doing to re-elect Governor Greg Abbott.

Jana and Larry Long
---
| | |

---
|

---
* * *
---
| | | | [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2zbuj-1nd4w-4qqlpo8/ "Beto Footer")

| | | _*****BREAKING NEWS: BETO O’ROURKE IS RUNNING FOR GOVERNOR OF TEXAS*****_

Fellow Conservative, BETO IS OFFICIALLY RUNNING to defeat Governor Abbott and RUIN Texas with his dangerous, far-left policies. He’s ready to SHATTER fundraising records as he works to turn Texas into the next California or New York.

**[Governor Greg Abbott needs the help of EVERY conservative reading this to STOP Beto and PROTECT the Lone Star State from his liberal agenda>>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2zbuj-1nd4x-4qqlpo9/ "Governor Greg Abbott needs the help of EVERY conservative reading this to STOP Beto and PROTECT the Lone Star State from his liberal agenda>>>")**

name: Tom Brejcha
subject: 9 felonies for exposing Planned Parenthood
body:
I'm writing this letter to you today because, quite frankly, David Daleiden cannot. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6520%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=gbh%2bHx9yv%2fVy0xs7UzEC2g&sysid=1)
Dear Friend, I'm writing this letter to you today because, quite frankly, David Daleiden cannot. You may remember David as the undercover journalist who spent 30 months investigating and capturing video evidence of Planned Parenthood 's top leadership --- medical directors, national program directors, even its Senior Director of Medical Services -- **callously negotiating the harvesting and sale of aborted baby body parts.** **And now, he’s been charged with nine bogus felonies.** **[Which is why I’m asking you to make an emergency donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND right away.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67331%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5%2byyEnLohDnTqH7fwishLQ&sysid=1)** You see, after David released the shocking videos of the illegal and disgusting actions of abortion executives, Kamala Harris, then California's Attorney General, colluded with Planned Parenthood to file felony charges against David... _**... Kamala Harris even ordered the California Department of Justice to raid David's home and confiscate his unpublished videos.**_ I won't sugarcoat it. If not cleared of these charges, David faces steep fines and years in state penitentiary and the consequences of being a convicted felon. While Kamala Harris --- a bought-and-paid-for ally of the abortion industry --- is sitting one heartbeat away from the presidency. That's the bad news. But here's the good news... David is fighting back. In fact, he's taking another opportunity to drag more of Planned Parenthood's dark criminality into the spotlight with two new federal lawsuits. That's right. The Thomas More Society has filed a federal civil rights lawsuit in California on behalf of David against former California Attorney General and now VicePresident Kamala Harris for prosecuting David in bad faith, twisting and perverting California's anti-eavesdropping law to persecute a citizen journalist because of his political views. Then the Thomas More Society filed a defamation (libel) lawsuit in federal court in New York against Planned Parenthood, which said David created a "fake" and "false" "smear campaign" against Planned Parenthood. In other words, the best defense is a good offense. The truth is we could no longer let David suffer such a trampling of his free speech and due process rights without a counterattack. The timing couldn't be more important. This is a critical opportunity to put Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and the rest of the abortion industry on trial for conspiring to silence David in order to cover-up their illegal activities. **[That's where your emergency donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND comes in --- by giving today you can stand with David in his hour of need.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67332%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UdFk9zSgNhAP%2f6uh8hyLbg&sysid=1)** The reality is. . . You couldn't be there when David entered the dark underbelly of the abortion industry --- sitting across the table from abortionists haggling over the price of baby body parts with cold-blooded clarity... "I want a Lamborghini." You couldn't be there as David saw with his own eyes the preborn children who had been killed with great precision and delicacy to preserve their organs for maximum profit. You couldn't be there when the videos were released and Kamala Harris and Planned Parenthood conspired to crush David with trumped up legal charges and an armed raid on his home in which they seized laptops, hard-drives, and recording equipment. And you couldn't be there with David (our criminal defense team was there) when he voluntarily appeared in both Texas and California for booking and processing --- fingerprinted and photographed for a mugshot like a common criminal. But, now, this is the reality... there is something you can do. **[You can make an emergency donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND to help vindicate this pro-life hero.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67333%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BehKBZpg0WLKS4uWJUXcPQ&sysid=1)** My name is Tom Brejcha. I'm the president and chief counsel of the Thomas More Society --- a not-for-profit law firm underwriting and helping to spearhead David's criminal defense. The Thomas More Society is proud to have defended many renowned pro-life and religious leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe, Ann, and Eric Scheidler, the Pro-Life Action League, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, David Bereit, Lila Rose and Live Action, Students for Life, Sidewalk Advocates for Life, Created Equal, former Kansas Attorney General Phill Kline, the March for Life, and many more. Because when dark forces like Planned Parenthood unleash their full might to legally, financially, and personally destroy our clients --- **we fight back.** I have to tell you, despite all that David is facing, his spirits remain high. Of course, I've never known anyone in this kind of position who didn't feel an empty pit in his stomach. But David's not giving up. His willingness to fight back is a true profile in Pro-Life courage. Now I'll get right down to it... **We anticipate David's legal defense will cost us more than $6 million. That's right, SIX MILLION DOLLARS.** In addition to the criminal case and the new federal civil rights and defamation lawsuits, we're currently representing David in THREE other cases.

Recently, we posted a $700,000 appeal bond to keep Planned Parenthood’s nasty collection agents from harassing him with collection agents and even seizing his belongings. We’re fighting back, but we’ll need your help.

And now, in light of the Planned Parenthood civil lawsuit, NAF has moved for summary judgment - they want a ruling against David without a trial at all!

And now, he’s been charged with nine bogus felonies. You see, after David released the shocking videos of the illegal and disgusting actions of abortion executives, Kamala Harris, then California's Attorney General, colluded with Planned Parenthood to file felony charges against David... ... Kamala Harris even ordered the California Department of Justice to raid David's home and confiscate his unpublished videos. I won't sugarcoat it. If not cleared of these charges, David faces steep fines and years in state penitentiary and the consequences of being a convicted felon. While Kamala Harris --- a bought-and-paid-for ally of the abortion industry --- is sitting one heartbeat away from the presidency. That's the bad news. But here's the good news... Folks, we're only a week away from two big Albuquerque City Council runoff elections that could decide whether Democrats hold the majority. **[Before I ask you to chip in to support local politics](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39251063/319011403/1069535921?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20211201_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGFhZDQ2ZS0wZTUzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rti8frbP6YtRSiT7cGDNWVEjaI03ZBJscxd9Mggg_E8=)** , I want to share why these races are so important: All politics is local. I learned that firsthand when I was on the Albuquerque City Council almost 20 years ago. Tammy will always look out for Albuquerque's key priorities, from climate change and public safety, to supporting small businesses. Rob will put a real focus on crime prevention, take a continuum-of-care approach to ending homelessness, and deliver on opportunities to support small businesses. These are tough races. subject: It’s in His hands now
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRONTLINE POLICY
body:
[](https://a.crowdskout.com/v1-1/email-click/aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9mcm9udGxpbmUtcG9saWN5L21tX2VibGFzdF9oZl9kb2Jic3JlbWluZGVyXzExMjQyMQ?b=eyJjc0lkIjo5OTE3MDM3MTEsImNsaWVudElkIjozMzgyLCJvcmdhbml6YXRpb25JZCI6IjIxODUyOTIiLCJzb3VyY2VJZCI6IjI4NzU3IiwiZW1haWxpbmdJZCI6bnVsbCwidjJFbWFpbGluZ0lkIjoxMTY4NSwiZnJvbSI6ImNhNmIyNjdmLThiNzYtNDA0OC04NjY1LTI3ZmI2OTZiNDUzYyJ9) | |

|
---
Friend,

The arguments have been made and the rallies have been had. The Supreme Court heard oral arguments today in the _Dobbs_ case – a direct plea to overturn the unconstitutional and tyrannical _Roe_ decision.

Today, we held a Prayer Rally in Woodstock and had numerous “watch parties” of the event around the state. Up in DC, allies from other state organizations – fellow family policy councils with a connection and history with Focus on the Family – joined national allies like Alliance Defending Freedom and Susan B. Anthony List in front of the Supreme Court to rally for the cause of life. In fact, members of our team are now in DC strategizing for the Post-Roe world we believe the _Dobbs_ decision will create.

This moment could not be bigger. Millions upon millions of lives have been lost. Innocent lives. Lives made in His image. Lives that have value. Lives that the Lord grieves over being taken.

For pro-lifers and faithful followers of Jesus, this is what our hearts have prayed for – an end of _Roe_. There is a human urgency that comes with that and an anxiousness.

Yet, in God’s wisdom, we will enter a waiting period. We will be helpless – with nothing tangible or in the realm of “earthly strategy” that we can do to affect the outcome of the decision. In His wisdom, He has laid a path forward that inherently reminds us that what happens next is solely in His hands.

Trust God.

Lean on Him.

Beseech Him to show us mercy – a mercy that we, as an unfaithful nation, frankly, do not deserve.

Pray.

In the meantime, as God calls us to lean on Him for the decision, He also calls us to prepare.

At Frontline, we are the team that led the charge for Georgia’s Heartbeat Law – which in many ways set the stage for where we are now. It was us that worked alongside Governor Kemp and Rep. Setzler to make this happen. And, it is on us – the state’s premier force for life at the Capitol, at the ballot box, and in our culture – to lead the strategy moving forward.

We will prepare. We will be ready. And, while trusting Him, we will do all we can to save His craftsmanship!

clean_body: | | | Friend, The arguments have been made and the rallies have been had. The Supreme Court heard oral arguments today in the Dobbs case – a direct plea to overturn the unconstitutional and tyrannical Roe decision. Today, we held a Prayer Rally in Woodstock and had numerous “watch parties” of the event around the state. Up in DC, allies from other state organizations – fellow family policy councils with a connection and history with Focus on the Family – joined national allies like Alliance Defending Freedom and Susan B. Anthony List in front of the Supreme Court to rally for the cause of life. In fact, members of our team are now in DC strategizing for the Post-Roe world we believe the Dobbs decision will create. This moment could not be bigger. Millions upon millions of lives have been lost. Innocent lives. Lives made in His image. Lives that have value. Lives that the Lord grieves over being taken. For pro-lifers and faithful followers of Jesus, this is what our hearts have prayed for – an end of Roe. There is a human urgency that comes with that and an anxiousness. Yet, in God’s wisdom, we will enter a waiting period. We will be helpless – with nothing tangible or in the realm of “earthly strategy” that we can do to affect the outcome of the decision. In His wisdom, He has laid a path forward that inherently reminds us that what happens next is solely in His hands. Trust God. Lean on Him. Beseech Him to show us mercy – a mercy that we, as an unfaithful nation, frankly, do not deserve. Pray. In the meantime, as God calls us to lean on Him for the decision, He also calls us to prepare. At Frontline, we are the team that led the charge for Georgia’s Heartbeat Law – which in many ways set the stage for where we are now. It was us that worked alongside Governor Kemp and Rep. Setzler to make this happen. And, it is on us – the state’s premier force for life at the Capitol, at the ballot box, and in our culture – to lead the strategy moving forward. We will prepare. We will be ready. And, while trusting Him, we will do all we can to save His craftsmanship! For Life, Cole Muzio President Frontline Policy Action | | | | | ---|--- | PAID FOR BY FRONTLINE POLICY

First: we do not care if the subject line of this email offends you. Full stop. And you’re welcome for using * and not spelling the actual word. We did that to be considerate to those who don’t use colorful language.

Now for the important stuff:

Today is a reminder to stand with our allies in reproductive justice everyday, but especially on this day as they fight an unconstitutional abortion ban coming out of Missisippi that made its way to the Supreme Court.

We want to make something extremely clear— this fight isn’t over until we say it’s over. And it will never, ever be over. Even if we win, the fight continues.

And if we lose in the courts, we will take to the streets.

We will occupy buildings— Senate chambers, you name it. We will shut down highways, arm in arm.

We will work underground to get people the care they need. Come for us, bounty hunters.

We will get arrested. We will raise bail funds. We will not back down.

The only thing that scares us is apathy, and there’s no time for that. Our law makers are making it harder for Black women to survive in our country. Black women are three times more likely to die during childbirth. When we prevent safe access to reproductive healthcare, we are putting lives at risk. Rich white women will find their way to a clinic and will be safe behind those closed doors. So let’s call it like it is -- abortion bans are f*cking racist.

And let’s be clear: abortion bans do not stop abortions from happening, they stop safe abortions from happening.

As a PAC operated by diverse young women, we are not afraid of using this platform to raise our voices. Young people do not stop. And we won’t stop. Because it’s our turn to lead.

It’s time for the old hats and nay-sayers who believe in respectability politics to support our radical activism and hand things over to a new generation that must be activated and empowered.

The kid gloves are off. We are ready to fight. **[Join us and our fearless leaders currently in the halls of the Supreme Court, to fight these racists abortion bans. Be a part of moving our country forward, not back. It’s our way or the highway. Get on board or unsubscribe. The choice is yours. We need all the help we can get>> ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39251078/319011771/-2038882143?refcode=211201_FR_abortionban

He’s sent prices through the roof on everything from gas to groceries. Kansans need relief, and need it quickly. Joe Biden hasn’t even been in office for a full year and the out-of-control reckless spending he’s overseen in Washington has made it way more expensive for us to live in Kansas. He’s sent prices through the roof on everything from gas to groceries. Kansans need relief, and need it quickly. It’s why I’ve called on the Legislature to provide Kansas families with much-needed relief by ELIMINATING or significantly reducing the grocery tax. Check out the clip of my appearance on Fox & Friends here: Throughout this campaign, I have promised you that I will never be the kind of leader who sits by and watches as Kansans struggle. . In fact, the reason we have such a high grocery tax in the first place is Laura Kelly voted for the largest single sales tax increase in Kansas history in 2010 while we both served in the Legislature. I voted NO. Kansas families need real leadership in the governor’s office. They need someone who will keep their promises and get the job done. name: Bruno Amato
subject: What happened at the Supreme Court today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bruno Amato for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xk9NwEyjAoWg-sb9VIPpLoJUmEIvv2tpr47ZCn3v2NNoNy8HyY-TYOLbzNuGHw-IlmOJa8NKZG5A4gQ3m0vcFyZGbvbc_kzNgC053o8Ci9BgrqH7_obaRbCNstSOU-x20bBtXEBDrrKV3eXoko0AjKqhYdVGxzlVw89KZXCt-V_msGCBgWtKUoUjSbyqRNvbbktCzPnq49kSJVMR8l-4BKRGwDQW-FkgO9pWpG1BKH3VTBDi6f5wKOLweu8cDIWa279T0Oquy0Sdr66JIjZSGAbTIRIfDY3hwkMSeW23M_KW4vyZrbiLrzvmRZowbVCsduOf32wIrT14MxB0nRrYHj1WD47wwQJ0nSly9uXT4A_3tAimNnkSu1keZDkZkxLXwwnsocq5R75vVPguBLp5ge/3hh/jzDr1_DJQgqKh4Ci0Cd6xw/h0/80Mdz18AjZD6wJz1uV9YLvy6SgTCEsikysdm8uUjqhw)
---
Today, the Supreme Court heard the first arguments in a case — Dobbs v. Jackson Women’s Health Organization — where they could repeal Roe v. Wade and undo abortion rights across the country. Let me make one thing clear before I continue: **No matter what happens today at the Supreme Court, I will ALWAYS be a fierce advocate for reproductive justice and the right for people to safely, affordably receive the reproductive care they need.** I can’t help but think of how hypocritical it all is. **Republicans — including Kevin McCarthy — shake their firsts and demand ‘our bodies, our choice’** when it comes to fighting against life-saving vaccines and mandates that would protect people from a deadly pandemic. **But when it comes to the life-altering decision on whether to have an abortion — a deeply personal decision about one’s own body and life — they change their tune.** If the Supreme Court does end up deciding to repeal Roe v. Wade, know this: Republicans will be celebrating the rights they have helped take away from millions of people. They will be celebrating the destruction of essential health care for millions of people — all under the false claim of protecting ‘life’. With Republicans looking to take back the House next year, there’s never been more at stake to make sure we have folks in Congress who will lead with compassion and protect the people they serve. **I have never been more committed in this fight to defeat Kevin McCarthy.** But, if you can give today, I’m taking a break from fundraising and directing contributions towards the National Network of Abortion Funds, which does incredibly essential work to help people safely and affordably receive abortions. [**Chip in what you can and help people across California and the country continue to receive the care they need.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xk9NwEyjAoWg-sb9VIPpLoxliUOkPvJlx_7K5J6kxA4GxbKyX6g8gi_Jf0SkjtelDB0QtATXDLVjsBv9JxX-KjCvLJkZKn_IREJdXbtxEd2JGtsd9N9EOW-K09MkgKr9Y4ocZDfzU-yKzMHlKBjOAYELTyG3rNyoZ-RZ9FQonsPxkqR2P94o4MxauV2zU8yetfhmtG9IGdBKQkfZzLhKLfGyTv1R_P-juUrdWEnzjJ1D4tsOtgJnEEWh8bgnaJO5yYCuvxMsr3NTSGE80-nZdx75oJsIU1ja3IQbRb3LWgBJQcd8ZMobMvsBZVOr92Wj04rORqCuIsyuOg8Y2XO3_oUhK6u66WyVlPksnGvAW0opEJ3cApJb4zGm3SujEOle8/3hh/jzDr1_DJQgqKh4Ci0Cd6xw/h1/_DFSZTWHh00Pfh357wuSvplJc0OYCXy4z-qi5vrPSqg) In solidarity and strength, Bruno

| [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDPAZiEt8wwS6hp5wOIb3CiL3LYIDBfoA-ZFdzBMghaUVtqMSSW_M6t0oAX08bV3HbKqO8Vr5FVi0gXcEnlrSuaNQE3NQqm6GC0J6Cso9QhVgVmErorG8C5tjrUAfk8m2ajbgVeNnbBKr7vnVJYYJE_Glhu88JtJ6SbfXmmSJUEDnQ4LrZlS2kjSIbRavle47aMJvXUTA_ir_QzdsrpZgaDdbN8hb3DiEKCO0t1qQsx3JWkzHRwd8SVeCodALQDPyiyRdkRgy0d6HPWFjQwPQ8oXc7K1k-We56freIWVjqnjexBo5_yOqKDlpxPskOFUaZw/3hh/jzDr1_DJQgqKh4Ci0Cd6xw/h2/tIi_MjzZ1mrtzwv4c5FTAEZ7tsmEDPH0TAFYZ9wopJA) | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhsIMdFKSaGG0MlwSFX0_NrYgGjYE0lrd4dSfdc3BHj5u2FAKMXHhO4HiRdV4nECSypuLER96qwDe2tKijjRInTIk3byS8nxwrRd3E-YwVmRfFrU_FQem4R6uYpuby11NQJ8m81Z7GxKeh9vSuQINuNG_c1FqE1EUCHC-mfnUtZGB_8b3c4rOEsnRZEH4VNCpZZHKZ5SGZM3oNDo6QTL-UGDMWRMe-pz7TLUxN98Zh5DlK9TeGDWOsSLIxIO91eJ0_FPKtdmolkhBsFjgboicgsfVE08yUduruB63-bR-ajjZ/3hh/jzDr1_DJQgqKh4Ci0Cd6xw/h3/OrZsw4gsphl2r_hmer2rdVJzBRciaNWd_kVLfwg3enQ)

body:
Official Call to Convention | | | |
---
| | |
### **TO ALL INDIANA REPUBLICANS AND THOSE WHO WISH TO AFFILIATE:**
In compliance with the provisions of the Indiana Election Code and pursuant to the Rules of the Republican Party of Indiana, adopted by the Indiana Republican State Central Committee, and pursuant to the resolutions of said Committee, a **[State Convention](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c55c1c2ad3&e=1acd9bb3d6) will be held on Saturday, June 18, 2022**, for the purpose of nominating a candidate for each of the following offices: **Secretary of State**
**Auditor of State**
**Treasurer of State** All matters pertaining to the holding of the State Convention not provided for by law shall be controlled by the Rules of the Indiana Republican State Central Committee and by such rules as may be adopted by the convention.
---
|

|

name: Team Padilla
subject: The Supreme Court heard oral arguments today
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
An extreme right-wing minority in this country has pushed for a judiciary that is hostile to our basic rights.
#

Hi,
Today, the Supreme Court heard oral arguments in _Dobbs v. Jackson Women's Health Organization_ , a challenge to a Mississippi law that bans abortion entirely after 15 weeks. The case could be used as grounds for the conservative majority on the Supreme Court to overturn _Roe v. Wade_.
Now, _Roe v. Wade_ is settled law, and it has been since 1973.
So why is the right to an abortion under threat now? Because an extreme right-wing minority in this country has pushed for a judiciary that is hostile to our basic rights.
[**It’s clear that our slim Senate majority is the last line of defense for abortion rights in America today. Will you add your name and tell Congress it’s time to step up, pass the Women’s Health Protection Act and protect the right to a safe and legal abortion?**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/december-roe-v-wade?source=em211201-1-15&akid=482%2E159979%2EoG1Ri-)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/december-roe-v-wade?source=em211201-1-15&akid=482%2E159979%2EoG1Ri-)**
Those that seek to reverse _Roe vs. Wade_ need to be reminded that a strong majority of Americans support reproductive freedom.
Because abortion is basic health care – plain and simple. One in four women will access an abortion in their lifetime.
But Republicans want to control every part of women’s health. They will attack groups like Planned Parenthood and try to deny mothers paid leave. And they push for restrictions on access to health care that disproportionately harm poor people, people in rural areas, immigrants, and other vulnerable groups.
That’s why it’s up to us to call on Congress to take action and ensure that EVERYONE has the right to the health care they need.
[**Will you add your name and join Alex to tell Congress it’s time to step up and protect the right to a safe and legal abortion by passing the Women’s Health Protection Act?**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/december-roe-v-wade?source=em211201-1-15&akid=482%2E159979%2EoG1Ri-)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/december-roe-v-wade?source=em211201-1-15&akid=482%2E159979%2EoG1Ri-)**
Thank you for speaking up, and for doing your part.
Team Padilla

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=482%2E159979%2EoG1Ri-)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Janice=20McGeachin=20for=20Idaho=20Governor?=
subject: President Trump Joins 1776 Event with Special Video Presentation. Watch it here!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Janice for Idaho, Machele Hamilton Treasurer [unsubscribe](https://janicemcgeachin
body:
Yesterday evening was an incredible event focused on saving our nation's education system from the radical leftists who are attempting to corrupt it | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/janicemcgeachin/campaign-update-12-01-21?e=823fa8e224)
---
| | [ ](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=7dd3ebf49e&e=823fa8e224)
---
| Dear Friends,
---
| | Yesterday evening was an incredible event focused on saving our nation's education system from the radical leftist influences that are attempting to corrupt it. At least 17 Idaho legislators were in attendance and we had a special video presentation from President Trump. You can watch it [**HERE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=fb86fe755b&e=823fa8e224).
---
| [ ](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=105cfea8ee&e=823fa8e224)
---
| This 1776 Pledge recognizes six important principles that lawmakers and educators should personally believe and publicly embrace.
* The United States of America is an exceptional nation whose people have always strived to form a more perfect union based upon our founding principles.
* Our Founding Fathers — including George Washington and Thomas Jefferson — as well as leaders like Abraham Lincoln, Frederick Douglass and Rev. Martin Luther King, Jr. were among the greatest Americans to ever live, and they deserve to be honored as heroes.
* Our children and grandchildren should be taught to take pride in their country, to respect our founding principles of liberty and equality, and to have a sense of American history that is both truthful and inspiring.
* Civics education should focus on the serious study of our founding documents and principles — not coerce students into engaging in extracurricular political action on behalf of contemporary policy positions.
* Our young people should be taught to view one another not according to race or gender, but as individuals made in the image of God.
* Teaching children to hate their country and each other is immoral and deeply harmful to our society and must be stopped.

The 1776 Pledge goes on to offer lawmakers the opportunity publicly pledge to take the following "concrete steps" to do the following in our K-12 public schools:
1. Restore honest, patriotic education that cultivates in our children a profound love for our country.
2. Promote curriculum that teaches that all children are created equal, have equal moral value under God, our Constitution, and the law, and are members of a national community united by our founding principles.
3. Prohibit any curriculum that pits students against one another on the basis of race or sex.
4. Prevent schools from politicizing education by prohibiting any curriculum that requires students to protest and lobby during or after school.

I am proud to say that 17 Idaho lawmakers, in addition to other elected officials and citizens, signed the pledge last night. I look forward to seeing these principles and concrete steps addressed in the next legislative session, which begins in January.
---
|
---
|
---
---
| I have long been an advocate for meaningful education reform that addresses indoctrination such as critical race theory, socialism, communism, and Marxism. As you probably know, I convened a task force this summer to address these issues. The 1776 Pledge is part of a growing national effort, spearheaded by President Trump and other strong supporters of America First policies, to restore traditional, patriotic education in this country. Protecting our young people from leftist propaganda is a critical component of protecting our country and securing its future. One of the reasons why I am running for Governor is because I refuse to allow the next generations of Idahoans and Americans to be taught to hate our country and to embrace the racist and divisive rhetoric propagated by the radical left. More broadly, I'm running for Idaho Governor as a consistent, principled, Trump-endorsed conservative because I want to Make Idaho Free Again! We must restore the principles of individual liberty, state sovereignty, and traditional conservative values — in both our education system and our government. I strongly believe in these foundational principles and I know that you believe in them too. Today, I encourage you to contact your lawmakers about the 1776 Pledge. If they have already signed it, thank them. If they haven't, encourage them to do so. If they refuse, ask yourself how well they really represent your conservative values. Additionally, I am asking for your support in our campaign. We are now in December and with year-end fundraising deadlines quickly approaching, we need all the help we can get to show that patriotic and conservative Idahoans are united behind **McGeachin for Governor**! Please donate [**$25**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=324bcd31e6&e=823fa8e224), [**$50**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=92e2b1a00a&e=823fa8e224), or [**$100**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=88138d0929&e=823fa8e224) today to help me in this fight for the future of our state! We cannot allow the radical left and their RINO allies to turn Idaho into the next New York or California, where mandates and lockdowns proliferate and the Second Amendment is routinely violated.
---
| [DONATE NOW!](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=3889965083&e=823fa8e224 "DONATE NOW!")
---
| Please [**DONATE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=eed57ff9b1&e=823fa8e224) if you are able, [**VISIT OUR CAMPAIGN STORE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=379a64b848&e=823fa8e224) to see our unique merchandise, [**LIKE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=09bf209594&e=823fa8e224) and [**FOLLOW**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=f330a7ce1b&e=823fa8e224) us on social media, and [**VISIT OUR WEBSITE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=d0dfed8b4f&e=823fa8e224) to learn about some of the other ways you can get involved with the Janice McGeachin for Idaho Governor Campaign.
---
| Sincerely,
Janice McGeachin for Idaho Governor
---

The 1776 Pledge goes on to offer lawmakers the opportunity publicly pledge to take the following "concrete steps" to do the following in our K-12 public schools: 1. Restore honest, patriotic education that cultivates in our children a profound love for our country. 2. Promote curriculum that teaches that all children are created equal, have equal moral value under God, our Constitution, and the law, and are members of a national community united by our founding principles. 3. Prohibit any curriculum that pits students against one another on the basis of race or sex. 4. Prevent schools from politicizing education by prohibiting any curriculum that requires students to protest and lobby during or after school. I am proud to say that 17 Idaho lawmakers, in addition to other elected officials and citizens, signed the pledge last night. I look forward to seeing these principles and concrete steps addressed in the next legislative session, which begins in January. | | | I have long been an advocate for meaningful education reform that addresses indoctrination such as critical race theory, socialism, communism, and Marxism. As you probably know, I convened a task force this summer to address these issues. The 1776 Pledge is part of a growing national effort, spearheaded by President Trump and other strong supporters of America First policies, to restore traditional, patriotic education in this country. Protecting our young people from leftist propaganda is a critical component of protecting our country and securing its future. One of the reasons why I am running for Governor is because I refuse to allow the next generations of Idahoans and Americans to be taught to hate our country and to embrace the racist and divisive rhetoric propagated by the radical left. More broadly, I'm running for Idaho Governor as a consistent, principled, Trump-endorsed conservative because I want to Make Idaho Free Again! We must restore the principles of individual liberty, state sovereignty, and traditional conservative values — in both our education system and our government. I strongly believe in these foundational principles and I know that you believe in them too. Today, I encourage you to contact your lawmakers about the 1776 Pledge. If they have already signed it, thank them. If they haven't, encourage them to do so. If they refuse, ask yourself how well they really represent your conservative values. Additionally, I am asking for your support in our campaign. We are now in December and with year-end fundraising deadlines quickly approaching, we need all the help we can get to show that patriotic and conservative Idahoans are united behind McGeachin for Governor! Please donate , , or today to help me in this fight for the future of our state! We cannot allow the radical left and their RINO allies to turn Idaho into the next New York or California, where mandates and lockdowns proliferate and the Second Amendment is routinely violated. | "DONATE NOW!" | Please if you are able, to see our unique merchandise, and us on social media, and to learn about some of the other ways you can get involved with the Janice McGeachin for Idaho Governor Campaign. | Sincerely, Janice McGeachin for Idaho Governor | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2021 by Janice for Idaho, All rights reserved. Paid for by Janice for Idaho, Machele Hamilton Treasurer

body:
I’m looking forward to seeing you at the Ruby Tap tomorrow at 5:30! | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/91486c82a903/i-am-running-for-congress-8594654?e=356c0699dd)

| | | Hi there,

I’m so excited for our**reception tomorrow from 5:30-7:00 pm at the Ruby Tap in Wauwatosa**! I wanted to make sure you saw your invitation to join us for what I’m sure will be a great event. I’d like to extend my gratitude again to Paul & Elizabeth Bargren, Christopher Meuler, Damian Buchman, Megan & Jerad Steinfeld, and Larry Glusman & Caroline Hogan for their generosity in hosting this event.

The event details are below and [you can RSVP by clicking here](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=eef112f9e5&e=356c0699dd) if you haven’t already done so. I know we’re going to have a fun time and I really hope you can make it.

See you there!

\- Mike
---
|
---
| Hello there,

I am humbled by the support and enthusiasm we have behind my campaign to be your next Congressman. The conversations I am having with voters across the 5th district make me confident that we are headed in the right direction — and we have to keep that momentum going.

Join me on Thursday, December 2nd at **The Ruby Tap** in Tosa for a reception in support of my campaign, **hosted by Paul & Elizabeth Bargren, Christopher Meuler, Damian Buchman, Megan & Jerad Steinfeld, and Larry Glusman & Caroline Hogan!** We are going to need all hands on deck so come show your support! [RSVP HERE.](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=f2ce1f6477&e=356c0699dd)

| Thursday, December 2nd from 5:30 pm - 7:00 pm
The Ruby Tap
1341 North Wauwatosa Avenue, Wauwatosa, WI 53213
I am working to make sure that every American Family has the opportunity to enjoy the American Dream but I can’t do this without your support. If you haven’t already, you can RSVP and contribute at [actblue.com/donate/mvsrubytap](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=f001eecca1&e=356c0699dd)

subject: In direct threat to Roe, SCOTUS takes up another abortion case
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Melanie Darrigo
body:
| | | Today, the Supreme Court heard oral arguments on a new Mississippi law that bans abortion at 15 weeks of pregnancy.
By upholding this law, a stolen right-wing majority on SCOTUS will effectively overturn _Roe v. Wade_ in half of the states across the U.S.
**We MUST defend our pro-choice Democratic majority in the House. That’s why Melanie D’Arrigo needs your help to WIN a TOSS-UP race in New York’s 3rd District.**
******[Melanie D’Arrigo is running for Congress to protect and expand reproductive rights for everyone. Donate to her pro-choice campaign today!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xvsu9hCVaerzAxagfczWNtR7WNj0Vvrg4HKrNk9USOunoX-04ND2SQFX-pBY04xC99FZOocnUA-Bof87rYAM2qgCXJOGJYPloMpRJh9t3voTVKA5eLrk9BHt_tglQnMY1HeN7GIsIPrEoyVqeb0Tf6mi_lVxaeCLWsJJntOrOe76KbZJjhnhB5hjSvrKQ9BgcqprPMF1QcUFuFNV_kGvjeeHxMuOwZ6yu6m5P_56P9f7KUyKnNxaj7b75d_m6FAJ5CMlB9mp-yZp-NQAAYqYHOLq56Q6uD7xZcjq1FQStconylaWCkNYOr3CCBwqyGbeJXJJgP3eY0lY9GK3vqjuufGMfvMBkZBklT8kxjqTPeMdutlDugLjFohPTAtY8kueqqZ82-ojyPE0e2ShI3rtvIZJv4xrdOkhN89OsQmbzxxQ/3hh/XjgwD4F1T_G1BpWizRiDLQ/h0/YGKLV5WAukTUyUIN71aoCeWfw2CqD4ToP8aBRSKMOLs)**

**In Congress, Melanie will continue her fight to repeal the Hyde Amendment, pass the Women’s Health Protection Act, and expand the Supreme Court to restore, protect and expand reproductive rights across the country.**
That’s why she’s received key endorsements from progressive women’s groups including Matriarch, Her Bold Move, Progressive Women of New York, Moms in Office and National Organization for Women.

subject: If Texas goes blue, this entire country goes blue.

body:
Texas is our last stand.
&nbs; p;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?2zc6e--fgxr-4qqlpo5&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

Fellow Conservative, this is Ronny Jackson, President Trump’s number one ally in the House.

You’re not going to like this. I have some bad news.

Beto raised $80 million to flip Texas Blue.

Biden & Pelosi have raised over $200 million this cycle.

Texas is the holy grail. And the Democrats want to flip it.
[**KEEP TEXAS RED**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2zc6e-1ndb6-4qqlpo2/)
If Texas goes blue, this entire country goes blue.

If Beto can ban guns in Texas, Biden can ban guns countrywide.

If Beto can make Texas a sanctuary state, Biden can turn this entire country into a sanctuary state.

[**Fellow Conservative, Texas is our last stand. I need every single Trump patriot receiving this message to chip in $25 within the hour!**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2zc6e-1ndb7-4qqlpo3/)

It’s the absolute minimum we need to stop Beto, stop the Blue Wave & keep Texas red!
[**KEEP TEXAS RED**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2zc6e-1ndb8-4qqlpo4/)
Thank you,
[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2zc6e-1ndb9-4qqlpo5/)
\- Ronny Jackson

**A Note from Kevin:**

[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2zc6e-1ndba-4qqlpo5/)
As Leader of the House Republicans, I’m committed to flipping the House of Representatives in 2022 to restore the Republican Majority and steer America back on the right track. I’m incredibly grateful for your support in this fight and want you to know that I’m doing everything in my power to secure victory for Republicans. Your sustained support fuels our grassroots movement and provides us with the resources necessary to combat the Left’s political games. If you’d like to make another contribution, I will fight tooth and nail to ensure every cent goes towards advancing the conservative agenda and winning back the House -- [**EXPRESS DONATE HERE >>>**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2zc6e-1ndbb-4qqlpo6/)

The fight is far from over, and we’re only getting started.

Kevin McCarthy
_Leader, House Republicans_ |

name: =?utf-8?Q?Becky=20Edwards=20for=20U.S.=20Senate?=
subject: The 12 Days of Voting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becky Edwards for U
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/067f0689d70d/campaign-update-yellow-couch-tour-flag-day-and-juneteenth-5324394?e=10c1db3257)
---
| | [ ](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=f57e00948b&e=10c1db3257)
---
| Dear Friends,

This year for the holidays give yourself the gift of a new senator!

Today we are excited to launch The 12 Days of Voting. Now through December 12, we have a prompt each day to help you get involved in the election process and be ready to vote in the June 2022 primary election.
---
|
---
|
---
|
# December 1: Update your voter registration
---
|
---
| Visit [vote.utah.gov](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=8b5479c8ae&e=10c1db3257) and select “Register to vote or update voter registration.” The system will guide you through the process of registering or updating your registration if you recently moved or need to affiliate with a political party. Only voters affiliated as Republicans will be eligible to sign our campaign signature packets in January and vote in the June Republican primary.
---
|
---
|
# December 2: **Text 3 friends and encourage them to check their voter registration.**
---
|
---
| Signature gathering is right around the corner and we need to collect 28,000 from registered Republicans to ensure a place on the Republican primary ballot. Text 3 friends or loved ones and encourage them to check and update their voter registration ahead of signature gathering in January.
---
|
---
|
# December 3: **Add signature gathering to your calendar**
---
|
---
| Starting January 3 through 20 we will have volunteers stationed at a number of locations around the state to gather signatures. Check our website to find a location near you and mark the date and time in your calendar.
---
|
---
|
# December 4: **Volunteer to gather signatures**
---
|
---
| We need all the help we can get to gather 28,000 signatures. To volunteer to help us gather signatures, please fill out [this form](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=d174ad9f10&e=10c1db3257). Once you have completed the form we will send further instructions.
---
|
---
|
# December 5: **Become a delegate**
---
|
---
| A delegate is a person elected or appointed to represent others in their party from a specific precinct or neighborhood. County delegates select nominees for local office while state delegates select nominees for statewide offices, such as the U.S. Senate seat. Delegates select these party nominees at county and state conventions, which are typically held in late April or May. Any registered Republican can become a delegate to help select the Republican nominee. By becoming a delegate, you can have a strong voice in the selection of the Republican nominee for the U.S. Senate. Learn more about becoming a delegate [here](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=415ba88b32&e=10c1db3257).
---
|
---
|
# December 6: Follow our campaign on social media
---
|
---
| Our campaign uses social media to share policy, civic engagement information, and the latest campaign news. If you aren’t following already, you can find our campaign on [Instagram](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=d359ae58ec&e=10c1db3257), [Twitter](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=2b0068dbf9&e=10c1db3257), and [Facebook](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=fca71f7f98&e=10c1db3257).
---
|
---
|
# December 7: Post about our campaign on social media
---
|
---
| Post about your support for our campaign on your social media accounts and encourage your followers to post their support.
---
|
---
|
# December 8: Place a sign in your yard
---
|
---
| One of the best ways to share your support for our campaign is to put a sign in your yard. [Request a sign](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=f7e65cb41b&e=10c1db3257) and a volunteer will deliver it to you within a few weeks.
---
|
---
|
# December 9: **Donate**
---
|
---
| It takes a lot of money to keep a campaign competitive. Every dollar donated helps spread our campaign message across the state. Making a contribution not only helps support this campaign but gives you a vested interest in the race. Donate to bring better politics to Washington.
---
| [DONATE](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=89ac7fcea0&e=10c1db3257 "DONATE")
---
|
---
|
# December 10: **Spread the word about our newsletter**
---
|
---
| Every week we send a newsletter with campaign updates and thoughts on the news and information that impacts Utahns. Tell your friends and family that [subscribing to the newsletter](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=c24fb050ae&e=10c1db3257) is the best way to stay in the loop.
---
|
---
|
# December 11: **Subscribe to Better With Becky**
---
|
---
| Our podcast Better with Becky is a weekly conversation about the latest campaign news and current events. [Subscribe](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=c6fa13b389&e=10c1db3257) to get a more in-depth discussion of the news of the week and campaign updates.
---
|
---
|
# December 12: Mark your calendar for the Republican primary election!
---
|
---
| Give yourself the gift of a new senator in 2022! Mark your calendar for June 28 and remember to vote in the Republican primary election!
---
|
---
|
# Contact Me
---
|
---
| I want to know the stories that are on your mind. I believe that the only way to truly represent you right is to know you first, so reach out! You can follow me on [Twitter](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=e6f3215ffd&e=10c1db3257), [Facebook](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=e02177569e&e=10c1db3257), and [Instagram](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=934e1e3e1e&e=10c1db3257) where my DMs are always open, and you can email me becky@beckyforutah.com.
---
| I hope you have a wonderful Thanksgiving! Thank you again for all your support.
---
| [DONATE](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=124899c6cd&e=10c1db3257 "DONATE")
---
| [GET INVOLVED](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=2965d1b073&e=10c1db3257 "GET INVOLVED")
---
| [REGISTER TO VOTE](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=2483f4a3cc&e=10c1db3257 "REGISTER TO VOTE")
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | | | | [](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=d7acf48957&e=10c1db3257)
---
| | [](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=09df921f3c&e=10c1db3257)
---
| | [](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=c5c30b0210&e=10c1db3257)
---
| | [](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=bdf300bdd5&e=10c1db3257)
---
|
---
| | **[](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=c8ed5ccee3&e=10c1db3257)
Becky Edwards for U.S. Senate**
P.O. Box 1467
Bountiful, UT 84011

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/profile?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=3c3c9f2a2c&e=10c1db3257&c=37e1279cda) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=3c3c9f2a2c&e=10c1db3257&c=37e1279cda).

Paid for by Becky Edwards for U.S. Senate.
---

subject: December 1st Update

body:
Statements by Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: If Roe v. Wade is overturned, abortion could become illegal in Wisconsin.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
This morning, the Supreme Court heard oral arguments in _Dobbs v. Jackson Women's Health Organization_ \-- one of the most consequential cases in the history of reproductive rights in America and a direct challenge to _Roe v. Wade_.

When Republicans like Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and Ron Johnson stacked the Supreme Court with far-right justices, their goal was to roll back nearly 50 years of precedent and outlaw abortion in America.

**If _Roe_ is overturned, abortion could become illegal in Wisconsin because we already have an abortion ban on the books -- it passed in 1849!**

The longer Congress waits to pass federal laws to protect reproductive freedom in this country, the closer we get to a law from _before the Civil War_ going back into effect. This fight is urgent, and I’m asking you to speak out.

**[The U.S. Senate can -- and must -- act immediately to codify _Roe v. Wade_ and pass Tammy Baldwin’s Women’s Health Protection Act. Anything less will cost lives. If you agree, please add your name to demand Congress write reproductive rights into federal law.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39251316/319014035/-1357122942?ms=em21_211201_Dobbs_adv_gq_act___SG_ettx&refcode=em21_211201_Dobbs_adv_gq_act___SG_ettx&source=em21_211201_Dobbs_adv_gq_act___SG_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211201_Dobbs_adv_gq_act___SG_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=vuJmFeBaVt14hnjeuJkw2hS5zIPR5AYDiUrmjyfHJ2MFZ5E72VmNbHsNa7dliRF4sRfiGuGq8CiSiuOEhWnNHGwfPOVP2QN9qjrAolzV%2Bcp5cnVdRe8eiZ04Y9n00uKVJij8ZyGujHpqU9t0SX9FthdTTNH%2FrM4acr647bUBJkY%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGEwNDQ3MC0xYTUzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oyx05FmXVorqGGv7unsWrWQ_aXvMisqz8ijxQr6HeBg=&emci=492d41e9-f152-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&emdi=9da04470-1a53-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&ceid=18659593)**

For too long, abortion rights have been an afterthought for Washington politicians. That's how we got here, and it's why we cannot afford to elect leaders who treat defending our constitutional rights like an extra credit project.

As Wisconsin’s next U.S. Senator, I will never back down in the fight for reproductive freedom. I hope you'll fight alongside me to defend abortion access.

— Sarah Godlewski

| [Add your name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39251317/319014036/-1357122942?ms=em21_211201_Dobbs_adv_gq_act___SG_ettx&refcode=em21_211201_Dobbs_adv_gq_act___SG_ettx&source=em21_211201_Dobbs_adv_gq_act___SG_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211201_Dobbs_adv_gq_act___SG_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=vuJmFeBaVt14hnjeuJkw2hS5zIPR5AYDiUrmjyfHJ2MFZ5E72VmNbHsNa7dliRF4sRfiGuGq8CiSiuOEhWnNHGwfPOVP2QN9qjrAolzV%2Bcp5cnVdRe8eiZ04Y9n00uKVJij8ZyGujHpqU9t0SX9FthdTTNH%2FrM4acr647bUBJkY%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGEwNDQ3MC0xYTUzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1hMDg1ZmMzMWFjOTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oyx05FmXVorqGGv7unsWrWQ_aXvMisqz8ijxQr6HeBg=&emci=492d41e9-f152-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&emdi=9da04470-1a53-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&ceid=18659593)

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: [Add your name] Tell the Senate to pass paid leave
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Conservatives and corporate special interests are trying to remove paid family and sick leave from the Build Back Better Act.
#
Peter, this is urgent. Paid leave is at risk in the Senate.
There’s a reason I fought for months to ensure that paid family and medical leave was included in the Build Back Better Act that passed the House. No person in this country should ever have to make a choice between keeping their job and taking care of themselves or a loved one. It was true before the pandemic and it’s true today, after nearly 800,000 people have died in America and many, many more have gotten sick from COVID.
Conservatives and corporate special interests are trying to remove paid family and medical leave from the Build Back Better Act in the Senate — so we need to fight back while we still can. [**Can you sign on to tell the Senate to protect paid leave in Build Back Better? Our country’s working people and families are relying on us.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/paid-leave-senate/?source=em20211201-845&t=1&akid=845%2E420207%2EwQMS1w)
**[Add Your Name](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/paid-leave-senate/?source=em20211201-845&t=2&akid=845%2E420207%2EwQMS1w)**
The wealthiest Americans and big corporations must finally pay their fair share in taxes so we can invest in working families. That includes finally making paid family and medical leave a reality.
Right now, the United States is one of only six countries — and certainly the only wealthy country — in the whole world without any form of national paid leave. That’s not how it should be, Peter.
**Paid family and medical leave policies are incredibly popular, and this is our chance to make them the law of the land. We must keep fighting for paid leave in the Senate, no matter the overwhelming corporate opposition.**
[**Can you add your name to our fight to keep paid leave in the Build Back Better Act? By signing on, you’re telling the U.S. Senate that paid leave is a priority that must remain in the President’s signature piece of legislation.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/paid-leave-senate/?source=em20211201-845&t=3&akid=845%2E420207%2EwQMS1w)
**[Add Your Name](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/paid-leave-senate/?source=em20211201-845&t=4&akid=845%2E420207%2EwQMS1w)**
I know it feels like this fight has gone on for far too long — we have corporate lobbyists and their unchecked influence over our political system to thank for that. But we can’t stop now.
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20211201-845-footer&t=5&refcode2=845_420207_wQMS1w&akid=845%2E420207%2EwQMS1w)**
---

#### CNN SUSPENDS Chris Cuomo
---
| In the face of overwhelming evidence of improper conduct in providing assistance to his brother over allegations of sexual misconduct, cable news anchor Chris Cuomo has been suspended indefinitely by his employer, CNN. Specifically, text messages have come to light indicating that Cuomo offered to draft statements for his brother, New York Governor Andrew Cuomo, and engaged directly in efforts to gather information about the Governor’s accusers. In [this clip](https://trk.klclick2.com/ls/click?upn=iBS3x8ZM-2FoqiO5Y19tl8Y9ehXFqJKWS-2FR7OOLH1avmDONFkdPwZWyqU4QHwVYKpSB6-2FkRdoOA9-2B6rn5TVkfZBa3-2FttkCEVkGdw3ds-2BQSfVUcQ4m292WUVtM7C20mfFHFupjdhxj3Ouj5L53Lzn7gm9-2BcCEfz50LlnATk-2FhMa4s0ScC7Af7-2BQHMTly7GVp4YpWjsiLgiKKONlGEBZr6rioU2TNHovIt0uCTmKTCPZ6XrDTZeejc9lnpLrG7Kn2OmclN3MIfBBCSiyEUejAtfJ26rKfRPbfXXfDJloR73C36sbV8UMxxiubGKMDN-2FrBOXQywvzmUGkG4zPCDo5pZA4bmg8dtYYn-2F6RFshSk8Czu08VKsW-2Bt24cidP-2FkxxrGUZBXXP9BofnDFyYunGpBZlJEF-2BI6DaQ5I0V3WHf2YTUUINNvk4QZLKis53FxHO34yv3CbL5NosixE6f2jOnm1WaNg-3D-3DOaOK_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjdyn9Meo-2BU4memdpyMXxi7rdooOomGA9kNfhjJiS2k8jZQn2FHGZLvariDxi6eSXxmqAfzZUdA3zdoYBA4QB-2BvtO8etesRboZHX5ps2Gx3SpZCQ2PzI8XMLI8d448jpWCnHeYl1uXZDmEGkdqNBs-2FLnEpROvp7uoY3JeDBuglnt8BW9-2FbVx1TG-2B8DCasnMxvxXgaeHrxXvqxlRhIjnOzSYwKs05KsX2QS-2FawF03wQcBZWN-2Fy4ZWRkrk2kPJ2f8j6V-2BSopTdUfBkGDalpFjFHnCI-2FiOXLEo5iHD8xvxug8PZvr-2Bs6qv9jYirjSiioVM1-2BIicuzsAkYnP3XLlyD9GQ7cob2WP8wLQ-2FxH74fAJfP7Yg-3D-3D) Cenk and Ana debate Cuomo’s culpability and whether his transgressions are all that terrible, considering what a lackluster job all other mainstream news outlets do, as much in service to their corporate owners and advertisers as Cuomo was to his brother. Ana remains unmoved, arguing that the case is pretty much cut and dried — as a high profile cable news anchor Cuomo retains a great deal of power, she says, and instead of using that power to expose wrongdoing and serve the public interest, he leveraged his insider status to help his corrupt brother attempt to escape accountability. Case closed, she says. Cenk acknowledges Ana’s point while adding that Cuomo was virtually all alone in granting air time to legitimate progressives (like Cenk and Ana) during the 2020 presidential campaign, so at least deserves some credit for that. Cenk further notes that Chris Cuomo was far from alone as a mainstream media member in propping up Andrew Cuomo as New York Governor. Cenk notes that Andrew was a media golden boy, and his numerous scandals, including thousands of preventable nursing home Covid deaths and shutting down a commission investigating corruption when the commission started looking at his own corruption, were largely ignored before the harassment allegations came to light. “I’m okay with them suspending Chris Cuomo if they suspend everyone else at the network for always supporting corporate politicians and never at least having the decency to be honest about it,” Cenk says. “Chris Cuomo was honest about supporting his brother — the rest of that network and the rest of mainstream media is never honest about supporting corporate politicians and always being against both the right wing and the left wing."

#### Amazon Workers Get Second Chance At Unionization
---
| In a sign of hope for unionization efforts at Amazon, the recent failed union drive at the Bessemer, Alabama Amazon facility has been nullified by the National Labor Relations Board, and a new vote has been called for. The re-vote ruling was based on evidence that the corporate retailer held illegal mandatory meetings where workers were told that a successful unionization drive would close the facility and that a union would only use workers’ dues to pay for lavish vacations and expensive cars. Amazon will likely appeal the decision. In [this clip](https://trk.klclick2.com/ls/click?upn=iBS3x8ZM-2FoqiO5Y19tl8Y-2FRraoG-2FHfs0XDX1eXAmGDYmbl8D2Fnpx04ClREek4usR4EtxCzh3syF7UvmRijLsxYC3yS-2FlOsYA7qepUgA9PB0xQV5-2B0E2npjK0gNMnMnopbR1morOFdVRR5JoZbLGDG6CyUUFAoX-2B4o-2Bbwo-2B7S2-2F0VCByVSLySW6GHq6Q28XglM8HV399rhmlgu3pzaOw1VjbTe3fpFl8mhnvLpyMiWk-2BIVqWd5vU26NDJQqStDXdPPkOXUF-2BIpmysVUCT6JdvbEQ0R2Ty-2FMSCwa7nis43O3DxKw8-2FHADPjnicpalh4b-2FwtBybY1qhXCX9fow49qa1xcYoVNcr4WHFerVj8FXQHkclYjxXFqf6VsXExLuq71YgHl2WBwC3qgQjJTbqsZmRFumSxtsxxJAh0wcelPqsDY-3DVb_L_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjdyn9Meo-2BU4memdpyMXxi7rdooOomGA9kNfhjJiS2k8jZQn2FHGZLvariDxi6eSXxmqAfzZUdA3zdoYBA4QB-2BvtO8etesRboZHX5ps2Gx3SpZCQ2PzI8XMLI8d448jpWCnHeYl1uXZDmEGkdqNBs-2FLnEpROvp7uoY3JeDBuglntwJC2h3hNSLjscFoxeyJp112Nz9jp2GLhAHETFKuA2l6zmBUkZNf2keWquUFBkm-2FirvZDzntpynsEiANCDToqreAf4VZex4RLZGqPNcXy0y-2BGl9-2B-2FD2nbM95HszN5b1yZSTyFjSP-2FG1Z0l4KviIE-2Bgf4fm58auhnpBuBLLZOGU3Cc8N6Xt8uEsoHQ9QkakhL6w-3D-3D) from The Damage Report, John and Nina Turner discuss the prospects for a successful union vote at the Bessemer facility, and what that might mean for the larger unionization movement. Nina says she visited the location and spoke with workers who talked about the disrespect they’ve felt at management’s hands, including being followed around in a menacing fashion and being afraid to use the restroom. She hopes the next vote gains these hard-working Americans a union and the kind of respect they deserve. John notes that the captive meetings and intimidation tactics have begun again in Bessemer, so it appears the cycle is going to repeat itself. He also wonders why so many leftist activists like Danny Glover, Cornel West and Killer Mike have visited and shown support for Amazon workers in Bessemer but no prominent right-wing politicians have seen fit to drop by. Don’t they hate Jeff Bezos? Aren’t some of these workers conservative and worthy of support? So weird, he says...

clean_body: | | | | | | In Today's TYT Newsletter... 1. Coming Up On Today's Show 2. Chris Cuomo Suspended Over Improper Aid to Brother Andrew 3. Amazon Workers May Get a Second Chance to Vote for a Union 4. News, Notes & Reminders | | | | Coming Up On Today's Show... | Wednesday, December 1 2021: Ana on Hour One followed by Ana and John for Hour Two of today's episode of The Young Turks. 6:00 pm ET / 3:00 pm PT for coverage of these stories: 3 killed, 8 injured in shooting at Oxford High School in Michigan Congress 'asleep at the switch' as Biden continues Trump-era ploy to privatize Medicare Amazon warehouse workers get to re-do their union vote in Alabama ‘You will not live much longer’: Ilhan Omar plays threatening voicemail calling Her a ‘jihadist’ Trump blamed Gold Star families for covid infection ... And much more! | | Back to Table of Contents | | | | CNN SUSPENDS Chris Cuomo | In the face of overwhelming evidence of improper conduct in providing assistance to his brother over allegations of sexual misconduct, cable news anchor Chris Cuomo has been suspended indefinitely by his employer, CNN. Specifically, text messages have come to light indicating that Cuomo offered to draft statements for his brother, New York Governor Andrew Cuomo, and engaged directly in efforts to gather information about the Governor’s accusers. In Cenk and Ana debate Cuomo’s culpability and whether his transgressions are all that terrible, considering what a lackluster job all other mainstream news outlets do, as much in service to their corporate owners and advertisers as Cuomo was to his brother. Ana remains unmoved, arguing that the case is pretty much cut and dried — as a high profile cable news anchor Cuomo retains a great deal of power, she says, and instead of using that power to expose wrongdoing and serve the public interest, he leveraged his insider status to help his corrupt brother attempt to escape accountability. Case closed, she says. Cenk acknowledges Ana’s point while adding that Cuomo was virtually all alone in granting air time to legitimate progressives (like Cenk and Ana) during the 2020 presidential campaign, so at least deserves some credit for that. Cenk further notes that Chris Cuomo was far from alone as a mainstream media member in propping up Andrew Cuomo as New York Governor. Cenk notes that Andrew was a media golden boy, and his numerous scandals, including thousands of preventable nursing home Covid deaths and shutting down a commission investigating corruption when the commission started looking at his own corruption, were largely ignored before the harassment allegations came to light. “I’m okay with them suspending Chris Cuomo if they suspend everyone else at the network for always supporting corporate politicians and never at least having the decency to be honest about it,” Cenk says. “Chris Cuomo was honest about supporting his brother — the rest of that network and the rest of mainstream media is never honest about supporting corporate politicians and always being against both the right wing and the left wing." | | | | Back to Table of Contents | | | | Amazon Workers Get Second Chance At Unionization | In a sign of hope for unionization efforts at Amazon, the recent failed union drive at the Bessemer, Alabama Amazon facility has been nullified by the National Labor Relations Board, and a new vote has been called for. The re-vote ruling was based on evidence that the corporate retailer held illegal mandatory meetings where workers were told that a successful unionization drive would close the facility and that a union would only use workers’ dues to pay for lavish vacations and expensive cars. Amazon will likely appeal the decision. In from The Damage Report, John and Nina Turner discuss the prospects for a successful union vote at the Bessemer facility, and what that might mean for the larger unionization movement. Nina says she visited the location and spoke with workers who talked about the disrespect they’ve felt at management’s hands, including being followed around in a menacing fashion and being afraid to use the restroom. She hopes the next vote gains these hard-working Americans a union and the kind of respect they deserve. John notes that the captive meetings and intimidation tactics have begun again in Bessemer, so it appears the cycle is going to repeat itself. He also wonders why so many leftist activists like Danny Glover, Cornel West and Killer Mike have visited and shown support for Amazon workers in Bessemer but no prominent right-wing politicians have seen fit to drop by. Don’t they hate Jeff Bezos? Aren’t some of these workers conservative and worthy of support? So weird, he says... | | Back to Table of Contents | | | | News, Notes & Reminders | Darrick Hamilton on the Convo! On today's episode of The Conversation , professor and Founding Director of the Institute on Race, Power, and Political Economy at The New School , Dr. Darrick Hamilton is joining host Sen. Nina Turner. Tune in live at 5:30pm ET/2:30pm PT on or on YouTube! TYT Impacts: Want to see a longitudinal view of all TYT's great achievements in nearly 20 years of broadcasting a strong, progressive message of positive change? Then check out the TYT Impacts page . From Cenk's epic Iraq War rant to AOC's first appearance, it's all here! Be the Change! TYT has been at the forefront of driving progressive change since 2002, and everything we’ve accomplished has been thanks to our members, who have allowed us to remain independent of corporate interests and reach 20 million followers! Today, we’re at a tipping point - we need to bring as many people into the progressive movement as possible, and we're asking for your help. Here’s what you can do: If you’re a member, thank you. We need you to remain so. Consider upgrading, it counts! If you’re one of the thousands of viewers out there who is not a member, the time has come for you to JOIN NOW. We need you more than ever. We’re inviting you to BE THE CHANGE and help bring a community-powered Progressive Change Machine to life! Details are at . | | | Back to Table of Contents | | | JOIN THE CLUB! | Did you know that you can: Support independent media Get exclusive content Join fellow progressive activists in the TYT community All just by? So should you sign up today? Of Cooooourse! | Challenge the establishment. Support independent media. | | © 2021 TYT Network & The Young Turks, Inc. Republicans have been waiting nearly _50 years_ to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ \-- and after today's arguments, the GOP may actually get their wish.

The Supreme Court's ruling in this case will decide whether anti-choice bills in state legislatures across the nation will be allowed to go into effect and DISMANTLE reproductive freedoms -- **but we can’t give up on this fight.**

Justice Sotomayor was 100% right when she said that the impact of banning abortion would be "catastrophic," so we need to prove that Americans will make their voices heard to save _Roe._

If you stand with Justice Sotomayor **we need you to raise your voice RIGHT NOW.**

**[Don’t wait another minute: Sign our Democratic petition calling on the Supreme Court to DEFEND reproductive rights! We're only 14,287 signatures short, and we're counting on YOU:](https://go.dscc.org/go/5681?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20211201-SupremeCourtUpdate-jtk1914-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20211201-SupremeCourtUpdate-jtk1914-Pros-sl1&akid=2103%2E9716520%2Eg9EKWN)**

body:

Tomorrow I’ll wake up with no opponent ... but that won’t last lon I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | [](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=974b879949654030a99d9c71b50abfa9&_e=XMK2gy1EfS4n6VPZAaprR0eW8jnDU9F0_fNDRb6cNRGZBYzY_eu2XhcV7iKQpHe1Q3FflywTduBaoBomsX8qXA8MAOialE8GCBvgPz7h2mQO6Vc7CRHLGazepzuaSnqoTVvHaMyLrvhU7OI0Itw-3eh4ixFoGrJMZ469N-Wdyhn9XFNstqXA_xemLP-8scKI_5HcM28czSVYoArKarmeS0EWg96MHuhv-w6xtljjgDNgKkG6MKdwoi-C4phin_ZiLyL7YDjK3qem6AMvS8YrPA2Nhr46zwIAAT1n_Y1l66uSw_kiTFWf7mfzB12JxF8zeVpskefuZa0dlKNgV3Qnf2aReLG4VGW32vqqxy4TjIv8rDUFQynF3MQQmi6LXFhfNXSjd67OjzQKv8ZSY-SSZtGZz4zGwlF6hZCYLXozfKFojLc6pvMwYUrhoZ1zjL5E)

Peter,

**Democrats are in TROUBLE.** Today my opponent, Chairman Peter DeFazio of the House Transportation Committee, announced that he is retiring.

It’s clear to even one of the most entrenched Democrats in Congress that running for elected office with a “D” next to one’s name comes at one’s own peril.

Yesterday I woke up running against the 4th longest serving member of the U.S. House. **Tomorrow I’ll wake up with no opponent ... _but that won’t last long._**

**This is the first time since 1986 that Democrat’s in Oregon’s 4th Congressional District will have the opportunity to launch a campaign for the House.**

**And I’ll be waiting for whomever Democrats decide to run against me.**

While Peter DeFazio has decided to call it quits, I’m under no illusion that DEMS will do everything in their power to retain this seat. They will do everything they can to tarnish my name by dragging my reputation through the mud and worse.

**[That’s why I’m asking you to stand in solidarity with me today and chip in $4 or even $8 to help me prepare for the forthcoming battle.](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=974b879949654030a99d9c71b50abfa9&_e=XMK2gy1EfS4n6VPZAaprR0eW8jnDU9F0_fNDRb6cNRGZBYzY_eu2XhcV7iKQpHe1Q3FflywTduBaoBomsX8qXA8MAOialE8GCBvgPz7h2mQO6Vc7CRHLGazepzuaSnqoTVvHaMyLrvhU7OI0Itw-3eh4ixFoGrJMZ469N-Wdyhn9XFNstqXA_xemLP-8scKI_5HcM28czSVYoArKarmeS0EWg96MHuhv-w6xtljjgDPMkzjknpOCmuG9VARam-AH6flsNf5BMxcV9gFJnL8VfD-160gqi-EC16zklw2Myrsg0vCuno8eT9LmGoDqCoZudWvRbO3tZqALFqV6YQ06O5BahQ7xQV0TYLoRuGV2wEAmz8LM-DP6DHiAbZT2CX9LwF2CuOh5VMZOpZ0iNwsgavZ-xF7hi5kN4vCXI-Q-bRYayIALmSo2282HkkYn79YF)**

name: Wesley Hunt
subject: Join me, Congressman Dan Crenshaw, and Morgan Luttrell this Sunday!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

I want to invite you, your family, your neighbors, and your friends to attend
a Fireside Chat with me, Congressman Dan Crenshaw, and Morgan Luttrell this
Sunday, December 5th at 4 PM. We will discuss the current state of our country
under President Joe Biden, provide an update on each of our campaigns, and
answer any questions you might have!

The Fireside Chat will take place at the Creekwood Grill off Telge Road in
Cypress, TX from 4:00 PM - 6:00 PM. Please see the flyer for exact details. I
hope to see you there!

Sincerely,
Wesley

Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Military images and information do not imply
endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

We hit our November fundraising goal — and then some!** In 2020, we came closer than any other primary challenger has in 40 years and won the in-person vote. With such strong support from the beginning, we know we can go all the way this time. There’s a long way to go but for this queer Black woman, it means so much to have that level of support from our community. I’ve said since the beginning: I’m not in this for ME, I’m in this for WE. **My opponent takes millions of dollars in corporate PAC money. I rely on grassroots supporters like you to power our movement.** Together, I know we can win. **Democrats are in TROUBLE.** Today my opponent, Chairman Peter DeFazio of the House Transportation Committee, announced that he is retiring.

It’s clear to even one of the most entrenched Democrats in Congress that running for elected office with a “D” next to one’s name comes at one’s own peril.
