clean_body: Step up to defend America | | Fellow Conservative, America needs your help. The radical left will stop at NOTHING to destroy all our conservative accomplishments from the Trump Administration. For our Nation’s sake, we can’t let that happen. That’s why I’m issuing a call to ALL PATRIOTS to step up for conservative principles and take back the House in 2022. Will you step up within the next four hours to defend conservative principles and Republican accomplishments? We can’t miss this crucial opportunity to take the lead in our Republican campaign to take back the House. This moment is so critical we’ve opted to EXTEND our November fundraising deadline. Take A Stand: I’ll cut to the chase: We can’t defend our great nation and fight for conservative principles without your support, Fellow Conservative. Can President Trump and House Conservatives count on you to step up before our EXTENDED deadline expires at midnight? Thank you, Jim Banks, Chairman House Conservatives Fund Founded in 1997, the House Conservatives Fund (HCF) has been the political arm of the Republican Study Committee (RSC), the largest caucus of conservatives in Congress. For more than two decades, HCF has been pursuing its mission of electing and retaining members who are committed to our core conservative principles. HCF’s current roster of 140 members understands that our mission has never been more urgent than it is today. House Conservatives Fund . name: Team Booker
subject: An exciting update on our November fundraising goal →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter,

We have some great news to share with you: Thanks to people like you, we
were able to reach our email fundraising goal for November!

As a grassroots campaign, we know that it’s going to take all of us to win
this race. None of this would be possible without you — and we are so
grateful for your continued support.

Together, we’re going to fight for a future that lifts up all families,
and usher in a new era of transformational leadership in Kentucky. Stay
tuned for more on what our campaign has planned for this next month and
into 2022 — we’re just getting started.

Thank you again,
Peter.

— Team Booker

name: Team AOC
subject: A permanent solution
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Over 10 million immigrants — students, essential workers, and community members — live with temporary status, unsure of what their futures in this country will look like.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20211201-2669-header&t=1&akid=2669%2E2526796%2EbYqP2t)
As the Build Back Better Act heads to the Senate, we have a once-in-a-generation opportunity to establish a pathway to citizenship and finally provide Dreamers, Temporary Protected Status (TPS) holders, farm workers, and essential workers with the stability and equal protection they deserve.
While currently the bill secures protections and work authorization for undocumented individuals, it does not include a permanent pathway to citizenship.
**But the good news is that the Senate can finally include a pathway to citizenship** for millions of our community members and neighbors. That’s why Alexandria joined 90 of her colleagues in Congress to urge the Senate to augment the bill to include a pathway to permanent citizenship for Dreamers and other temporary status holders before a vote.
[Can you join Alexandria and send a message to your senators right now urging them to include a pathway to citizenship in the Build Back Better Act?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/letter/tell-senate-build-pathway-citizenship/?source=em20211201-2669-P_ENG_ANO_IMM&t=2&akid=2669%2E2526796%2EbYqP2t)
**[Send a message to your senators](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/letter/tell-senate-build-pathway-citizenship/?source=em20211201-2669-P_ENG_ANO_IMM&t=3&akid=2669%2E2526796%2EbYqP2t)**
Now is _the moment_ to create a permanent solution for immigrants who live and work on temporary status.
**Over 10 million immigrants — students, essential workers, and community members — are undocumented or live with temporary status 1, unsure of what their futures in this country will look like.**
Currently, the Build Back Better Act only includes a five-year parole status for certain undocumented immigrants, yet another temporary form of repreive. **We must take this opportunity to create a real pathway to citizenship for millions of our community members and neighbors.**
Alexandria knows that whether or not Democrats keep their promise to create a permanent solution to temporary status is a question of political will. That is why she is fighting to keep up the pressure.
But some senators are hiding behind the Senate Parliamentarian’s memorandum which states that for procedural reasons the pathway to citizenship can’t be included — despite evidence to the contrary. The role of the Parliamentarian is an advisory one, and their opinion _isn’t_ binding. So, we need our senators to step up and stop using the Parlimentarian’s opinion as a scapegoat.
The moment is now. The more messages we send to our senators, the stronger our call for action will be.
[Will you join Alexandria and send a message to your senators to build pressure and demand a pathway to citizenship in the Build Back Better Act?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/letter/tell-senate-build-pathway-citizenship/?source=em20211201-2669-P_ENG_ANO_IMM&t=4&akid=2669%2E2526796%2EbYqP2t)
Thank you for your support now and always.
Team AOC

* * *
1 - [American Immigration Council](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/10202?t=5&akid=2669%2E2526796%2EbYqP2t)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20211201-2669-P_ENG_ANO_IMM&t=6&refcode2=2669_2526796_bYqP2t&akid=2669%2E2526796%2EbYqP2t)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20211201-2669-P_ENG_ANO_IMM&t=7&akid=2669%2E2526796%2EbYqP2t)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=8&akid=2669%2E2526796%2EbYqP2t) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=9&akid=2669%2E2526796%2EbYqP2t) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=10&akid=2669%2E2526796%2EbYqP2t)
---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=11&akid=2669%2E2526796%2EbYqP2t)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=2669%2E2526796%2EbYqP2t)

subject: ** Launching URGENT Grassroots Effort **
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bridget Barton for Oregon
body:

---
Peter,

Extreme leftists are destroying our great state, day after day. There’s no end in sight.

And now, Oregon radicals and left-wing out-of-staters want to double down... throwing their support behind candidates for governor who make Kate Brown seem conservative!

I'm running to put a HARD STOP to this unchecked insanity. And with the most important election year of our lives just around the corner, I’ve never needed your support more than I do now. That’s why I’m launching an urgent End-of-Year Grassroots “Money Bomb” campaign! I’m looking to raise $15,886 to ensure we start 2021 with the resources we need to DEFEAT the radical left and TAKE BACK our state next year.

[**Will you pitch in a special contribution of $5, $10, $25, $50, or more to help save Oregon?**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/d87bb1bf48eb013366a6b3c4b83ff292/37693/86880298a0282f0b/fba6b8eb3ac848d8c3d6b838967d376c/37693)
Peter, it’s vital that we reach our goal. Remember that you can use your Oregon Political Tax Credit to support this critical effort to save Oregon. You can give $50, or $100 as a couple, to my campaign and then check the political tax credit box on your taxes next year to receive all your money back.
**The radicals in charge are building a MASSIVE campaign war chest, funded by Hollywood liberals and far-left billionaires!**

**[Please help fuel our fight today, Peter.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/d87bb1bf48eb013366a6b3c4b83ff292/37693/86880298a0282f0b/e3b33334659dd0ecc3d6b838967d376c/37693)**

Together, I know we can break the left’s chokehold on our citizens and unleash Oregon.

\- Bridget

name: Laurel Imer
subject: URGENT CALL TO ACTION
disclaimer_text: Paid for By Laurel Imer for Congress
body:
I need you at an upcoming event, will you answer the call?
---
| | | | | |
---
| Friend, I don't normally send out a request like this but here it is. On December 8th, my team and I will be leaving for Washington DC to meet with the NRCC, GOP Leadership, and members of congress. While we are in DC there is an event happening here in CD7 that I need my supporters at, as I won't be able to be there myself.
On Thursday, December 9th the Foothills Republicans will be hosting an event with a bi-partisan panel, predicting the 2022 election outcomes. It is important for as many of my supporters as possible to be in the room showing the panel we can win this election.
This event is not free and that is what makes it difficult for me to ask you to attend. The club charges $25 for admission to the event and to be clear this money will not be coming to the campaign. I am asking for you to go on my behalf and to click the link below and get your ticket.
---
| | | [Get Your Ticket Here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00175bQV2y_cGOrld8wtYc7ZxIjpD6yA1dVLjtE-K0lfru8s4-qtPfZ5Ax-91zGPus5JsOxyuPqkxYrOygnx7G0g4axm35FV-U0jPAG9QLHYRGfPl3cJ-xPWH7UVxwXH68eeeOLdcNz8VnCXPK7ylQlDXtAHiDtsN6VfWO4EmgZuJmfrwDXspQkoMqX5aCnNPL4fhDVkGZ6n6HK4tbwCVUmGQUKX8Lxk1FbB8CDXy9bJSZSzdx7nJpqURrWrDYKL4G2pt28htGIxIDuiNA-h92W6gJS4gxf54zU6XYXoOlUPc7WNzFnMPTwX2s8gmKPorWB&c=3prci5HYJKlvxYl-dH_t7zEKdMC0_W1Lx1SogODcUoy6B56tbXLXkQ==&ch=sZPP8vVPz1kgID26Zg8ckO_3OKjC0DfWUq1qm_nc0DV2pwv3tQT4cg==)

| If you decide to attend this event please reply to this email so we can get you in contact with the representative from our campaign, that will also be in attendance that day.
I need your help with this and I am asking you to answer the call and stand up for our campaign next week.
Sincerely,

clean_body: I need you at an upcoming event, will you answer the call? | | | | | | | Friend, I don't normally send out a request like this but here it is. On December 8th, my team and I will be leaving for Washington DC to meet with the NRCC, GOP Leadership, and members of congress. While we are in DC there is an event happening here in CD7 that I need my supporters at, as I won't be able to be there myself. On Thursday, December 9th the Foothills Republicans will be hosting an event with a bi-partisan panel, predicting the 2022 election outcomes. It is important for as many of my supporters as possible to be in the room showing the panel we can win this election. This event is not free and that is what makes it difficult for me to ask you to attend. The club charges $25 for admission to the event and to be clear this money will not be coming to the campaign. I am asking for you to go on my behalf and to click the link below and get your ticket. | | | == | If you decide to attend this event please reply to this email so we can get you in contact with the representative from our campaign, that will also be in attendance that day. I need your help with this and I am asking you to answer the call and stand up for our campaign next week. Sincerely, | | == | ---|--- | Laurel Imer Presumptive Republican Nominee, CO-07 | | == | | | | == | == == == | == | | | == | This email was Paid for By Laurel Imer for Congress | This email was sent by Prodigy Consulting Group, LLC with authorization from Laurel Imer for Congress and approval by Laurel Imer | | Laurel Imer for Congress | PO Box 17747, Golden, CO 80402 | | Sent by mailto:contact@laurelimerforcongress.com powered by

body:
Bar none.
[](http://email.magaactionalert.com/c/eJxlkE1rhDAQhn-N3hSdZBM9eOiu3UILhdJCe1vGfGggRtHIsv31TWTbSyHk8OTJzLwjG6CcEpWaBgooSyhKIEAOdU5lzUAwRoEjZ1wntBixRxTeTA6tWnwupjEdmo50WGmuO8Kw0AI6WjMNFFVFkTLsUtsM3s9rQh4SOIdj51yisberWVSsEdA6K2HQZpPWasnK6JHz5sfLqKTZxoS0MxqZAItsnbZFqMA89nckcAxC7yIclDb94M06ucuh0PpXmZxXzgdjD1pCnf1TsyAJJ3ycgF2cDS1J-zV_vn6896f6aYeDkSFKe3x72dRznS6NnK_GWrMyHlbUjyHZvpgwkTX61iT8mADsvwD2HUAnK0Ra4SEjvM2-F_cYn-AUbn-b1Z93L5GrWDRS3v4Ag3uHuA) Hey folks, **I don't do this often, but I need to make a direct appeal to you today.

This is the best deal we’re offering all year -- and once it’s gone, it’s gone.**

We need your membership. We just do. _Right now, we have the best deal of the year._ **[It's 50% off for new members with code DW50.](http://email.magaactionalert.com/c/eJxlkLFyhCAQhp9GOx1dELzCIhdzRVKlTXPDwaLMABrFuZinDziXNJlhKD4-dvdf1QHllGBuOqigrqGqgQBpTiVVJwaSMQpccMZ1RisnBiFkMJMXFpdQysnlYwdKI9e0oq2ijeRSMkROb7SuGAqt2tx2YwjzmpGnDC7x2LlUwtj9bhZMNSJaZ5RG2GLSGpeiTh65bMFdHSqzuYz0szAqA5bYOm2LxMiCGB5ICheFwSc4ojbDGMw6-WtTaf2rTD6gD9E4gtZwKv6pRZSklyFNwK7expak_-Ru_PrQYt0POBoVo_Tn97cNX0_50qn5bqw1K-NxRYOLyY7FxIms0XuX8XMGcPwCOHYAN9UKQVvRFIT3xffiX9ITPMc77DP-eY8SJaaiifL-B7rciFw)** When you click the link **[here,](http://email.magaactionalert.com/c/eJxlkM9uhCAQh59GbxoYENaDh93abbNNmjR9gA3yR0kQjWK226cvmG0vTQiHj4-Z-Y1qgHJKdG4bQIAxIAwESFWXVNUMJGMUuOCMm4yiUfRCyGAnL5xeQimnMR8ayoQGUVOFK6QN1sogipEiuJOi7jqUu2YIYV4zcszgHI-bSyWsu9_solONiNZZSytcMRmjlwInj5y3MF5Hrew2ZqSdhVUZsMTWaVukjiyI_oGkGKPQ-wQHbWw_BLtO_lohY36VyQftQzT2oBjq4p9aREl6GdIE7OpdbEnar5fL51G9vst5h4NVMUp7-njb9KXOl0bNN-ucXRmPK-rHmGxfTJzIWXNvMn7KAPZfAPsOoFMHIehBVAXhbfG9-Of0BE_xDvdZ_3mPEqVORRPl7Q80roee)** and use code DW50 to get **50%** off all new memberships.
[BECOME A MEMBER NOW](http://email.magaactionalert.com/c/eJxlkMuOgyAUhp9Gdxo5IOjCRTu2i-mqi1k3lIuSIBLFNM7TD5jObCYhLD4-_nORHRBGsMpNBxUgBBUCDLhuSyJbCoJSAowzynRGqokPnItgZsetWkIp5ikfOyQbLXkNDWrrJ22Jwi2VGNUSmpgoILfdGIJfM3zK4BqP9aXkxu4vs6iUEdHqlTDcFrPWailQ8vB1C9NjUtJsU4Z7z43MgCa2ztsiVGSBD28k-BSFwSU4Km2GMZh1do-60vpXmV1QLkTjGBRBW_xTiygJJ0LqgD6cjSWjvn9d6uvt7skBRyPjKP35ftvUZ5svnfQvY61ZKYsrGqY42bGY2JE1eu8yds4Ajl8Axw7gKRvOScPrArO--F7cJT3BR7zD7tWf944oVQpNlPU_ptCGNA) But here's the thing -- it’s not just you get all the right content... you know, the extra stuff hanging out with me as an all-access member, or watching Candace’s show, or becoming part of the Sweet Baby Gang with Matt Walsh. It’s that you make a difference.

With your help, we’ve made so much of a difference this year. We needed your help to do it. Between last Thanksgiving and this Thanksgiving, let me just give you a taste of what you have helped us do here at Daily Wire.

First, you allowed us to help Gina Carano. Gina was fired from Disney+ for no good reason at all, simply because they didn’t like her political point of view. Well, we picked her up, and now we’re making a movie. It's coming out next year, and it's going to be fantastic -- Terror On the Prairie. We were able to make that huge leap into the entertainment space thanks to your help. With your help we have a bunch of entertainment stuff coming, including the brand new Adam Carolla series, Truth Yeller, which is available right now.

**And also -- just as importantly -- maybe more importantly -- you allowed us to jump in and fight the fight with our investigative journalism.** Our investigative reporter, Luke Rosiak, is the guy who broke wide open the Loudoun County story in which a parent had basically been treated as a domestic terrorist by the media and also by the government. It turns out that the reason that he was so upset at the school board was because they were _overtly lying_ about the fact that his daughter had been attacked in a bathroom stall. _And they were doing that in order to promote transgenderism and transgender bathrooms._

We fought back against the radical trans movement and made a huge difference in Loudoun County. And now, the governor of Virginia, the incoming governor, is going to be a Republican -- Glenn Youngkin. _That's because of our investigative reporting, and that's because of your help._

And then, just as big, you are helping us fight the Biden Administration’s vaccine mandate all across the country. **One hundred million** people are going to be forced to vax or be fired unless we stop them. And we have taken the lead here at the Daily Wire.
We here at Daily Wire said Day One that we are not going to comply with Joe Biden's unconstitutional and tyrannical vax mandate. We could do that because we had the confidence of having you behind us. Because of ALL of our members. You should become a member today, and help us out as we **[take Joe Biden all the way to the Supreme Court and STOP. THAT. VAX. MANDATE.](http://email.magaactionalert.com/c/eJxlkM9uhCAQh59GbxoZEPDgoVu7hzbZZJ9gw_JHSQCNYja7T18wbS9NCIePj5n5jeqBMIJ1aXtoACFoEGDAbVcT1VGQlBJgglFmCtJ4MQoho52DcHqNtZx9OfWYt1J3wBFTmFNpGFMA5N5QhoBRbkrXTzEuW4HfCjin45ZaCeueD7vqXCOhbdHSClfNxui1QtnD5z36m9fK7r7AwyKsKoBmts37KnViUYw_SAqfhDFkOGljxynabQ63tjHmV5lD1CEm4wiKoKv-qVWSZJAxT0BvwaWWeLjc-cSur5FcDjhZlaIMp-vXrj-7cu3V8rDO2Y2ytKLRp2THYtJEzppnX7BTAXD8Ajh2AHfFhSBctBVmQ_Vaw0d-gvd0x-ei_7yfErXORTNlwzea1oZS)**

name: Cheri Beasley
subject: As a former Chief Justice, I know access to safe and legal abortion is a constitutional right.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
Today, the Supreme Court heard arguments on the dangerous Mississippi abortion ban.
#

Hey -
Today, the Supreme Court heard arguments on the dangerous Mississippi abortion ban.
Well, I was the Chief Justice of the North Carolina Supreme Court.
So, let me share an expert opinion: **access to safe and legal abortion is a constitutional right.**
The landmark _Roe v. Wade_ case established this more than 50 years ago and the Supreme Court has affirmed it many, many times.
So what makes this case different?
Even though the Supreme Court has upheld _Roe_ before, the fact that they are even __hearing__ this case is a sign that reproductive freedom is at risk.
And the Mississippi law is just one of over one hundred laws states passed this year to limit abortion rights.
These attacks on our fundamental freedoms are unAmerican and dangerous — which is exactly why we must speak out.
**[Will you join me in calling on Congress to protect abortion rights by codifying _Roe v. Wade_?](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/mississippi_abortion_ban/?source=em211201-1-t2&refcode2=90.357359.34UVW0&t=1&akid=90%2E357359%2E34UVW0)**
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/mississippi_abortion_ban/?source=em211201-1-t2&refcode2=90.357359.34UVW0&t=2&akid=90%2E357359%2E34UVW0)**
To make that a reality, we need to bring the same energy we have here today to the ballot box.
These attacks aren’t going to stop until we elect leaders who are strong enough to stand up to them.
I'm running to be that leader in the U.S. Senate, and I will not back down from any fight to protect our rights.
\- Cheri Beasley
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/mississippi_abortion_ban/?source=em211201-1-t2&refcode2=90.357359.34UVW0&t=3&akid=90%2E357359%2E34UVW0)**

Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
PO Box 28778
Raleigh, NC 27611
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you want to receive fewer emails, you may [submit this form to get only our most important updates](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=4&akid=90%2E357359%2E34UVW0). Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.cheribeasley.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=90%2E357359%2E34UVW0). If you would like to support Cheri's campaign for the U.S. Senate in North Carolina, please consider [making a donation](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beasley-em-2021?refcode=em-footer&t=6&refcode2=90_357359_34UVW0&akid=90%2E357359%2E34UVW0) today to help us make history.

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: We're up against just about every corporate special interest in America
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

We came up a little short on our November goal — [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/85517?refcode=em20211201-20772&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=20772%2E1203867%2EvdYnmR ]can you chip in
$3 to help us pick up our fundraising?

Because we’re a grassroots organization, hitting our monthly goals is
critical to keep up our work of supporting the campaigns of our 2022 slate
— five working-class progressive women of color. So, coming up a little
short last month means we’re already behind for December.

And here’s a big reason why December is even more important than last
month, Peter:
December 31st is the final FEC deadline of the year. That means we’ll not
only need to fundraise for our own organization, we’ll also need to make
sure we’re raising money for our slate — Jessica Cisneros, Summer Lee,
Kina Collins, Rana Abdelhamid, and Odessa Kelly.

12/31 is the final day to raise money before our candidates release their
fundraising totals to compare with their opponents' war chests funded by
Wall Street, Big Pharma, Big Oil, and just about every other corporate
special interest in America.

Some of the corporate Democrats our slate is running against have more
than a million dollars in the bank. And the truth is, it’s hard to keep
pace with the Democratic establishment when they can go to health
insurance PACs and fossil fuel executives to ask for big checks. So, we
really need our grassroots supporters to chip in whatever they can today.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/85517?refcode=em20211201-20772&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=20772%2E1203867%2EvdYnmR ]Peter, can
you donate $3 to help us catch up and get off to a strong
start in December? The strength of our campaigns to expand the Squad and
bring progressive, working-class power to Congress are counting on you.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/85517?refcode=em20211201-20772&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=20772%2E1203867%2EvdYnmR ]Contribute $3

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1023&akid=20772%2E1203867%2EvdYnmR ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1024&akid=20772%2E1203867%2EvdYnmR ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20211201-20772-footer&t=1025&refcode2=20772_1203867_vdYnmR&akid=20772%2E1203867%2EvdYnmR

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1026&akid=20772%2E1203867%2EvdYnmR

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com
